nationalIdeas.name: adu_stand_against_the_reconquista
nationalIdeas.title: Stand Against the Reconquista
nationalIdeas.desc: In the wake of the Almohad's collapse, the Christian kingdoms seized the opportunity to conquer most of Iberia for themselves. But they did not succeed entirely; we must stand against them!

nationalIdeas.name: adu_taifa_adminstration
nationalIdeas.title: Taifa Administration
nationalIdeas.desc: Iberia was once divided between several powerful Muslim taifas who administered their domains autonomously. We should restore these taifas to ease the burden of administering our expanding realm.

nationalIdeas.name: adu_ahl_uhl_dhimma
nationalIdeas.title: Alh Ulh Dhimma
nationalIdeas.desc: Though we have pushed back the Christian kings, many of their former subjects do not follow our faith. We will demonstrate our benevolence by extending to them the tolerance and respect that was denied to Muslims under Christian rule.

nationalIdeas.name: adu_legacy_of_ibn_arabi
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of Ibn Arabi
nationalIdeas.desc: The works of Ibn Arabi, a renowned scholar and mystic of the 13th Century, are enjoying renewed popularity in Al-Andalus. Our realm is once more becoming a center of Islamic learning, a trend we should take every measure to promote.

nationalIdeas.name: adu_jund_settlements
nationalIdeas.title: Jund Settlements
nationalIdeas.desc: Our expansion is driven by a form of military colonialism called the jund system, in which bands of warriors are granted newly conquered lands to rule and settle. The prospect of reward is a powerful motivator for recruitment, ensuring that there is never a shortage of manpower in our regiments.

nationalIdeas.name: adu_expeditionary_sentiment
nationalIdeas.title: Expeditionary Sentiment
nationalIdeas.desc: We have heard tales from captured Portuguese sailors about a New World to the west, abundant with gold and silver. We should organize our own expeditions across the ocean and see for ourselves whether these rumours are true.

nationalIdeas.name: adu_al_awasim
nationalIdeas.title: Al Awasim
nationalIdeas.desc: It is vitally important that our frontier with the Christian kingdoms is heavily fortified. A chain of strongholds shall be erected on the borders so that no enemy may pass into our territory without enduring a costly siege.

nationalIdeas.name: aks_stellae_builders
nationalIdeas.title: Stellae Builders
nationalIdeas.desc: The ancient Aksumite Empire was famous for the many stellae they built. We have inherited this tradition, so that the glorious achievements of our nation are widely known.

nationalIdeas.name: aks_legacy_of_king_kaleb
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of King Kaleb
nationalIdeas.desc: King Kaleb was the greatest ruler our nation ever had. During his reign the ancient borders of the Aksumite Empire expanded further than ever before. His legacy is alive in us, and so we shall expand even further.

nationalIdeas.name: aks_persian_revenge
nationalIdeas.title: Persian Revenge
nationalIdeas.desc: The wars against Persia long ago shamed our country with its most crushing loss. It is now time for payback.

nationalIdeas.name: aks_christianity_stronghold
nationalIdeas.title: Christianity Stronghold
nationalIdeas.desc: Despite being completely surrounded by other religions, the Aksumite Empire remained a refuge for Christians for centuries. We will keep being strong in the faith.

nationalIdeas.name: aks_mediterranean_contacts
nationalIdeas.title: Mediterranean Contacts
nationalIdeas.desc: The Aksumite Empire was always very connected with the Mediterranean countries, including Greece and the Roman Empire. This allowed for a great flow of information.

nationalIdeas.name: aks_trade_hub
nationalIdeas.title: Trade Hub
nationalIdeas.desc: Our nation has always been a crossroads for trade, connecting the Mediterranean to the Indian routes, trading specially in ivory, gold and salt. The flow of trade is strong in our country.

nationalIdeas.name: aks_coin_minting
nationalIdeas.title: Coin Minting
nationalIdeas.desc: We have always been rich in gold sources, which allowed us to produce our own coin system. With that, we can better regulate our economy.

nationalIdeas.name: ALA_endurance
nationalIdeas.title: Aleutian Endurance
nationalIdeas.desc: The Aleut people live in Alaska’s far north and have been in this harsh cold land for millennia and have survived these harsh conditions through ingenious fishing and heating methods. By emulating the survival tactics of the native Alaskan peoples, we too may make the most out of our cold unforgiving home.

nationalIdeas.name: ALA_hard_push_east
nationalIdeas.title: The Hard Push East
nationalIdeas.desc: Unlike many European settlements in America’s far west, Alaska was approached from the East by sea. Though many would have dismissed Alaska as useless arctic wastes, our overlord wisely took note of the beauty and opportunity our unlikely home presented and soon adapted to our somewhat difficult lifestyle.

nationalIdeas.name: ALA_secretary_icebox
nationalIdeas.title: The Secretary's Icebox
nationalIdeas.desc: Even though Alaskan lands were purchased at a ridiculously low price, costing a mere 2 cents per acre, the purchase of Alaska was ridiculed as being the “Secretary’s Icebox”, mocking the ministers who purchased our lands. What those short-sighted fools failed to recognise was the hidden value of Alaska and its resources, and even now, we are underestimated by our rivals.

nationalIdeas.name: ALA_bear_hunting
nationalIdeas.title: Bear Hunting
nationalIdeas.desc: It gets awfully cold and boring up here in the far northern reaches of Alaska. One activity both commoners and the ruling class alike enjoy is the activity of strolling out into the wilderness with a rifle and blasting hell into some unsuspecting animals! This activity has indirectly made our people expert marksmen, an incredibly useful skill in times of war!

nationalIdeas.name: ALA_diversity
nationalIdeas.title: Alaskan Religious Diversity
nationalIdeas.desc: Our colony has been subject to several overlords and has attracted settlers from all across the pacific and the heartland of the Americas. As such, from Anchorage to Juneau, our people pray to God each in their own unique way and we would do well to continue to allow our people the religious freedom that has shaped Alaska into a religious free haven.

nationalIdeas.name: ALA_navy
nationalIdeas.title: Alaskan Navy
nationalIdeas.desc: Anchorage, Navy Town, and many other cities along the coasts of Alaska celebrate our maritime traditions. From the sea we hunt the fish and whales vital for our continued survival and growth, and along the shoreline the Alaskan coast-guard protects our people from Pacific invaders. All across the country, our people heed the call of the sea and flock to our ports to serve the Alaskan navy.

nationalIdeas.name: ALA_beauty
nationalIdeas.title: The Beauty of Alaska
nationalIdeas.desc: Our home is famous for its breathtaking landscapes both along the arctic coastline and deep in the uninhabited mountain range. Most people would avoid visiting anywhere frigid and unforgiving, but Alaska is unique in its natural beauty and appeal to settlers and tourists alike.

nationalIdeas.name: barbary_slave_trade
nationalIdeas.title: The Barbary Slave Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: Raiding is an especially profitable occupation for the pirates of the Barbary Coast due to the high price that Christian slaves can fetch in Turkish and Arabian markets.

nationalIdeas.name: galley_slaves
nationalIdeas.title: Galley Slaves
nationalIdeas.desc: Not all of the slaves we capture are sold in the East; many are fated to serve on the galleys, ensuring a ready supply of seamen to row our ships.

nationalIdeas.name: vengeful_refugees
nationalIdeas.title: Vengeful Refugees
nationalIdeas.desc: As both Muslims and Moriscos are expelled by the Christians of Iberia, refugees flee to the Maghreb. These refugees are none too pleased about being displaced, and eagerly accept the opportunity to profit from their downfall.

nationalIdeas.name: mazmorras
nationalIdeas.title: Mazmorras
nationalIdeas.desc: Christian princes tell grim tales about our dungeons, the dreaded Mazmorras. Here we keep our most valuable captives, those with wealthy family members with the money to pay for their safe return. The conditions typical in the Mazmorras ensure that ransoms are paid swiftly.

nationalIdeas.name: barbary_fortified_strongholds
nationalIdeas.title: Fortified Pirate Strongholds
nationalIdeas.desc: A pirate stronghold must be fortified against attack from both land and sea. We must constuct defenses for our cities to repel invaders.

nationalIdeas.name: heirs_of_al_andalus
nationalIdeas.title: Heirs of Al-Andalus
nationalIdeas.desc: Among those fleeing the Reconquista in Spain are the former Princes and Princesses of Al-Andalus, the great Muslim empire that once spanned nearly the whole of Iberia. These nobles are eager to restore their lost realms by any means necessary.

nationalIdeas.name: barbary_board_of_captains
nationalIdeas.title: Board of Captains
nationalIdeas.desc: We must establish a council of our most skilled Captains to guide and regulate piracy and the slave trade in our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: sons_of_kupe
nationalIdeas.title: Sons of Kupe
nationalIdeas.desc: Estimated to have occurred sometime in the 11th century, Kupe's Voyage is a legendary story shared by all Maori. It tells of a hero from Hawaiki who set off on a voyage with his wife Kuramarotini in her great canoe, Matawhourua. On their legendary voyage they encountered countless sea monsters, demons, and harsh weathers before discovering the incredible land of Aotearoa. Upon returning to Hawaiki, he told his people of the incredible things he saw, and that a new life waited for them on these distant shores. It is from these enraptured listeners that we are descended, and the voyager spirit is something that exists at the very heart of our people.

nationalIdeas.name: kaitiakitanga
nationalIdeas.title: Kaitiakitanga
nationalIdeas.desc: Kaikiatitanga is the sacred guardianship that all Maori owe to the sky, the sea, and the land. One who practices this tradition is Kaitiaki or guardian and is a sacred guardian who defends the inanimate forces of Mana that surround us but are incapable of defending themselves. To desecrate a holy site is considered equivalent to murder in Maori society, so harmful acts such as polluting a river, chopping down a forest, or excessively plundering natural resources are considered sin without measure. It is only by living in harmony with our environment and restricting ourselves on how much we encroach on nature is the only way to please the Gods and grow rich with Mana.

nationalIdeas.name: kaumatua
nationalIdeas.title: Kaumatua
nationalIdeas.desc: Although we are not ruled by the elder council, they are highly influential in our society. A Kaumatua is elected by their family for their supreme intellect, wisdom, and renown to ensure that the family and Iwi as a whole continues to maintain the sacred traditions valued to the Maori. Kaumatua holds the soul of an immortal demi-god who possesses the power of reincarnation, and have existed across countless lifetimes, and may return at any moment to give the family guidance.

nationalIdeas.name: kapa_haka
nationalIdeas.title: Kapa Haka
nationalIdeas.desc: The Kapa Haka is a series of stomps and chants, most comparable to a war-dance. The dance is typically performed by warriors as they approach a battle, as an attempt to bolster friendly morale as well as intimidate their enemies. The dance demonstrates strength and prowess, while belittling the strength and prowess of their enemy.

nationalIdeas.name: pa_defence
nationalIdeas.title: Pa Defense
nationalIdeas.desc: A Pa is a Maori village built in a highly defensible position. Similar to European castles, a Pa is constructed to ensure the continued survival of the local people during wartime. Pa are strong and defensive, but inexpensive and can be built and maintained for little more than a standard village, so while our enemies wait and starve outside our gates, we may continue to prosper within the walls of our mighty fortified village.

nationalIdeas.name: te_moko
nationalIdeas.title: Te Moko
nationalIdeas.desc: The art of the tattoo is a tradition practiced widely across our lands. A man is hardly a man if he has not felt the mark of ink on his flesh. We mark these tattoos into our skin with chisels, as we are as tough and unmoving as stone, and we welcome the scars they leave behind. To be marked with traditional tattoos is a sign of great strength and prestige, and causes the weak foreigners to tremble as we charge towards them; our faces blessed by the markings of our gods and ancestors.

nationalIdeas.name: maori_king
nationalIdeas.title: The Maori King Movement
nationalIdeas.desc: In 1858, by popular demand, a Maori king was elected to represent, but not rule over, all other Iwi. Though some rejected the authority of this democratically selected King, many Maori flocked to the King's cause as a way of preventing the alienation of Maori land by the British colonists. Just as Victoria ruled over all the Brits, this king would rule over all the Maori and allow equal negotiations with the Europeans with a unified voice.

nationalIdeas.name: ARB_arabian_pincers
nationalIdeas.title: Arabian Horseman Tactics
nationalIdeas.desc: During the rise of the Caliphate many of our battles were won thanks to our tactics with the horseman. Feign retreat and careful flanking are just few tactics at our disposal, further reinforced by our skilled riders.

nationalIdeas.name: ARB_pact_of_umar
nationalIdeas.title: The Pact of Umar
nationalIdeas.desc: The pact of Umar has been signed between Caliph Umar and the Dhimmi of the realm. Having later gained a revered status in Islamic jurisprudence, it is treated as the baseline for the treatment of the dhimmi.

nationalIdeas.name: ARB_engage_in_indian_ocean_trade
nationalIdeas.title: Engage in Indian Ocean Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: Many Arabian merchants already actively participate in the Indian Ocean Trade. It is thanks to their ventures that Islam has peacefully spread to all corners of the Indian Ocean. Under our management, those commercial trips shall not cease to happen.

nationalIdeas.name: ARB_conversion
nationalIdeas.title: Spread the Word
nationalIdeas.desc: The story and life of Muhammad and his revelations are still unknown to many throughout the world. Let us spread the word of his lifetime and salvation that awaits those who follow his word.

nationalIdeas.name: ARB_jihad
nationalIdeas.title: Jihad
nationalIdeas.desc: The basic for our expansionist doctrine is Jihad - the Holy War directed at heathens. Islam must be expanded, even if it means shedding blood.

nationalIdeas.name: ARB_new_caliphate_rising
nationalIdeas.title: New Caliphate Rising
nationalIdeas.desc: The chain of rightful Caliphates seems to have been broken with the subjugation of the Abbasids and the fact they have become puppets of the Mamluk Sultanate. Time to restore the line of Caliphates.

nationalIdeas.name: ARB_mubarizun
nationalIdeas.title: The Mubarizun
nationalIdeas.desc: Mubarizun were the elite and most trained members of the Arabian army. Their purpose was to engage in fights against the champions of the foe.

nationalIdeas.name: apostolic_church1
nationalIdeas.title: Apostolic Church
nationalIdeas.desc: Armenia was the first nation to establish Christianity as its state religion in 301. The sense of having the first national church in the world brings us immense pride in our nation. Our religious faith has helped us maintain our identity and hope, especially with thanks to the Saint Mesrop Mashdots and his Armenian alphabet, which revolutionized the fate of our people. It was a fundamental step in strengthening Armenian statehood and identity.

nationalIdeas.name: land_reclamation1
nationalIdeas.title: Land Reclamation
nationalIdeas.desc: Armenia has been ravaged by war for centuries and torn apart by its neighbors. By reclaiming our lost lands and making them suitable for in-habitation along with restoring ruined churches and fortresses, we can ensure a stronger hold over our lands and improve the lives of our citizenry.

nationalIdeas.name: border_nation
nationalIdeas.title: Border Nation
nationalIdeas.desc: Armenia, since ancient times, has often been a battleground between larger nations for centuries. Even after regaining our sovereignty, it is often hard to maintain a neutral stance. It is hard to appease everyone, but it is achievable.

nationalIdeas.name: melikdom_organization1
nationalIdeas.title: Melikdom Organization
nationalIdeas.desc: As one of the few bastions of an independent Armenian state, Armenia was governed by feudal suzerains called meliks, as the old nakharar system collapsed. The relationship between meliks and their subordinates was that of a military commanding officer and junior officer, and not of a feudal lord and a serf. Peasants were often allowed to own land, were free, and owned property.

nationalIdeas.name: sygnakhs
nationalIdeas.title: Sygnakhs
nationalIdeas.desc: Sygnakhs are military structures in Armenia for recruiting organizations, fortification systems, signal beacons and logistical support. Usually each melik would have his own sygnakh, but larger sygnakhs are shared by different meliks. Establishing such sygnakhs allows us to rally our troops more effectively.

nationalIdeas.name: nakharar_titles1
nationalIdeas.title: Nakharar Titles
nationalIdeas.desc: Weakened by numerous invasions and the legal reforms of kings, the nakharar structure remained virtually unchanged for many centuries and was finally eliminated during the Mongol invasions in the thirteenth century. Restoring feudal despotism is out of the question, but reviving the ancient title of our noblemen would encourage national pride.

nationalIdeas.name: end_of_armenian_diaspora1
nationalIdeas.title: End of Armenian Diaspora
nationalIdeas.desc: Our people have been scattered far and wide, without a home to return to. The revival of the Armenian nation should encourage much of our overseas compatriots to return to their motherland!

nationalIdeas.name: asu_reconquista
nationalIdeas.title: Reconquista
nationalIdeas.desc: The former Asturian lands have been divided between upstart Spanish kingdoms. They must all be brought back into the Asturian fold.

nationalIdeas.name: asu_camino_de_santiago
nationalIdeas.title: Camino de Santiago
nationalIdeas.desc: We are the custodians of the holy pilgrimage route, the Way of Saint James. It is our duty to ensure that pious travellers can pass safely through our lands to reach the sacred site of Santiago.

nationalIdeas.name: asu_aristocracy
nationalIdeas.title: Asturian Aristocracy
nationalIdeas.desc: Asturian high society has ancient roots and deep pockets. We should ensure that they have an honored place in our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: asu_colonialism
nationalIdeas.title: Voyage to the New World
nationalIdeas.desc: Asturian financiers are eager to begin investing in New World colonies. We should establish colonial ventures of our own to maximize the profit.

nationalIdeas.name: asu_millenarian_revival
nationalIdeas.title: Millenarian Revival
nationalIdeas.desc: These are dark times, and omens of the apocalypse are clear to see. This is a sign that we must renew our faith daily and dedicate ourselves to spreading the word of the Lord to the far reaches of the Earth.

nationalIdeas.name: asu_unify_the_provinces
nationalIdeas.title: Unify the Provinces
nationalIdeas.desc: Administrative divisions within Asturias and Cantabria are woefully inefficient. The provinces must be consolidated into more centralized districts so aid in the administration of justice and the raising of levies.

nationalIdeas.name: asu_early_industrialism
nationalIdeas.title: Early Industrialism
nationalIdeas.desc: We have discovered ample sources of coal in the hills of Asturias. We should take advantage of new advances in machinery and use our natural resources to boost our manufacturing industries.

nationalIdeas.name: auh_first
nationalIdeas.title: Imperial and Royal Army
nationalIdeas.desc: While the armies of our neighbors continue the antiquated practice of feudal levying, creating disorganized and undisciplined forces, we shall establish highly regimented infantry units conscripted from across the empire, under a centralized High Command.

nationalIdeas.name: auh_second
nationalIdeas.title: Multicultural Empire
nationalIdeas.desc: Austria-Hungary's borders have increasingly grown to encompass German, Magyar, and Slavic lands. To prevent separatism and promote cultural diffusion, we shall enact a policy of equal treatment for all peoples throughout the empire.

nationalIdeas.name: auh_third
nationalIdeas.title: Industrial Centers
nationalIdeas.desc: From the coal deposits of Bohemia and Silesia, the ore mountains of Slovakia; to the gold mines of Tirol, and grain fields of the Carpathian Basin, our lands are rich in natural resources just waiting to be processed. We must invest in the latest industrial technology thus hastening the extraction and production of goods.

nationalIdeas.name: auh_fourth
nationalIdeas.title: Guarantee the Minority Rights
nationalIdeas.desc: While the empire has traditionally favored its two primary cultures, the Austrians and the Hungarians, our control of Slavic and other lands necessitates that even the smallest group of people living within our borders is given equal rights.

nationalIdeas.name: auh_fifth
nationalIdeas.title: Decentralisation
nationalIdeas.desc: This vast, multicultural state can often be unwieldy for our bureaucracy to manage. To solve such a problem, we shall decentralize, bestowing greater autonomy unto the provinces.

nationalIdeas.name: auh_sixth
nationalIdeas.title: The Blue Danube
nationalIdeas.desc: The mighty Danube is the lifeline of our empire. The river connects our most important cities and is vital for the transportation and intranational trade.

nationalIdeas.name: auh_seventh
nationalIdeas.title: The Future of Warfare
nationalIdeas.desc: Artillery is clearly the future of warfare. As armies increasingly begin to rely on cannons, it is imperative that we employ our talented military engineers to make our cannons far more powerful, durable, and affordable than our enemies' artillery. Overwhelming firepower shall win the day, and Austro-Hungarian Kanonen and Haubitzen will take all the credit!

nationalIdeas.name: AUS_outback_stations
nationalIdeas.title: Outback Stations
nationalIdeas.desc: The Outback is a harsh and unforgiving wilderness devoid of necessary amenities for life such as rivers and rainfall. However, we have adopted a method of farming akin to American ranching, where the landowner is granted Crown lands on which to raise his cattle and horses. This method of ranching is adaptable to all conditions, and has made regions of the country that would usually be useless into productive vital components of the state.

nationalIdeas.name: AUS_land_down_under
nationalIdeas.title: The Land Down Under
nationalIdeas.desc: Oceania was the last continent to be discovered by the Europeans, and Australia is by far the largest singular landmass on the Oceanic continent. The creatures found in Australia were at one point considered so fantastical and otherworldly that many Europeans simply did not believe they could exist until they saw them with their own eyes. The unfamiliar nature of our wildlife and geography makes Australia deadly for invading armies. We were once foreigners to this land as well, but we have adapted to the harsh conditions of the outback and our soldiers can easily adapt to any foreign soil.

nationalIdeas.name: AUS_eureka_rebellion
nationalIdeas.title: The Eureka Rebellion
nationalIdeas.desc: We were sent over to Australia by our former overlord as prisoners, unwanted minorities, and political insurgents from the homeland to work the gold mines in this alien land. Our overlord was foolish enough to believe that sending men who had reason to hate the state would not instigate a rebellion, but the gold miners did inevitably raise their flag in rebellion against the crown. Our overlord demanded that we surrender most of the riches accumulated from mining our gold, but we were having none of that nonsense! It was this rebellion that birthed the Eureka Flag, and although this rebellion failed, we now finally stand as an independent nation, and nobody will take Australian gold but Australians!

nationalIdeas.name: AUS_sandpaper_and_cheating
nationalIdeas.title: The Diggers
nationalIdeas.desc: The Australian Diggers are riflemen and marines deployed to fight on foreign soil for our glorious Empire. The term "digger" is slang for miner due to the fact that most Digger soldiers are miners when not on active duty. The informal term is symbolic of the Australian concept of “being mates”; equals, comrades, and friends.

nationalIdeas.name: AUS_royal_navy
nationalIdeas.title: Royal Australian Navy
nationalIdeas.desc: The Australian Royal Navy is split into six divisions based on the different provinces of the Australian colony. Now that we are free from colonial rule, we are free to unite the six provinces into one and we will make Australia into a fierce uncontested force in the Pacific.

nationalIdeas.name: AUS_bushrangers
nationalIdeas.title: Integration of the Bushrangers
nationalIdeas.desc: A sizeable number of settlers sent from the mainland to live in Australia were convicts and undesirables forced into exile, and the particularly cunning amongst these thieves and cutthroats would become Bushrangers. These were hardened men who used the unforgiving Australian bush as a base for their robbing operations. They were particularly rich and powerful during the Australian Gold Rush, but now that we have won our freedom for our colonial oppressors, these men are convicts to no-one, and we would do well to utilise their ambushing tactics on our enemies!

nationalIdeas.name: AUS_waltzing_matilda
nationalIdeas.title: Waltzing Matilda
nationalIdeas.desc:
Once a jolly swagman camped by a billabong
Under the shade of a coolibah tree,
And he sang as he watched and waited till his Billy boiled,
"You'll come a-waltzing Matilda, with me."

This traditional Australian folk song symbolises the values held by our people. It tells the story of an escaped convict stealing a sheep and dying in his fight against the law. For we in Australia, it is not the glory of victory, but the honour of the struggle that defines who we are!

nationalIdeas.name: angevin_decentralized_rule
nationalIdeas.title: Decentralized Rule
nationalIdeas.desc: During the days of the Plantagenet dynasty, the Angevin Empire's administration was managed through local governors and relatives of the king. While this decentralization is in antithesis to the rule of the king, it ensured smooth rule over the provinces in England and France.

nationalIdeas.name: english_common_law
nationalIdeas.title: English Common Law
nationalIdeas.desc: The territories of England are governed by counties and their respective sheriffs. By enforcing a common law upon all the local residents, the process of taxation is of little difficulty.

nationalIdeas.name: lessons_of_the_anglo_french_wars
nationalIdeas.title: Lessons of the Anglo-French Wars
nationalIdeas.desc: Even in the heydays of the Plantagenet rule, our state has always been in armed conflict with the Kingdom of France. The lessons from all these battles as well as the ones from the Hundred Years' War shape the discipline and will of our military to this day.

nationalIdeas.name: the_many_thrones
nationalIdeas.title: The Many Thrones of the Plantagenet
nationalIdeas.desc: The Plantagenet dynasty hold to many thrones over the decades. The Kingdom of England, Lord of Ireland, Duke of Aquitaine, Normandy, Brittany and many more.\nThe dynasty ensured a large number of heirs in order to secure and maintain the many thrones. We shall follow their example.

nationalIdeas.name: reformed_angevin_infantry
nationalIdeas.title: Reformed Angevin Infantry
nationalIdeas.desc: During the Hundred Years' War, our kingdom has used the English Longbowman to its fullest potential. However, there is always room for improvment. With the formation of the Anglo-French Union, we shall refine their techniques and teach them to our French subjects.

nationalIdeas.name: seneschal_of_france
nationalIdeas.title: The Seneschal of France
nationalIdeas.desc: The seneschal is a senior position which is filled by a member of the court who has been appointed by the king. During the Plantagenet times, the territories of France were governed by the members of the Plantagenet court.

nationalIdeas.name: rule_of_the_plantagenet
nationalIdeas.title: Rule of the Plantagenet
nationalIdeas.desc: The Angevin Realm is the result of the long and proud line of the Plantagenet. The glory of this old household shall serve as example for the dynasties to come.

nationalIdeas.name: everlating_succeession
nationalIdeas.title: Institute the Everlasting Succession
nationalIdeas.desc: The German way is that every son receives a share of their father's inheritance and every son may style himself as duke. Although this seems a fair and equitable system, the problem is that the sons can never seem to agree on what constitutes fair and equitable, leading to conflict. From now on the eldest son will receive the full inheritance.

nationalIdeas.name: bavarian_purity_law
nationalIdeas.title: Bring in the Bavarian Purity Law
nationalIdeas.desc: There is a conspiracy to sap and impurify all of our precious bodily fluids, this must be stopped. From now on beer in Bavaria will be pure and this will keep the people safe.

nationalIdeas.name: bavarian_state_orchestra
nationalIdeas.title: Found the Bavarian State Orchestra
nationalIdeas.desc: To show the world how great Bavaria is, we will found and support one of the finest orchestras in Europe. Every visitor to our court will marvel at the virtuoso performances and bring word far and wide of our status.

nationalIdeas.name: geistlicher_rat
nationalIdeas.title: Establish the Geistlicher Rat
nationalIdeas.desc: The Geistlicher Rat is a separate council of state, separate from the privy council, dealing solely with ecclesiastical affairs. The goal of this council is to ensure the discipline of the clergy and to promote the one true faith throughout the Duchy.

nationalIdeas.name: brewmaster_general
nationalIdeas.title: Become Brewmaster General
nationalIdeas.desc: In order to improve the finances of Bavaria we are going to set up a monopoly on the sale of strong beer. The beer must first be sold to factors of the Duke. Coupled with monopolies on grain and salt, the sales of beer will bring in strong revenues.

nationalIdeas.name: professional_army
nationalIdeas.title: Found a Professional Army
nationalIdeas.desc: Prior to this the Army of Bavaria has been a combination of feudal levies and mercenary regiments. This will simply not do, first rank countries in our age have professional armies and Bavaria will too.

nationalIdeas.name: royal_order_of_st_george
nationalIdeas.title: Found the Royal Order of Saint George for the Defense of the Immaculate Conception
nationalIdeas.desc: The Order of the Garter, the Order of the Golden Fleece, every great state seems to have an order of chivalry associated with it. So too will Bavaria. Not only will it show the world the importance of Bavaria, but it will also provide us with a tool of patronages and help to revive the ideals of chivalry in our lands.

nationalIdeas.name: bha_modernized_war_elephants
nationalIdeas.title: Modernized War Elephant Tactics
nationalIdeas.desc: With the increasing prevalence of artillery on the battlefield, we have cause to re-evaluate our war elephant tactics. We must outfit both our elephants and their mahouts with sufficient armor, expand their use in military logistics, and consider their applications in the field of siegecraft.

nationalIdeas.name: bha_united_india
nationalIdeas.title: Unite the Subcontinent
nationalIdeas.desc: The many people, cultures, languages, and nations that make up the Indian subcontinent shall be united; our diversity shall give us strength.

nationalIdeas.name: bha_sanskrit_golden_age
nationalIdeas.title: Golden Age of Sanskrit Literature
nationalIdeas.desc: Sanskrit literature has been on the decline since the Islamic conquests of centuries prior. It is time to revive our most ancient textual traditions, introducing them to new generations of scholars and promoting a literate society across our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: bha_indian_army
nationalIdeas.title: Indian Army
nationalIdeas.desc: A single army marching under one banner, a disciplined military force wearing a single uniform; this is our vision for the Indian army.

nationalIdeas.name: bha_ganga
nationalIdeas.title: Ganga
nationalIdeas.desc: Many Hindus worship the river Ganges as a goddess, bringing purity and redemption to the faithful. We implore pilgrims to visit the river banks to bathe in the sacred waters. Through Ganga, our nation is made pure.

nationalIdeas.name: bha_brahmin_administration
nationalIdeas.title: Brahmin Administration
nationalIdeas.desc: Brahmins have long been involved in state administration throughout India. It is time to institutionalize their role in the bureaucracy. This will at once cement their power in the state and in society, while also ensuring that the Brahmins understand that their role is administrative rather than political.

nationalIdeas.name: bha_rocketry
nationalIdeas.title: Develop Rocket Technology
nationalIdeas.desc: Iron-cased rockets have yet to be widely adapted for military purposes, yet their explosive power surely has tactical applications. We should experiment with this technology and test it on the battlefield.

nationalIdeas.name: mother_of_russian_cities
nationalIdeas.title: The Mother of Russian States
nationalIdeas.desc: Historically Kiev was the center of Rus' before the Mongol invasion. Many other Russian states attempted to fill the void after Kiev's fall: Moscow, Tver, Novgorod... But none of them could match Kiev's former glory.\nUnlike these northern upstarts, however, we are true heirs of the Kievan legacy, our people walk the same land as our Kievan ancestors and our capital aspires to the same greatness. Our claims must be respected!

nationalIdeas.name: international_influences
nationalIdeas.title: Foreign Influences
nationalIdeas.desc: Russian lands were historically divided among several nations, among them Poles, Lithuanians, Tatars and Hungarians. As such, our citizens come from multiple cultures and follow different religions. To be a unified state we must respect their faith.

nationalIdeas.name: zaporizhian_cossacs
nationalIdeas.title: Zaporozhian Cossacks
nationalIdeas.desc: The Cossack caste originated in the Zaporozhian steppes and quickly became the strongest military power in that region. Now they are a part of the Rusyn state and thus no longer need to fight for survival. As such we can reform them into the backbone of our new army.

nationalIdeas.name: east_and_west
nationalIdeas.title: East and West
nationalIdeas.desc: Our geographic location between the states of the east and the west provided our merchants with an opportunity to be the middle men in the extremely lucrative trade routes of the region.

nationalIdeas.name: legacy_of_ancient_rus
nationalIdeas.title: Heritage of the Old Rus'
nationalIdeas.desc: The social systems of the old Rus' often varied greatly from the Muscovite despotism. In Ruthenia more freedom was given to the peasants, state serfdom was not enforced, and the nobility did serve the state instead of exploiting it. It helped to transform Ruthenia into a modern Kievan Rus'.

nationalIdeas.name: reuniting_rus
nationalIdeas.title: Reuniting Rus'
nationalIdeas.desc: Kievan Rus' has been reborn in Ruthenian lands, but many people of the old Rus live under foreign rule or in small principalities. Rus must be reunited!

nationalIdeas.name: birth_of_russian_orthodoxy
nationalIdeas.title: Birth of Russian Orthodoxy
nationalIdeas.desc: The early Rus' suffered from various religious troubles. In the year 988 Vladimir the Great was baptized after the capture of Korsun. Upon returning to Kiev he ordered the mass baptism of the citizenry in the Dnieper river, marking the first step in the Christianization of Rus'.

nationalIdeas.name: legacy_of_sword_brethren
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of Sword Brethren
nationalIdeas.desc: The Duchy of Kurland is established on the lands of Schwertbrüderorden, the Livonian Brothers of the Sword. Our first duke was the Grandmaster and our nobility, the knights of the Order. The noble converted to Protestantism and the Order secularized, but the Christian Knights' fortress stands firmly.

nationalIdeas.name: privilegium_gotthardinum
nationalIdeas.title: Privilegium Gotthardinum
nationalIdeas.desc: While our people are mainly Latvians, the majority of our ruling class is, however, German. Hence it becomes a necessity to ensure the power of our nobles. The privilege issued by Gotthard Kettler the first duke of Kurland and Semigallia allows our landholders to enserf the native peasantry on their lands and grants them a high juridical power, this shall strengthen our authority effectively.

nationalIdeas.name: duchy_of_mercantilism
nationalIdeas.title: Duchy of Mercantilism
nationalIdeas.desc: Our country may be small, but definitely not insignificant, the Duchy of Kurland was among the most important trading states around the Baltic Sea. We should push this one step further. By promoting the Mercantilist policy, we can forge our nation into a true power in the region!

nationalIdeas.name: booming_manufacture
nationalIdeas.title: Booming Manufacture
nationalIdeas.desc: The flourishing mercantilism and a successful agriculture contribute to the development of industry. We may not be the world's factory, but our products are all over Europe - we can produce anchors and cannons, prepared bricks and tiles, glass and cloth and even more, ships built in Goldingen, Libau and Windau are sold in England and France. Such a prospering economy will certainly be only good for us...

nationalIdeas.name: couronian_colonization
nationalIdeas.title: Couronian Colonization
nationalIdeas.desc: The discovery of the New World has brought changes that cannot be ignored on our continent. This is an age of opportunity and we must not fall behind! With our wealth we can support a considerable fleet, which is the key of exploration and colonization and thus guarantee our interests overseas and the prosperity of our whole country.

nationalIdeas.name: palaces_of_mitau
nationalIdeas.title: Palaces of Mitau
nationalIdeas.desc: Mitau Palace is the largest Baroque style manor in the Baltic States, alongside the summer palace in Ruhenthal, they are also probably the most impressive palaces in the region. Designed by the famous architect Bartolomeo Rastrelli, these magnificient buildings shall of course bring us some good fame.

nationalIdeas.name: promote_the_curonian_kings
nationalIdeas.title: Promote the Curonian Kings
nationalIdeas.desc: The Curonian Kings are the descendants of the ancient Curonian chiefs. Back to the ages of Livonian Order, they enjoyed a series of privilege and served in the army during war times. After the foundation of the Duchy, they lost some of their privileges and are pushed back from the military service. Maybe we should re-promote them again, so that our country can make the best use of these descendants of fierce warriors.

nationalIdeas.name: hlr_imperial_throne
nationalIdeas.title: The Imperial Throne
nationalIdeas.desc: Charlemagne was crowned "Emperor of the Romans" by Pope Leo in AD 800, beginning the line of emperors to which we too belong. Over the years, many a man of valor and wisdom has sat on the imperial throne.

nationalIdeas.name: hlr_kaiserliche_armee
nationalIdeas.title: Kaiserliche Armee
nationalIdeas.desc: The Empire has had its own army since the Imperial Diet of 1422 in Nuremberg. Now that we are unified in practice as well as in name, we shall expand the army into a strong and well-trained force loyal only to the banner of the Emperor.

nationalIdeas.name: hlr_imperial_diplomacy
nationalIdeas.title: Imperial Diplomacy
nationalIdeas.desc: The expertise of our diplomatic corps is unparalleled. As the Holy Roman Emperors, we have had subjects come and go for centuries, allowing our diplomats to build up a considerable knowledge base that has been passed down for generations.

nationalIdeas.name: hlr_centralised_empire
nationalIdeas.title: Centralized Empire
nationalIdeas.desc: With the empire unified we have we have become more centralized. This has lessened the power of local rulers, allowing us to channel more of its wealth into our own coffers.

nationalIdeas.name: hlr_roman_heritage
nationalIdeas.title: Roman Heritage
nationalIdeas.desc: As the Holy Roman Empire, we lay claim to a legacy that dates back to Augustus, the first Emperor of Rome. Now that we have unified our realm into a single, centralized state, it is time to strive to restore Rome's ancient glories and reunite the lands it once owned.

nationalIdeas.name: hlr_adopting_the_goosestep
nationalIdeas.title: Adopting the Goosestep
nationalIdeas.desc: Officers from Brandenburg have risen to positions of influence in our army. We have are progressively adopting many of their military traditions in our quest to establish an army that is second to none.

nationalIdeas.name: hlr_onwards_and_upwards
nationalIdeas.title: Onwards and Upwards
nationalIdeas.desc: Our imperial administration, forged through centuries of negotiations between the Emperor and his Princes, is now a versatile, well-oiled machine capable of integrating large and diverse territories into our realm. Now we can finally claim our destiny and emerge as a force capable of uniting all of Europe.

nationalIdeas.name: ers_guardians_of_the_sacred_fire
nationalIdeas.title: Guardians of the Sacred Fire
nationalIdeas.desc: The position of the king of all kings is not only the absolute authority of our country but also the guardian of the sacred flame. As such, his role is of great divine purpose.

nationalIdeas.name: ers_restore_the_academy_of_gondishapur
nationalIdeas.title: Refound the Academy of Gondishapur
nationalIdeas.desc: The Gondishapur University was one of the great centers of education during the Sasanian era. After its fall to the Muslims, the academy continued its service until it eventually became outclassed by the House of Wisdom in Baghdad. Ever since then, the Academy of Gondishapur has been forsaken. It is time to refound it once again.

nationalIdeas.name: ers_wuzurg_framadar
nationalIdeas.title: Wuzurg Framadar
nationalIdeas.desc: Any great empire needs a bureaucracy which can carry its weight. In the times of the Sasanian empire, this bureaucracy was handled by the Wuzurg Framadar - the Grand Vizier of the Zoroastrian era. Many administrative issues were handled by this influential advisor and the Zoroastrian priesthood within our state.

nationalIdeas.name: ers_reform_the_savaran_cavalry
nationalIdeas.title: Reform the Savaran Cavalry
nationalIdeas.desc: The Savaran cavalry was once the backbone of the Sasanian empire. Their weapons and armor made them much-feared enemies on the battlefield, and their most elite were a class in the Sasanian society of its own. It is time to bring this prestigious group of horsemen back onto the field to once again protect Eranshahr from its enemies.

nationalIdeas.name: improved_silk_road
nationalIdeas.title: Improve the Silk Road
nationalIdeas.desc: A system of upgrades to roads and bridges, a system of guards to protect the roads (for a small tax) and a chain of Caravanserai to provide rest stops. All help the merchants as they traverse the silk road and also provide increased revenues for the state.

nationalIdeas.name: ers_rebuild_the_caspian_gates
nationalIdeas.title: Rebuild the Caspian Gates
nationalIdeas.desc: The fall of the Sasanian empire to the Muslims is a learning opportunity for our state. Bolstering our defenses and rebuilding the Caspian Gates to keep intruders at bay will be of great value for the rising Zoroastrian empire.

nationalIdeas.name: ers_sasanian_siege_warfare
nationalIdeas.title: Sasanian Siege Warfare
nationalIdeas.desc: At the height of the Sasanian-Byzantine conflict, the Zoroastrians applied effective sapper tactics and usage of siege machineries to conquer fortified cities. Although their siege weapons are outdated, their doctrines will prove more than useful to us.

nationalIdeas.name: reformed_land_holding
nationalIdeas.title: Reformed Land Holding
nationalIdeas.desc: Traditionally land was assessed by size, but this failed to take into account that not all land is the same. From now on land will be valued according to the value of rice that can be grown on it. This will make it easier to ensure our vassals give us the troops they are supposed to provide.

nationalIdeas.name: jap_unification_under_the_emperor
nationalIdeas.title: Unification under the Emperor
nationalIdeas.desc: In order to give this country a final end to internal conflict we have decided to unite the aristocrat class under the Emperor and the warrior class under the Shogun. The Emperor now rules Japan as in the ancient era, but with a government aimed to meet the challenges of the modern age.

nationalIdeas.name: jap_modernization
nationalIdeas.title: Modernization
nationalIdeas.desc: We must never miss an opportunity to learn of the technology of others. Westerners, and Chinese have in the past proven to have many ideas and inventions that we lack and the quick introduction and adoption of these for our own uses is vital to our survival.

nationalIdeas.name: jap_maritime_legacy
nationalIdeas.title: Maritime Legacy
nationalIdeas.desc: Some would say our maritime traditions are those of fishermen and pirates more than traders and navies. While nothing could be farther from the truth it is true that we have an instinctive feeling for the sea and naval maneuvers. Let us formalize this experience to naval doctrine and build a new navy worthy of our empire.

nationalIdeas.name: jap_land_of_the_rising_sun
nationalIdeas.title: Land of the Rising Sun
nationalIdeas.desc: Our empire is one with a long and glorious history. Our unique cultural tradition, our brave soldiers and our unconquerable geography, makes us stronger than many other states in our region. Now that we have finally reached a united realm the time has come for the Land of the Rising Sun to take its place among the great nations of this world!

nationalIdeas.name: jap_kaitakudan
nationalIdeas.title: Kaitakudan
nationalIdeas.desc: Since our country is small thus can't feed large population, we need to motivate some of our people as immigrants to move into other regions. These pioneer groups can found new colonies abroad as well as at home.

nationalIdeas.name: great_powers_diplomacy
nationalIdeas.title: Great Power Diplomacy
nationalIdeas.desc: With each passing day the Russian bear to our North, the British lion to our East and the Persian cat to our South are reaching for our borders. To guarantee our independence from these great powers we need to finds allies and a way to play our enemies against each other.

nationalIdeas.name: pirates_religious_apathy
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Apathy
nationalIdeas.desc: What does it matter which god the pirates worship? Their souls are likely damned regardless.

nationalIdeas.name: pirates_plunder
nationalIdeas.title: Plunder
nationalIdeas.desc: The Pirate Republic lives and dies by the amount of plunder we can haul back to our ports. Let's take everything that isn't nailed down! On second thought, let's take everything that is nailed down too. And the nails!

nationalIdeas.name: pirates_bucanneers_ideas
nationalIdeas.title: Buccaneers
nationalIdeas.desc: We take our recruits from the desperate and the outcast. Self-proclaimed 'civilized' nations routinely enslave those they consider their inferiors and forcibly press their own countrymen into military service. Those who escape the bonds of tyranny find a home in our Republic.

nationalIdeas.name: pirates_sail_in_consort
nationalIdeas.title: Sail In Consort
nationalIdeas.desc: A single hunter is easily outmaneuvered or outgunned on the open ocean. When we sail in consort we can use our numbers to great tactical advantage.

nationalIdeas.name: pirates_elected_quartermasters
nationalIdeas.title: Elected Quartermasters
nationalIdeas.desc: Quartermasters on a pirate ship are elected representatives of the crew. They advocate the crew's needs to the captain and act as counterweight to his often arbitrary authority.

nationalIdeas.name: pirate_bays
nationalIdeas.title: Pirate Bays
nationalIdeas.desc: Our coastline is littered with hidden coves and defensible bays that we can use to lure would-be pirate hunters into a deadly ambush.

nationalIdeas.name: pirate_life_of_liberty
nationalIdeas.title: Life Of Liberty
nationalIdeas.desc: The liberties we enjoy as free men are the envy of the peasants, slaves, and conscripts who toil for the profit of their superiors. Our smugglers should begin to distribute propaganda to stoke their resentment in the hopes that they will rise up and join our cause.

nationalIdeas.name: wes_jewish_rights
nationalIdeas.title: Jewish Rights
nationalIdeas.desc: By granting the Jews working within our administration certain rights, we can harness their knowledge and embrace their progressive ideas.

nationalIdeas.name: wes_westphalian_decentralisation
nationalIdeas.title: Westphalian Decentralization
nationalIdeas.desc: The Westphalians are not used to the concept of belonging to a larger state - at most, the precedent for the Westphalian state is the Lower Rhenish-Westphalian Imperial Circle. Although this makes it harder to inspire our people's loyalty, a decentralized administration in which our local communities govern themselves does carry some benefits.

nationalIdeas.name: wes_increased_conscription
nationalIdeas.title: Universal Conscription
nationalIdeas.desc: Westphalia's armies have never been of great significance to the course of international affairs. By introducing universal conscription, we can build a standing army large enough to change this and make Westphalia a force to reckon with in Germany.

nationalIdeas.name: wes_administrative_assimilation_of_rheinlanders
nationalIdeas.title: Assimilation of the Rhenish People
nationalIdeas.desc: While their dialects and way of life may divide them from us, the cities of the Rhine have long had a connection to us through the Lower Rhenish-Westphalian Imperial Circle. We must make our state into a home for both our people and assimilate the Rhenish into our administration.

nationalIdeas.name: wes_taxation
nationalIdeas.title: Tax Reforms
nationalIdeas.desc: No one likes heavy taxation. Nonetheless, we need the funds to pay our armies and other projects worthy of a modern state. By reforming our lands' traditional taxation arrangements into a fair system that provides us with sufficient funds, we will be able to boost our income without causing any undue upset.

nationalIdeas.name: wes_enlightenment
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Toleration
nationalIdeas.desc: Our lands are home to many beliefs. While some would insist all others to be wrong and seek the removal of all those they consider heretics, we shall take a more enlightened path. Let all believe as they wish, so long as they agree to serve us!

nationalIdeas.name: wes_cities_of_the_rhineland
nationalIdeas.title: Cities of the Rhineland
nationalIdeas.desc: By integrating the Rhineland into our nation, we are able to benefit from the trade that flows through the Rhenish cities - and the commercial acumen of their traders.

nationalIdeas.name: arl_qizilbash
nationalIdeas.title: The Qizilbash
nationalIdeas.desc: Whether they profess to be Shiites or not mystical Islam and support of Ali is widespread among the Turkoman tribesmen of Iran, Anatolia and the Caucasus. The Safavids have quickly come to gain strong support among these groups and many are now flocking to their banners. Styling themselves 'Qizilbash' or 'Redheads', after their characteristic red hats, they could be the core of a new army, ready to fight and die for the head of the Safavids.

nationalIdeas.name: persian_rug_production
nationalIdeas.title: Encourage Persian Rug Production
nationalIdeas.desc: Persia has long been famous for its rug and carpet manufacture. However, when the Mongols swept through our lands there was great destruction. For Persia to recover we must recover our economic strength as well. It is time to encourage the recovery of our ancient strengths.

nationalIdeas.name: the_ghulams
nationalIdeas.title: Found the Ghilman
nationalIdeas.desc: Previously our army has been heavily dependent on Feudal levies (Qizilbash) who have proved to be more to loyal themselves than the throne. We will found a standing army of professional infantry and cavalry, whose loyalty is to the Shah first, to defend the country.

nationalIdeas.name: improved_silk_road
nationalIdeas.title: Improve the Silk Road
nationalIdeas.desc: A system of upgrades to roads and bridges, a system of guards to protect the roads (for a small tax) and a chain of Caravanserai to provide rest stops. All help the merchants as they traverse the silk road and also provide increased revenues for the state.

nationalIdeas.name: encouraged_art
nationalIdeas.title: Encourage Art
nationalIdeas.desc: There is a huge cultural tradition of Art in the lands of the Persians. From a government perspective this is stuff that people want to buy. The encouragement of art will give our merchants more things to sell abroad boosting the wealth of our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: promotion_of_irrigation
nationalIdeas.title: Promotion of Irrigation
nationalIdeas.desc: If we encourage agriculture, we will increase our population so we will have more manpower for our army

nationalIdeas.name: increased_crown_lands
nationalIdeas.title: Increase the Crown Lands
nationalIdeas.desc: The large percentage of our income comes from the revenues from agriculture. Over the years the crown lands have been handed over to loyal followers as rewards. It is time to start to claw back these lands in order to ensure we can remain strong.

nationalIdeas.name: ICE_althingi
nationalIdeas.title: The Althingi
nationalIdeas.desc: The Althingi is an ancient and venerated form of Nordic democracy established by our forefathers and still practiced by our youth. The Lawspeaker must take his seat as the presiding official of the assembly. From his mouth, we shall learn of the laws in effect for our nation and all Icelandic ears shall listen and respect his words for it is his duty to proclaim the procedural law of the Althingi to those attending the assembly each year.

nationalIdeas.name: ICE_hrafna_floki
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of Hrafna-Floki
nationalIdeas.desc: A true king of ship building, Hrafna-Floki was said to be able to see ship planks in the trees. He taught his skills to many travelers and natives who met him in Iceland, and over the generations his teachings have been passed down and refined to a point where the shipbuilders of Iceland are beyond compare.

nationalIdeas.name: ICE_christian_identity
nationalIdeas.title: Christian Identity
nationalIdeas.desc: Since Thorgeir the law speaker's contemplation and declaration in the year 1000 we have been a Christian nation. Now with the Reformation sweeping across Europe we shall remain devout regardless of the path we choose.

nationalIdeas.name: ICE_merchant_navy
nationalIdeas.title: Armed Merchants
nationalIdeas.desc: Our sailors and merchants are constantly chafing under the yoke of pirates and brigands on their voyages of the North Sea, but they shall suffer silently no more. We shall ensure they are well-equipped and trained to defend against threats both on our own shores and far from home.

nationalIdeas.name: ICE_fire_and_ice
nationalIdeas.title: The Men of Fire and Ice
nationalIdeas.desc: Our homeland is a battleground of fire and ice. Our warriors have earned their iron in the harshest of conditions, the worst of battlefields, and under grueling leaders. In the average Icelandic soldier we see no mere men, but paragons of power, strength, and ability.

nationalIdeas.name: ICE_natural_builders
nationalIdeas.title: Resilient Craftsmen
nationalIdeas.desc: Our people possess the remarkable ability to build using nothing but what little the land provides. Our hardy people have learned to carry their own weight and pay the cold price for all the worldly belongings they have. We, unlike anyone else, can craft gold from dirt.

nationalIdeas.name: ICE_nationalism
nationalIdeas.title: Icelandic National Identity
nationalIdeas.desc: A historic legacy, a proud tradition, and a strong heritage, we embrace our Identity proudly and with fervor. We believe everyone has a chance to thrive if they are given the right chance. The rest of the world disregards our culture as archaic and irrelevant, but we shall teach them of our peaceful ways, by force.

nationalIdeas.name: lva_legacy_of_the_knights
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of the Knights
nationalIdeas.desc: Our state is completely secularized, and the value religion once had is no longer as high as it used to be during our monastic times. Anyway though, we must not forget the military achievements and lessons from the Livonian Knights and the Schwertbrüderorden - the Livonian Brothers of the Sword.

nationalIdeas.name: lva_border_between_east_and_west
nationalIdeas.title: Border between East and West
nationalIdeas.desc: Our land is what some might consider "the Window to the West" or "to the East" - depending who you ask. We are the border between West Europe and the lands of Russia. Our position draws merchants and potential foes from either direction. We must be prepared for both potential guests.

nationalIdeas.name: lva_livonian_hanseatic_cities
nationalIdeas.title: Hanseatic Cities
nationalIdeas.desc: The Livonian Order - our predecessor - is the result of the German merchants from Lübeck and Bremen who acquired commercial interests in the lands around the mouth of the Dvina River. Said merchants founded cities, which have been members of the Hansa for centuries.

nationalIdeas.name: lva_livlandischer_landtag
nationalIdeas.title: Livländischer Landtag
nationalIdeas.desc: Even back in the times of the Livonian Order, our land is made of different factions, cultures and estates - all struggling for power. Conflicts occur rather commonly between the state, the Clergy and the powerful Hanseatic cities. To solve these internal disputes the Order established the Livländischer Landtag - the Livonian Diet.\nTo this very day the diet is in active service in order to keep the many different groups in check.

nationalIdeas.name: lva_livonian_colonization
nationalIdeas.title: Livonian Colonization
nationalIdeas.desc: Although we are quite far away from the New World, we cannot ignore the changes brought by the discovery of the New World. The powers of Europe are seizing the opportunities of the New World, and extend their influence outside the continent. We cannot allow us to fall back!

nationalIdeas.name: lva_naval_professionalism
nationalIdeas.title: Naval Professionalism
nationalIdeas.desc: We live or die by our ability to secure the waters around us. The navy is the strongest asset of our military and as such many concepts of professionalism and military finesse are applied to our maritime force.

nationalIdeas.name: lva_religious_tolerance
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Tolerance
nationalIdeas.desc: We must not let ourselves be caught up in religious strife. Anyone who can serve the state of Mysore must have a place in our country. If we can win the loyalty of all our subjects, and not just those of the true faith, then we will have a solid base to stand on as an expansionist power. Let us donate lavishly to holy places of all religions within our borders and encourage giving out offices regardless of which faith the holder would have.

nationalIdeas.name: flexible_recruiting
nationalIdeas.title: Flexible Recruiting
nationalIdeas.desc: The Romanian lands have been invaded many times. The Romanian peasants have learned that nothing good comes from the foreigners and will defend their land to the last man.

nationalIdeas.name: skilled_commanders
nationalIdeas.title: Skilled Commanders
nationalIdeas.desc: The Romanian captains have long learned that their strongest ally is the land they are fighting for. Either in forests, swamps or narrow valleys and mountains, many enemies have been vanquished by surprise attacks in unexpected places.

nationalIdeas.name: scorch_the_land_and_poison_the_wells
nationalIdeas.title: Scorch the Lands and Poison the Wells
nationalIdeas.desc: In the wooded Romanian plains only the natives know how to live off the land. No enemy will harvest a Romanian crop or drink water from a Romanian well and live to fight another day!

nationalIdeas.name: latin_island
nationalIdeas.title: Latin Island
nationalIdeas.desc: It's been a long time since we were cut off from our Latin brothers. None of our neighbors speaks our language and few honor our traditions, but we still cherish our Latin heritage.

nationalIdeas.name: peasant_soldiers
nationalIdeas.title: Peasant Soldiers
nationalIdeas.desc: The villages of the Desh are full with able men who would be more than willing to serve in our armies. Let us train and recruit all Marathi speakers to serve in our armies.

nationalIdeas.name: phanariote_traders
nationalIdeas.title: Phanariote Traders
nationalIdeas.desc: The Phanariotes have brought many ills to the Danubian Principalities, but no one can deny their abilities as traders. Their trade connections with Constantinople serve us well.

nationalIdeas.name: phanariote_taxes
nationalIdeas.title: Phanariote Taxes
nationalIdeas.desc: The Greek Phanariotes have brought with them from Constantinople a new system for collecting taxes. Our tax revenue has increased dramatically.

nationalIdeas.name: pax_romana
nationalIdeas.title: Pax Romana
nationalIdeas.desc: Roman law shines like a beacon in a sea of turmoil, and the people of the provinces can rest easy in the knowledge that peace and order have been restored throughout the Empire.

nationalIdeas.name: legacy_of_rome
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of Rome
nationalIdeas.desc: Even after the fall of the Western Empire, Rome's legacy continued in Europe and many of its successor states were desperate to claim some of its former glory for themselves. Now, as the Roman Empire rises from the ashes like the proverbial phoenix, many cannot help but stare in awe.

nationalIdeas.name: spqr
nationalIdeas.title: S.P.Q.R.
nationalIdeas.desc: For the Senate and People of Rome! The Imperial Senate may not wield as much political power as in the days of the ancient Republic, but they still provide the citizens of the Empire with a sense of representation that was simply unheard of in most feudal societies.

nationalIdeas.name: roman_legions
nationalIdeas.title: The Roman Legions
nationalIdeas.desc: The Legions of Rome, at their peak, were considered one of the finest fighting forces the world had ever seen. With the Empire's rebirth, its armies must once again strive for nothing less than this level of martial excellence.

nationalIdeas.name: roman_architecture
nationalIdeas.title: Roman Architecture
nationalIdeas.desc: The celebrated architecture of ancient Rome has returned in style, and new impressive public works are being erected in cities all over the Empire. A new era of man-made Wonders is upon us.

nationalIdeas.name: imperial_bureaucracy
nationalIdeas.title: Imperial Bureaucracy
nationalIdeas.desc: To efficiently administrate a great empire consisting of myriad provinces and wildly different cultures is a monumental task. This was accomplished when ancient Rome was at the height of its power, but we have had to relearn many of those lessons and adapt them to better suit the modern world.

nationalIdeas.name: imperium_sine_fine
nationalIdeas.title: Imperium Sine Fine
nationalIdeas.desc: Rome is once more an 'Empire Without End' and the golden wings of the Imperial Aquila stretch across ever more provinces. Fortunately, Roman officials can fall back on centuries worth of tradition in the effective integration of new lands.

nationalIdeas.name: no_a_geographical_construct
nationalIdeas.title: Not a Geographical Construct
nationalIdeas.desc: Since the fall of the Western Empire Italy has been dominated by foreign powers and been divided into many parts. Those powers that dominated us sniggered at the idea of Italy. Well now who is laughing? Italy has risen again.

nationalIdeas.name: tradition_of_the_legion
nationalIdeas.title: The Tradition of the Legion
nationalIdeas.desc: During Roman times Italy dominated all of the world worth dominating. Italy has risen once more and it is time for the legions to march again. Our soldiers will be constantly reminded of the tradition of victory they have inherited and be regularly drilled to help them emulate them. Marius's Mules will once more take to the field.

nationalIdeas.name: mare_nostrum
nationalIdeas.title: Mare Nostrum
nationalIdeas.desc: Italy has a long and vulnerable coastline. Protecting it is our highest priority. We must be like Pompey the Great and dominate these seas so Italy can be safe.

nationalIdeas.name: office_of_censor
nationalIdeas.title: The Office of Censor
nationalIdeas.desc: In the great days of the Roman Republic the Censors had the duty of keeping a list of the citizens who were eligible for military service. We will once more have censors whose job it is to assess who could see service in the new Legions.

nationalIdeas.name: italian_tax_reform
nationalIdeas.title: Italian Tax Reform
nationalIdeas.desc: The Western Empire ceased to be effective when it no longer had the tax base to support their armies. We must ensure that this does not happen to the New Rome that has risen forth phoenix like from the ashes of the old.

nationalIdeas.name: heir_to_the_empire
nationalIdeas.title: Heir to the Empire
nationalIdeas.desc: The Holy Roman Empire has failed to take the mantle of the Western Empire, it is time for Italy to take up the banner and remake the great Empire.

nationalIdeas.name: path_to_citizenship
nationalIdeas.title: The Path to Citizenship
nationalIdeas.desc: The Roman Empire's strength was its ability to make those they ruled want to be part of the Empire. We will emulate this system to make those who are part of our domains seek to become part of our empire.

nationalIdeas.name: devout_catholisism
nationalIdeas.title: Devout Christianism
nationalIdeas.desc: Our faith is our sword and shield. It was only the grace of God that granted us our triumphs in the Reconquista. We must always show our devotion to the holy mother church.

nationalIdeas.name: inter_caetera
nationalIdeas.title: Inter Caetera
nationalIdeas.desc: On the 4th of May 1493 His Holiness granted us a papal bull granting us all lands west and south of a line 100 leagues west of the islands of the Azores. We will naturally enforce His Holiness's will.

nationalIdeas.name: lon_school_of_salamanca
nationalIdeas.title: School of Salamanca
nationalIdeas.desc: The prestigieous university of Salamanca has become the centre for a new school of jurisprudence as well as philosophical and economic thought. Let us patronize the learned men of the School of Salamanca and make good use of their coherent interpretations of Natural Law, Property and the Natural Rights of Man.

nationalIdeas.name: spanish_armada
nationalIdeas.title: A Spanish Armada
nationalIdeas.desc: The power of Spain is as much in her fleet as in her feared tercios. We will ensure our navy wants for nothing so that should we ever need to do so we can send a mighty armada forth.

nationalIdeas.name: spa_casa_de_contracion
nationalIdeas.title: Casa de Contratación
nationalIdeas.desc: We must extend the reach of the House of Trade of the Indies. Our colonial agents must have a presence in every part of the world to ensure the smooth functioning of our empire.

nationalIdeas.name: siglo_de_oro
nationalIdeas.title: Siglo de Oro
nationalIdeas.desc: A golden age is upon Spain, in painting, architecture, music and literature. Spain is the envy of the world. This will leave a legacy that will echo through time. Although I don't like the book about the man fighting the windmills, I just can't see that one being read by future generations.

nationalIdeas.name: spa_cortes
nationalIdeas.title: Rein in the Cortes
nationalIdeas.desc: Each constituent Kingdom in the Spanish realm has its own corte, an assembly of the most powerful elements of society in the region. There is often tension between the Crown and the Cortes over such issues as taxation and regional autonomy. We must rein in these institutions so that they primarily serve the Crown rather than their own interests.

nationalIdeas.name: SNA_mercenary_republic
nationalIdeas.title: Republic of Mercenaries
nationalIdeas.desc: Unlike other American republics who fought for their independence against colonial powers, our state was established by the sheer strength and daring nature of our mercenaries. The region of Sonora and Baja California were seized by a mere 45 men and their commander, and despite the crushing odds, won out against the much larger republics of the region. There can be no doubt that the sheer quality of the Sonoran mercenaries will be the envy of all America.

nationalIdeas.name: SNA_sale_of_script
nationalIdeas.title: The Sale of Sonoran Script
nationalIdeas.desc: In order to fund the mercenary expedition to Sonora, we required investment and resources. Though many would doubt our cause, there were those who were wise enough to invest in the purchase of legal documents not yet redeemable in the Sonora region until the establishment of our state. By continuing to sell the promise of future lands to our investors, we may both expand our state and make a tidy profit while doing so.

nationalIdeas.name: SNA_Good_Use_Of_Gold
nationalIdeas.title: Gold, Gold, Gold!
nationalIdeas.desc: With the heavy reliance on gold in our region, we have learned to make good use of it and not cause the rampant issues we have seen across the seas. With our sensible and conservative use of our gold deposits, we shall keep the resource valuable without bloating our economy.

nationalIdeas.name: SNA_cowboy_country
nationalIdeas.title: Cowboy Country
nationalIdeas.desc: The men of our nation are used to the harsh conditions and sparse resources of the American West, and have become more than accustomed to the ways of war out here. Our nation was built by bandits and mercenaries and are feared throughout the West and beyond.

nationalIdeas.name: SNA_take_what_is_yours
nationalIdeas.title: Taking What’s Ours
nationalIdeas.desc: There are those who call Sonora a rogue state and would call our President a “Pirate”, and they would say these things as if they were an insult. What these individuals shackled by the laws of their land fail to understand is that true freedom consists of taking what is yours and apologising for nothing. Our bandits already raid the western roads, but with treasure fleets passing by our shores each day, it becomes clear that we could learn something from the privateers in the east...

nationalIdeas.name: SNA_uniting_the_outlaws
nationalIdeas.title: Uniting the Outlaws
nationalIdeas.desc: All across the West, there are cowboys, bandidos, and desperados; bold men who live free. We are unafraid of the law and willing to do whatever it takes to get by in this cruel unforgiving world. With men like this at the helm of our nation, we have created a home for the homeless and we will become the men our mothers warned us about.

nationalIdeas.name: SNA_taking_the_fight_south
nationalIdeas.title: Taking the Fight South
nationalIdeas.desc: Though our nation exists in the rugged West of Mexico, we cannot sustain ourselves on contracts found out here alone. We must take our fight from North to South, from the bogs of Louisiana to the jungles of Nicaragua. Our brave generals will lead our countrymen from contract to contract, while making sure to take as much territory for ourselves as we can manage.

nationalIdeas.name: united_three_jurchens
nationalIdeas.title: United Three Jurchens
nationalIdeas.desc: By uniting the three tribes of Haixi, Jianzhou and Wild Jurchens, we can found a real dynasty that dominates Manchuria.

nationalIdeas.name: manchu_eight_banners
nationalIdeas.title: The Eight Banners
nationalIdeas.desc: By combining our tribal army with the traditional Niru company system, the highly organized and centralized force of Eight Banners is created.

nationalIdeas.name: the_manchu_alphabet
nationalIdeas.title: Manchu Alphabet
nationalIdeas.desc: The Jurchen script created by Emperor Aguda is lost. Our people have to use the Mongolian scribes to record every document, while illiterate Han Chinese and Mongolians could understand their respective languages when read aloud. By converting and adapting the Mongolian alphabet, the new Manchu alphabet would be suitable for Manchu people and would make the administration easier.

nationalIdeas.name: the_later_jin
nationalIdeas.title: The Later Jin
nationalIdeas.desc: The Manchurian state traces its roots back to the Great Jin of the 12th-13th century, which held sway over northern China until the Mongol conquest. The new, restored Jin seeks to emulate the conquests of its predecessor and restore the glory of the past.

nationalIdeas.name: link_with_the_mongol_dynasty
nationalIdeas.title: Link with the Mongol Dynasty
nationalIdeas.desc: Marrying the Borjigin princess from Chahar Mongolia allows us to command the strong Mongolian horsemen more easily.

nationalIdeas.name: manchu_chinese_learning
nationalIdeas.title: Chinese Learning
nationalIdeas.desc: Our scholars have translated Chinese military treatises such as Sun Tzu's 'The Art of War' and Lü Shang's 'Six Secret Teachings' into Manchurian, allowing our warlords to become well-versed in the theory of military strategy.

nationalIdeas.name: seven_grievances
nationalIdeas.title: The Seven Grievances
nationalIdeas.desc: Over the years, the Manchu people has built up a long list of grievances against the Han - a list that could be seen to justify military action to depose their current rulers.

nationalIdeas.name: pom_idea_1
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of Pirates
nationalIdeas.desc: Being a busy network of lucrative trade, the Baltic Sea, and thus the Northern German coast has always been a very good place for piracy. So much so that even rulers of these small countries often participated, more or less openly. There is nothing like stealing lots of gold from one of your rivals.

nationalIdeas.name: pom_idea_2
nationalIdeas.title: Pomeranian Merchants
nationalIdeas.desc: The Pomeranians have a long tradition of sailing across the Baltic Sea in search of safe havens for their ships and merchandise. Many foreigners have heard of us - from Novgorod to Constantinople.

nationalIdeas.name: pom_idea_3
nationalIdeas.title: Northern Ports
nationalIdeas.desc: Pomeranian ports are situated at an excellent strategic location, which gives us a natural advantage when expanding our influence over the trade within the Baltic Sea.

nationalIdeas.name: pom_idea_4
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Freedom
nationalIdeas.desc: Being mostly interested in trade and distant business opportunities we have no time or desire to get into petty religious squabbles with our fellow Christians.

nationalIdeas.name: pom_idea_5
nationalIdeas.title: Mercenary Contracts
nationalIdeas.desc: Our numerous trading contacts have allowed us to establish excellent relations with a multitude of foreigners. Our good name and reputation will allow us to hire their mercenaries at better rates than usual.

nationalIdeas.name: pom_idea_6
nationalIdeas.title: Dominate the Baltic
nationalIdeas.desc: As Pomeranian power and influence grows, so does our grip over the Baltic Sea. Soon it will be Mare Nostrum, little more than Pomeranian pond. A highway for our trade.

nationalIdeas.name: pom_idea_7
nationalIdeas.title: German Navy
nationalIdeas.desc: We shall attempt to construct the largest navy in all of Germany!

name: Greece

nationalIdeas.name: greek_orthodox_faith
nationalIdeas.title: Greek Orthodox Faith
nationalIdeas.desc: The Greek Church stand as the oldest and most prestigious of all the orthodox churches and our Christian faith has always been one of the most important things to bind our people together during harsh and arduous times. Let us cherish our Christian heritage and find strength in our faith.

nationalIdeas.name: greek_maritime_heritage
nationalIdeas.title: Maritime Heritage
nationalIdeas.desc: For millenia the Greek people have traversed the Mediterranean sea and while foreign powers have come to dominate the region politically Greek captains and Greek sailors still make up a sizable part of their navies. Let us draw from their experience as well as the experience of the Greek pirates, smugglers and fishers throughout the region to create a strong navy for our state.

nationalIdeas.name: greek_klephtic_irregulars
nationalIdeas.title: Klephtic Recruitment
nationalIdeas.desc: The arduous years of foreign occupation both under the Franks and the Turks saw the birth of a staunch resistance among the Greek populace. Eventually some groups would take to the mountains and continued a violent resistance to foreign occupation from there. These 'theifs' can now be integrated into our army as an efficient irregular arm, ready to strike at our enemies with both fervor and experience.

nationalIdeas.name: greek_phanariotes
nationalIdeas.title: Greek Diaspora
nationalIdeas.desc: Educated and resourceful men are always in demand and as a result many of our countrymen have during the centuries moved abroad to take service in the courts of countries all over Eastern and Southern Europe. With an independent Greek state once again in existence we can convince a number of these Greek nationals to return to the lands of their childhood or forefathers.

nationalIdeas.name: greek_strengthen_control_over_the_trade_routes
nationalIdeas.title: Control the Mediterranean Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: From Rome to Venice and later the Ottoman Empire many have sought to control the trade between East and West by conquering Greece and the Greek islands of the Eastern Mediterranean. As an independent Greek state it is our duty and our heritage to control this trade for ourselves rather than allow others to grow rich from our strategic position.

nationalIdeas.name: greek_philhellenism
nationalIdeas.title: Philhellenism
nationalIdeas.desc: Greece was once the cradle of Western Civilization and our ancestors are still revered throughout Europe. Let us make good use of this reputation to obtain the valuable alliances we need to grow.

nationalIdeas.name: greek_enlightenment
nationalIdeas.title: Greek Enlightenment
nationalIdeas.desc: Our ancestors were great thinkers, statesmen and philosophers and their ideas remain strong foundations of stringent tought to this day. Let us combine our strong intellectual heritage with the new ideal of Enlightenment that has enveloped the courts of Europe.
