This will allow us to develop ideas of statehood and to reform the Greek language to fit the modern era.

note: Uses Greek ideas, but the full list could not be determined from the available files. Traditions: -20% Galley cost, -10% Sailor maintenance. Ambition: -10% Core-creation cost.

nationalIdeas.name: barbary_slave_trade
nationalIdeas.title: The Barbary Slave Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: Raiding is an especially profitable occupation for the pirates of the Barbary Coast due to the high price that Christian slaves can fetch in Turkish and Arabian markets.

nationalIdeas.name: galley_slaves
nationalIdeas.title: Galley Slaves
nationalIdeas.desc: Not all of the slaves we capture are sold in the East; many are fated to serve on the galleys, ensuring a ready supply of seamen to row our ships.

nationalIdeas.name: vengeful_refugees
nationalIdeas.title: Vengeful Refugees
nationalIdeas.desc: As both Muslims and Moriscos are expelled by the Christians of Iberia, refugees flee to the Maghreb. These refugees are none too pleased about being displaced, and eagerly accept the opportunity to profit from their downfall.

nationalIdeas.name: mazmorras
nationalIdeas.title: Mazmorras
nationalIdeas.desc: Christian princes tell grim tales about our dungeons, the dreaded Mazmorras. Here we keep our most valuable captives, those with wealthy family members with the money to pay for their safe return. The conditions typical in the Mazmorras ensure that ransoms are paid swiftly.

nationalIdeas.name: barbary_fortified_strongholds
nationalIdeas.title: Fortified Pirate Strongholds
nationalIdeas.desc: A pirate stronghold must be fortified against attack from both land and sea. We must constuct defenses for our cities to repel invaders.

nationalIdeas.name: heirs_of_al_andalus
nationalIdeas.title: Heirs of Al-Andalus
nationalIdeas.desc: Among those fleeing the Reconquista in Spain are the former Princes and Princesses of Al-Andalus, the great Muslim empire that once spanned nearly the whole of Iberia. These nobles are eager to restore their lost realms by any means necessary.

nationalIdeas.name: barbary_board_of_captains
nationalIdeas.title: Board of Captains
nationalIdeas.desc: We must establish a council of our most skilled Captains to guide and regulate piracy and the slave trade in our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: riale_and_yennenga
nationalIdeas.title: Rialé and Yennenga
nationalIdeas.desc: The tale of our founding harkens back to the Mamprussi princess Yennenga and the Mande hunters Rialé. We cherish and maintain their legacy, for it is through them that we have come to rule.

nationalIdeas.name: mossi_cavalry_raids
nationalIdeas.title: Cavalry Raids
nationalIdeas.desc: From the time of our ancestors, horsemen have been the tool of our conquests. Their thunder hooves across the grasslands of the Sahel spread fear in our enemies, and has allowed us many victories.

nationalIdeas.name: nyonnyonse_vassals
nationalIdeas.title: Nyonnyonse Vassals
nationalIdeas.desc: As we conquer new land, we encounter new people whose destiny it is to be ruled by us. We should integrate them as an important part of our society, a caste of powerful vassals entrusted with protecting and caring for the land.

nationalIdeas.name: nakomse
nationalIdeas.title: The Nakomse
nationalIdeas.desc: All power flows from the Emperor, and only his relatives should hold it. The nobility should be selected to serve in his name, from among those relatives he can trust.

nationalIdeas.name: land_of_the_ancestors
nationalIdeas.title: Land of the Ancestors
nationalIdeas.desc: Land is not mere property or dust; it is our connection to the great men who have gone before us. From the better lands beyond, they watch over us, and we must never let the connection be severed.

nationalIdeas.name: honoring_the_masks
nationalIdeas.title: Honoring the Masks
nationalIdeas.desc: Our masks hold power. They oversee funerals and ceremonies, to ensure that those whom we seek to honor are properly honored.

nationalIdeas.name: friday_court
nationalIdeas.title: The Friday Court
nationalIdeas.desc: The ruler has a duty to his people. He is not free to absent himself from their presence, not even to avenge insult against him or recover stolen symbols of his rule; for his chief duty is to hold court and listen to the pleas of his subjects.

nationalIdeas.name: singing_lumberjacks
nationalIdeas.title: Singing Lumberjacks
nationalIdeas.desc: Our lumberjacks have many traditions. One is their legendary songs, which allow them to work more efficiently and thus produce more lumber for export. The lumber they produce also allows our government to procure more timber at a lower price, allowing our navy to be larger and less expensive.

nationalIdeas.name: the_hudson_bay_company
nationalIdeas.title: The Hudson Bay Company
nationalIdeas.desc: The Hudson Bay Company is perhaps the most important aspect of our history. Our roots lie in a mercantile tradition and we should continue to support this by encouraging people to become merchants.

nationalIdeas.name: settling_the_interior
nationalIdeas.title: Settling the Interior
nationalIdeas.desc: While we have populated the coast and the region around rivers and lakes for some time, there are still vast lands to the west waiting to be settled by our people. We must ensure that it is our people who make the lands which await their own.

nationalIdeas.name: the_maritimes
nationalIdeas.title: The Maritimes
nationalIdeas.desc: The seas off our eastern coast are known for their legendary storms and brutal conditions. This hardens our young sailors and produces a tradition of naval military excellence.

nationalIdeas.name: the_quebec_act
nationalIdeas.title: The Quebec Act
nationalIdeas.desc: The Quebec Act granted great religious freedoms to the Roman Catholics brought into our nation by the Conquest. We are a model of religious tolerance in our New World.

nationalIdeas.name: legacy_of_the_empire
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of the Empire
nationalIdeas.desc: Though we are now free, our ties with our former mother country and her dependencies are still strong. This gives our merchants an edge in bringing the wealth of the New World to our coffers.

nationalIdeas.name: the_forests_of_canada
nationalIdeas.title: The Forests of Canada
nationalIdeas.desc: The vast virgin forests found in our nation allow our government to procure the lumber needed to build ships for a lower price than other states. We can build more ships at lower prices.

nationalIdeas.name: cynulliad
nationalIdeas.title: Cynulliad
nationalIdeas.desc: Owain Glyndwr called the first Parliament, or Cynulliad, at Machynlleth in 1404. There, he declared his vision of an independent Welsh state with a parliament and separate Welsh church.

nationalIdeas.name: bardic_literature
nationalIdeas.title: Bardic Literature
nationalIdeas.desc: By reviving our ancient poetic traditions, we can stand to last the test of time. The best wars are not won often with the sword, but with poetry and prose as well. A revival in the bardic traditions would also allow us to revive the eisteddfod, a grand gathering to which were invited poets and musicians from all over the country. The winner of the yearly eisteddfod is granted a seat in the lord's council. Our poets have kept alive the Welsh spirit and their songs shall inspire us.

nationalIdeas.name: cyfraith_hywel
nationalIdeas.title: Cyfraith Hywel
nationalIdeas.desc: There are calls to revive the traditional Welsh law of Hywel the Good and the old cantrefi system for governing Wales, each of which was divided into several commotes. These were of particular importance in the administration of the law. Each cantref had its own court, which was an assembly of the uchelwyr, nobles, the main landowners of the cantref.

nationalIdeas.name: unbennaeth_prydain
nationalIdeas.title: Unbennaeth Prydain
nationalIdeas.desc: 'The Monarchy of Britain' was an Old Welsh poem that served as a national anthem for the many medieval Welsh kingdoms. Although the specific composition is now lost, it presumably recounted the exploits of the former kings of the Britons. Reviving a new form of this composition would stoke national pride.

nationalIdeas.name: economic_revival
nationalIdeas.title: Economic Revival
nationalIdeas.desc: Wales had several problems in becoming an economic power. It was restricted by its peripheral location, predominantly upland topography, poor communications and sparse population. By encouraging the development of trading and ports, as well as mining rich mineral deposits, we can spur new advances not only in economy, but technology as well.

nationalIdeas.name: prifysgolion_cymru
nationalIdeas.title: Prifysgolion Cymru
nationalIdeas.desc: Owain Glyndwr planned to establish two universities in Wales, one in the north and one in the south. By encouraging the academic arts, we can hope that our great nation will be a center of learning.

nationalIdeas.name: welsh_church
nationalIdeas.title: Welsh Church
nationalIdeas.desc: The Welsh church was independent from the other churches, with its own ecclesiastical structure. We are a Christian people well before the Romans left the shores of Britain and abandoned us. Our land is the land of many Christian saints and with a strong legacy of Celtic Christendom.

nationalIdeas.name: french_men_of_trade
nationalIdeas.title: Men of Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: It has always been known to the French kings that men from the provinces are best suited to dictate the trade policies of the kingdom as our people are masters in the art of trade. France is ideally located, at the crossroad of the Atlantic and the Mediterranean, between England and the Italian cities as well as Germany and the Iberian Peninsula. The wealth of the world flows through our lands!

nationalIdeas.name: french_renaissance_palaces
nationalIdeas.title: Renaissance Palaces
nationalIdeas.desc: Our ancestors used to protect themselves in heavily fortified castles. With the coming of the renaissance, however, prestige and power no longer relies on such fortresses. Let us instead build magnificently decorated palaces to show our prosperity and splendor to other Frenchmen and foreigners alike.

nationalIdeas.name: french_qui_ruit_et_lethum
nationalIdeas.title: Qui Ruit Et Lethum
nationalIdeas.desc: From the wet areas of England to the dry regions of the Holy Land our knightly ancestors fought valiantly from horseback. Had they seen us today they might make fun of our ruffs and laces yet underneath this magnificent varnish we still exert the 'furor gallicus' and none can resist us on the battlefield!\nLet our musketmen be to the modern battlefield what the French Knights were to the medieval wars. All shall fear the might of our armies!

nationalIdeas.name: french_religious_conviction
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Conviction
nationalIdeas.desc: Our people have always believed in standing strong for their cause. When the French people's opinion is set nobody can hinder us from expressing it. Whether we side with the pope or against hem we must remain firm in our convictions!

nationalIdeas.name: french_cuisine
nationalIdeas.title: French Cuisine
nationalIdeas.desc: France is to many known as the land of good cooking. Every province is famed for its wines, dishes, cheeses and cakes and it is a proven proverb here that good food builds good character. As our region is home to some of the most delicious food its reputation goes beyond that of many of the other areas of France. We must cherish and guard our culinary traditions and strengthen our regional identity.

nationalIdeas.name: french_enlightenment
nationalIdeas.title: French Enlightenment
nationalIdeas.desc: French culture and French language is the carrier of the ideas of the modern age. As the enlightenment spreads from court to court so does the respect for all things French. It would be wrong, however, to presume that this is strictly a spread of Parisian ideas and values. As French becomes the language of all courts, books and plays our influence spreads worldwide with it.

nationalIdeas.name: french_la_petite_nation
nationalIdeas.title: La Petite Nation
nationalIdeas.desc: The foreigners always speak of France as the country with one king. This well may be true but this does not mean in any way that the king is alone to undertake anything positive for our fellow Frenchmen. The French provinces have a life of their own, and be it under the royal authority or in a more autonomous way they are able to produce strong men and beautiful wives, great philosopher, artists and learned men. Paris matters little to us in day-to-day matters. We must stand up for our own people for we are the true Frenchmen and without us the French region would be both weaker and blander.

nationalIdeas.name: gbr_acts_of_union
nationalIdeas.title: The Acts of Union
nationalIdeas.desc: The Acts of Union constitutionally combine the nations of England and Scotland into one. From a single national Parliament, the entire nation shall be ruled under the same set of laws and ordinances, with a common military and economy.

nationalIdeas.name: city_upon_a_hill
nationalIdeas.title: City Upon a Hill
nationalIdeas.desc: We are entered into a covenant with God to settle the New World. We shall be a City upon a hill, with the eyes of the world upon us, a model to all future colonies.

nationalIdeas.name: the_british_parliament
nationalIdeas.title: Parliament of Great Britain
nationalIdeas.desc: We have a long history of parliamentarism in our country, and with the creation of the Parliament of Great Britain it is only natural that we continue the traditions of the English and Scottish parliaments.

nationalIdeas.name: gbr_the_royal_society
nationalIdeas.title: The Royal Society
nationalIdeas.desc: The Royal Society brings together the greatest scientific minds in the nation and drives them to even greater heights of understanding in the many fields of natural philosophy. As a world-class institution, it will lead Great Britain into a new era of thought and experimentation.

nationalIdeas.name: british_industrialization
nationalIdeas.title: Early Industrialization
nationalIdeas.desc: Rapid advances in technology are creating possibilities never before dreamt of. People flock to the cities to work in new, highly efficient factories outfitted with astonishing modern machinery. Britain must be at the heart of this industrial revolution, as any nation that fails to modernize will be swept away by those that do.

nationalIdeas.name: britanna_rules_the_waves
nationalIdeas.title: Britannia Rules the Waves
nationalIdeas.desc: Rule Britannia!\nBritannia rule the waves.\nBritons never, never, never shall be slaves.

nationalIdeas.name: lot_legacy_of_the_carolingians
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of the Carolingians
nationalIdeas.desc: As the new claimants to the Lotharingian crown, we draw our legitimacy by appealing to the legacy of Charlemagne and Lothair. Under our patronage, the exploits of our ancestors have once again become common knowledge, both among our own people and throughout the courts of Europe.

nationalIdeas.name: lot_glory_of_charlemagne
nationalIdeas.title: Glory of Charlemagne
nationalIdeas.desc: The glorious exploits of Lotharingia's leaders from Charlemagne and Lothair to Philip the Good is written into the memory of our people - and our soldiers. Under our leadership, they will suffer any hardship in our quest to recreate the glories of our past.

nationalIdeas.name: lot_dutch_cities
nationalIdeas.title: Wealth of the Low Countries
nationalIdeas.desc: The cities of the Netherlands have accumulated tremendous wealth from trade. As their benevolent masters, we must encourage their growth and help them build a trading empire that we can tap for our own advantage.

nationalIdeas.name: lot_carolingian_renaissance_II
nationalIdeas.title: New Carolingian Renaissance
nationalIdeas.desc: Centuries ago, the unity that the Carolingian Empire provided and the educational reforms of its leaders brought about a revival of knowledge that had been lost in the preceding Dark Ages. By emulating their policies, we too can encourage the spread of new ideas and technologies that will benefit our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: lot_court_of_europe
nationalIdeas.title: The Court of Europe
nationalIdeas.desc: Our court is among the most illustrious of all Europe. Truly, the wisest, bravest and fairest do flock to join our fine establishment.

nationalIdeas.name: lot_land_of_abbeys
nationalIdeas.title: Land of Bishops
nationalIdeas.desc: In our expansion to reconstitute Lotharingia, we absorbed many bishoprics into our empire. Although their power is much reduced now that they are no longer self-governing polities, they maintain significant influence over church matters. By ensuring that they remain loyal to us, we can maintain a significant voice in clerical affairs.

nationalIdeas.name: lot_european_empire
nationalIdeas.title: Europa Universalis Imperii
nationalIdeas.desc: Charlemagne briefly united much of Europe under his sway. Our destiny is to complete what he started and restore the unity last seen in the days of Rome to Europe.

nationalIdeas.name: fijian_crossroad
nationalIdeas.title: Crossroad of Cultures
nationalIdeas.desc: For centuries, Fiji has been a resting point for countless migrators and voyagers throughout the pacific. We exist between many civilizations and as such, we have influenced them as much as they have influenced us. We must learn to accept these people and integrate them into our culture, so that the Fijian way of life may continue to evolve with changing times.

nationalIdeas.name: fijian_degel
nationalIdeas.title: Lutunasobasoba and Degel
nationalIdeas.desc: Kaunitoni was the legendary vessel which carried out ancestors Lutunasobasoba and Degel from distant lands in the West, to the sacred shores of Fiji. It was when they reached our island that they split into two tribes, Lutunasobasoba becoming chief of the West, and Degel chief of the East.

nationalIdeas.name: fijian_conjoined
nationalIdeas.title: Conjoined Society
nationalIdeas.desc: It has been said that Fijian society and religion are conjoined, and that any attempt to separate the two would result in irreparable damage to them both. While the separation of church and state may sound progressive in theory, in reality the very laws which govern our daily lives come from the wisdom of the great prophets and the Gods. While we accept cultures different from our own, if these people are to live here, they must come to understand our Gods and spirits if they are to call themselves Fijian.

nationalIdeas.name: fijian_waqa
nationalIdeas.title: Waqa Drua
nationalIdeas.desc: The Drua is a canoe designed by our ancestors to carry our people across the ocean and wage war at sea. The Waqa Drua is the largest and finest seafaring vessel in all the known world, and other kingdoms tremble as they witness our vast ship's approach. Our mastery of ship craft and naval warfare has kept Fiji safe from foreign invaders, and so long as our mighty oceangoing armies maintain our long naval tradition, Fiji shall maintain its sovereignty.

nationalIdeas.name: fijian_warlords
nationalIdeas.title: Fijian Warlords
nationalIdeas.desc: The mountainous nature of our islands have made it difficult to consolidate the different clans together and due to this fragmentation, fights over the territory are a constant thing. This means that a part of our society is constantly clashing other groups, so they are used to war.

nationalIdeas.name: fijian_kai
nationalIdeas.title: Kai Colo
nationalIdeas.desc: We are hardy people, our warriors train in the harsh mountain climates of Fiji. Kai Colo are the mountainous people of Fiji and produce the finest and hardiest warriors our islands have to offer. We do not suffer in the face of adverse climates, and we are adaptable to all terrain. During the war, the Kai Colo held out in their mountainous homes against a foe far more advanced than them. This was a battle that determined the continued existence of the Kai Colo, and unsurprisingly, our superior warriors won out in the end.

nationalIdeas.name: fijian_confederacy
nationalIdeas.title: Confederacy of Kingdoms
nationalIdeas.desc: When we Fijians were coming to formalize our disparate governments, one such proposal was that all existing kingdoms of Fiji be unified into a Confederacy of Kings, each holding some autonomy while still being unified under a single governing body. This method of granting our people local autonomy promotes local trade and creates a more prospering society for all.

nationalIdeas.name: WSI_Plantation_Economy
nationalIdeas.title: Plantation Economy
nationalIdeas.desc: The economy of the West Indies is built on the plantations. The plantation workers are hard working, and hold great ingenuity and a passion for life unlike any others. It’s this combination of hard work in the open air and a vigor for work and play that defines the honourable Caribbean worker.

nationalIdeas.name: WSI_Blue_Mountain_Coffee
nationalIdeas.title: Blue Mountain Coffee
nationalIdeas.desc: The Blue Mountain region is considered the best coffee region in the Caribbean and is enjoyed by great thinkers worldwide! The spread of the coffee gave birth to new ideas as the locals and their colonial overlords began to have deep intricate discussions about the nature of the world while sipping at the greatest coffee in the world.

nationalIdeas.name: WSI_Sugar_Revolution
nationalIdeas.title: The Sugar Revolution
nationalIdeas.desc: The need for sugar across the globe has meant more money in the coffers of the locals as they work hard to meet the endless demand for that sweet cane.

nationalIdeas.name: WSI_American_Trade_Hub
nationalIdeas.title: The American Trade Hub
nationalIdeas.desc: The trade from the Caribbean has pushed out across the east coast of the Americas, Africa and Europe. The reach of the merchants is greater than we could have anticipated, and in this regard the Caribbean truly is the birthplace of a globalised economy.

nationalIdeas.name: WSI_Miskoto_Zambos
nationalIdeas.title: Miskito-Zambos
nationalIdeas.desc: The Miskito-Zambos are a cultural blend of the many people who built our great nation; Africans, Europeans, and the Native people who came before all others. The population boom that has come from this has aided our diverse multiculturalism and has led to a population boom that could be utilised into territorial expansion.

nationalIdeas.name: WSI_Interconnected_Relations
nationalIdeas.title: Interconnected Relations
nationalIdeas.desc: The relations our merchants and diplomats have built have established us as a great and reliable trade partner. We have countless partners and allies in our pocket and we must exploit this if we are to become one of the great powers of this colonial world.

nationalIdeas.name: WSI_Colonial_Legacy
nationalIdeas.title: Colonial Legacy
nationalIdeas.desc: The Caribbean was fiercely fought for between an endless list of colonial powers and would-be conquerors. Privateers at the heart of the golden age of piracy and ambitious governors alike exploited our home for all it was worth and built a wealth across our nation that still fuels our economy to this day. As the true birthplace of colonialism and colonial politics, we have a unique expertise that will elevate us to a power on the global stage.

nationalIdeas.name: CSC_melting_pot
nationalIdeas.title: Cascadian Melting Pot
nationalIdeas.desc: The location of Cascadia along the West coast of the Americas has made the region the ideal immigration target for settlers from both Asia and Europe. Its geographical accessibility to Asia and the presence of opportunistic Europeans has made Cascadia a unique melting pot between the East and the West.

nationalIdeas.name: CSC_chinook_jargon
nationalIdeas.title: Chinook Jargon
nationalIdeas.desc: Unlike many other ruthless colonisers, we Cascadians understand the value to be found in trading and cooperating with our native people, even if a little exploitation here and there is necessary to securing a good deal. By developing a language in part informed by our former overlord and in part by the native people, we may communicate easily with both parties to secure a brighter future for Cascadia.

nationalIdeas.name: CSC_forts_of_hudson_bay
nationalIdeas.title: The Forts of Hudson Bay
nationalIdeas.desc: The Hudson Bay Company, responsible for colonising America’s north were faced with many opportunities for expanding their defensive efforts to Cascadia. Our mountainous home allowed for many outposts to be built along our southern border to defend against rival colonists and native raiders. As such, our people are born and ready to serve in the defence of their country as its loyal defenders.

nationalIdeas.name: CSC_settling_boundaries
nationalIdeas.title: Settling the Boundaries
nationalIdeas.desc: For years, colonisers to our North and South disputed whom may own which lands along the Columbia River and the Rocky Mountains, hosting skirmishes and scuffles over the territory. Spaniards, Americans, and Brits all claimed the territory at some point, but now we stand as an independent state united as one, and thus none shall dare challenge our unity and independence again.

nationalIdeas.name: CSC_nookta_sound
nationalIdeas.title: Nookta Sound Trading
nationalIdeas.desc: The earliest colonial settlement of Cascadia took place when an ambitious explorer purchased a section of land from a native chieftain and from there established a trading post there to trade between natives and colonists alike. From there, more trading posts, forts, and eventually villages popped up along the shores of Cascadia until the region was rife with towns and colonies of equal size and grandeur to those in the East.

nationalIdeas.name: the_hudson_bay_company
nationalIdeas.title: The Hudson Bay Company
nationalIdeas.desc: The Hudson Bay Company is perhaps the most important aspect of our history. Our roots lie in a mercantile tradition and we should continue to support this by encouraging people to become merchants.

nationalIdeas.name: CSC_oregon_trail
nationalIdeas.title: The Oregon Trail
nationalIdeas.desc: Our home exists far to the West of the American continent, and settlers wishing to make a new life for themselves in Cascadia had to endure desert, mountains, rivers, and the ruthless conditions of the untamed lands of America. As such, only the hardiest of settlers survived to reach Cascadia, although they may have lost some of their company to dysentery…

nationalIdeas.name: spi_flexibility
nationalIdeas.title: Diplomatic Flexibility
nationalIdeas.desc: Wedged in between stronger powers and under constant threat of falling too far under their influence, we have been forced to practice nimble diplomacy - some would say shameless opportunism - in order to safeguard our independence and find some new opening to advance our state. Though distasteful in the eyes of traditionalists, opportunism has its upsides.

nationalIdeas.name: spi_defensive_prowess
nationalIdeas.title: Defensive Prowess
nationalIdeas.desc: From the French in Savoy and Piedmont to the Spanish in Sardinia, our lands have long been tempting targets for our neighbors' expansionist ideals. In protecting our sovereignty through the years, we have honed our fortification techniques and mastered the art of defending a fortress.

nationalIdeas.name: the_shroud_of_turin
nationalIdeas.title: The Shroud of Turin
nationalIdeas.desc: The burial shroud of Christ himself was found in our lands in the year 1390 and since that time has been the prized artifact of the House of Savoy. Put the Shroud of Turin on display and watch the pilgrims flock to Piedmont, bringing their wealth with them.

nationalIdeas.name: spi_royal_sardinian_army
nationalIdeas.title: Royal Sardinian Army
nationalIdeas.desc: The golden age of mercenaries has passed, and our army shall keep with the times. By implementing reforms to professionalize it, we can establish a standing army capable of projecting our power abroad in Italy and Europe as a whole.

nationalIdeas.name: spi_centralized_state
nationalIdeas.title: Centralized State
nationalIdeas.desc: By imitating the means and methods of the great powers of Europe in our own territories, we can forge Sardinia-Piedmont into powerhouse capable of dominating Italy and standing our ground on the European stage.

nationalIdeas.name: spi_piedmontese_manufacturing
nationalIdeas.title: Piedmontese Manufacturing
nationalIdeas.desc: Situated on the key trade route between Venice and France, there are many markets on which to sell our produce. By adopting the latest methods pioneered elsewhere, we can increase our production and bring plentiful riches to our lands.

nationalIdeas.name: spi_risorgimento
nationalIdeas.title: The Risorgimento
nationalIdeas.desc: Italy has not been united since the fall of Rome, but the idea of a united Italy has never died. Now, as the dream enjoys a resurgence, we have emerged as one of the main standard bearers of the Italian people's hopes and dreams.

nationalIdeas.name: ilk_restored_ilkhanate
nationalIdeas.title: Restored Ilkhanate
nationalIdeas.desc: The Ilkhanate was originally established to secure Mongol rule over Persia in 1256. Many who have sought to rule Persia since have sought legitimacy by claiming descent from Genghis Khan, but our nation is a true revival of the first Ilkhanate. None can question our right to rule.

nationalIdeas.name: ilk_favor_sufism
nationalIdeas.title: Favor Sufism
nationalIdeas.desc: When our ancestors converted to Islam, they preferred the mystical teachings of Sufi scholars to the sectarian politics of the conventional Ulema. We should invite such scholars to court and promote a tolerant policy towards all Muslims in our realm.

nationalIdeas.name: ilk_persian_language_at_court
nationalIdeas.title: Persian Language at Court
nationalIdeas.desc: Promoting a single language for use at court and within the state bureaucracy has clear advantages. Many of our elites have already adopted Persian as a second language, recognizing it as a prestigious and generally understood tongue throughout the Muslim world.

nationalIdeas.name: ilk_yam_networks
nationalIdeas.title: The Yam
nationalIdeas.desc: Genghis Khan established a system of relay stations, supply networks, and intelligence gathering to be employed across the Mongol Empire to ease the burdens of governing an empire spanning thousands of miles across. We should restore the Yam so that our armies and envoys can travel efficiently through the realm.

nationalIdeas.name: ilk_mongol_peace
nationalIdeas.title: Mongol Peace
nationalIdeas.desc: Those who submit willingly to the Ilkhan can be sure that they will enjoy his protection. As word spreads of our benevolent and tolerant rule, resistance to our conquests will surely subside.

nationalIdeas.name: ilk_patronize_observatories
nationalIdeas.title: Patronize Observatories
nationalIdeas.desc: The first incarnation of the Ilkhanate heavily patronized the study of the heavens, funding observatories and inviting renowned astronomers to court. We should emulate our forebears' love of the sciences by restoring the old observatories.

nationalIdeas.name: ilk_recruit_turkoman_gunners
nationalIdeas.title: Recruit Turkoman Gunners
nationalIdeas.desc: It would be foolish to ignore the services offered by the Turkoman soldiers who have begun to settle in our realm. Handheld firearms are the future of warfare, and these Turkomans have mastered that art.

nationalIdeas.name: ancient_pueblo_legacy
nationalIdeas.title: Ancient Pueblo Legacy
nationalIdeas.desc: For eons already, our people have lived and built settlements in this region. Our Elders have a rich story to tell.

nationalIdeas.name: adobe_architecture
nationalIdeas.title: Adobe Architecture
nationalIdeas.desc: By using dried mud as a building material, we can build strong, lasting settlements.

nationalIdeas.name: mesa_settlements
nationalIdeas.title: Mesa Settlements
nationalIdeas.desc: By situating our villages atop high mesas, where they can only be reached by difficult climbs, we stand a far better chance of surviving enemy attacks.

nationalIdeas.name: cotton_weaving
nationalIdeas.title: Cotton Weaving
nationalIdeas.desc: Unlike our neighbors, we have discovered ways of weaving the plants that grow in our land into fine clothes of great value. By trading with them, we can bring wealth to our people.

nationalIdeas.name: kachina_dolls
nationalIdeas.title: Kachina Dolls
nationalIdeas.desc: By using dolls shaped in the semblance of the spirits that shape our world, we can pass on our knowledge of those spirits and their traditions to our children, and ensure the continuation of our society.

nationalIdeas.name: clown_societies
nationalIdeas.title: Clown Societies
nationalIdeas.desc: We should create societies to maintain the arts and traditions of the clowns, who put on Kachina masks to represent the spirits in ceremonies. Thus, our people will remember who they are, and tensions among the community will be defused.

nationalIdeas.name: legend_of_cibola
nationalIdeas.title: Legend of Cibola
nationalIdeas.desc: Visitors who witness our cities from afar sometime mistake the gleaming adobe wall atop mesas for walls of gold. This will doubtless draw the eyes of the world to our people.

nationalIdeas.name: shan_fortified_cities
nationalIdeas.title: Fortified Cities
nationalIdeas.desc: When other peoples settled in the hills the Shan chose to build fortified cities in the valleys. From these valleys our rule has extended far and wide and now the hill peoples are our subjects.

nationalIdeas.name: shan_wet_rice
nationalIdeas.title: Wet Rice Cultivation
nationalIdeas.desc: Wet rice cultivation is the best way to get the most out of the Shan lands. Thanks to this technique the Shan valleys can support a much larger population than would otherwise be possible.

nationalIdeas.name: sao_pha
nationalIdeas.title: Sao Pha
nationalIdeas.desc: Known as Saopha, or lords of the sky, the Shan rulers and their venerable dynasties command the respect of all of their subjects. Despite this an ideal Shan ruler should not be distant from his population and tradition dictates that our rulers travel the land to learn of the views of their subjects themselves.

nationalIdeas.name: shan_control_of_the_gem_trade
nationalIdeas.title: Control of the Gem Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: Large quantities of Rubies, Amber, Sapphires and Jade leave these lands for the demanding markets in China and India every year. We must protect and control these caravans and profit from this ancient trade.

nationalIdeas.name: shan_raiders
nationalIdeas.title: Raiders
nationalIdeas.desc: Through constant warfare between the small Shan states and chiefdoms our warriors have become experienced and battle-hardened. While we have fought each other our neighbors have grown rich and weak. Joining together to raid foreign lands would be far more profitable than to continue these internal struggles.

nationalIdeas.name: shan_chronicles
nationalIdeas.title: Shan Chronicles
nationalIdeas.desc: Traditionally any larger Shan state keeps its own records and royal chroniclers have followed our ancestors as far back as to the beginning of our dynasty. As time goes on, however, chronicles age. By copying and preserving the annals of our predecessors we ensure that nothing is forgotten.

nationalIdeas.name: shan_expansionism
nationalIdeas.title: Expansionism
nationalIdeas.desc: As our population grows the lands we control have become too scarce to support them well. Rather than risk domestic violence escalating as resources become scarce we should create a larger army and expand at the expense of our neighbors.

nationalIdeas.name: end_of_diaspora
nationalIdeas.title: End of Diaspora
nationalIdeas.desc: For a long time the people of Israel have lived scattered across Europe and the Middle East but now, with our own nation, that has finally come to an end!

nationalIdeas.name: national_myths_restored
nationalIdeas.title: National Myths Restored
nationalIdeas.desc: Now united we can once again look back at the myths that define our culture, especially reviving our warrior king David and using it to sharpen our military!

nationalIdeas.name: return_home
nationalIdeas.title: Return Home
nationalIdeas.desc: With something the Jewish people can now call home, a lot of them are migrating back to Jerusalem and our economy and production boom with the increase of population.

nationalIdeas.name: jewish_trade_tradition
nationalIdeas.title: Jewish Trade Tradition
nationalIdeas.desc: We have a long tradition of trading all over the world, from Shanghai to Reykjavík. The Radhanite's are a prime example of this proud tradition.

nationalIdeas.name: pious_people
nationalIdeas.title: Pious People
nationalIdeas.desc: In the long history of the Jews, we had to endure much. But regardless of the challenges we face, we will never lose the faith in God!

nationalIdeas.name: people_of_exile
nationalIdeas.title: People of Exile
nationalIdeas.desc: Being more accustomed to travel because of our history, our people have it quite easy to settle new land.

nationalIdeas.name: the_chosen_people
nationalIdeas.title: The Chosen People
nationalIdeas.desc: The Jews are the chosen people of God, with his divine will we shall never again lose Israel to our old enemies again.

nationalIdeas.name: mann_stanleys
nationalIdeas.title: The Stanleys
nationalIdeas.desc: The Stanley dynasty has ushered in an era of peace and prosperity for the Manx people. Their skill at diplomacy ensures the safety of the island from both political and military threats to our sovereignty.

nationalIdeas.name: mann_kings
nationalIdeas.title: Kings of Mann
nationalIdeas.desc: Despite its size, Mann is recognized as a de jure Kingdom. But what is a Kingdom without land? We must acquire more.

nationalIdeas.name: mann_tynwald
nationalIdeas.title: Tynwald High Court
nationalIdeas.desc: The Tynwald is the Manx high court. The House of Keys, led by the most powerful families of Mann, act as a national jury that give advice on legal matters. As the state expands however, its administrative needs multiply. The Tynwald must become a permanent institution, akin to a parliament with the power to write new laws.

nationalIdeas.name: mann_and_the_isles
nationalIdeas.title: Mann and the Isles
nationalIdeas.desc: In centuries past Mann was the heart of a great realm that spanned across the Irish Sea. It is time to revive the tradition of shipbuilding so that we can restore this empire.

nationalIdeas.name: mann_act_of_settlement
nationalIdeas.title: The Act of Settlement
nationalIdeas.desc: It is time to finally settle the status of peasant landholding on Mann. The Act will guarantee the basic rights of citizens and become a basis for the future development of our constitution.

nationalIdeas.name: mann_burn_the_heretic
nationalIdeas.title: Burn the Heretic
nationalIdeas.desc: Witchcraft and heresy are ever-present dangers to the faithful. Suffer not the witch and the heretic to live.

nationalIdeas.name: mann_act_of_revestment
nationalIdeas.title: The Act of Revestment
nationalIdeas.desc: There are too many petty nobles holding minor titles and withholding rents from their land. The Act Of Revestment will revoke these titles so that the monarch can rule more directly.

nationalIdeas.name: yua_da_zai_qian_yuan
nationalIdeas.title: Da Zai Qian Yuan
nationalIdeas.desc:
Kublai Khan, the Shizu Emperor of Great Yuan Ulus, named our incomparable empire based on this famous phrase from I-Ching Tuanzhuan, pleased by its auspiciousness and appropriateness. We have at last begun to live up to this name again by reclaiming the legacy of the Great Yuan.

'Vast Ye Qian Yuan, the heavenly, the primal, the dominant nation of all under heaven!'

nationalIdeas.name: yua_a_savage_kingdom_holy_and_enchanted
nationalIdeas.title: A Savage Kingdom Holy and Enchanted
nationalIdeas.desc: Weaker nations fear our might and name us savages. Yet they crave strength such as ours and gasp at our grandeur while sighing at their own cowardice. Let us bear the name of 'Savage' proudly, no one excels at fierceness like the sons of the Great Khan.\n

nationalIdeas.name: yua_the_three_teachings_and_nine_schools_respected
nationalIdeas.title: The Three Teachings and Nine Schools All Respected
nationalIdeas.desc: The Yuan Empire is not a mere nation of conquest. We learn from our subjects and strive to better our rule. All the schools and branches of Chinese philosophy must be revered. We must gain the wisdom of these masters as our own and use it to hold together and expand an Empire worthy of its name.\n

nationalIdeas.name: yua_keshik_and_weijun
nationalIdeas.title: Keshik and Weijun
nationalIdeas.desc: As the One Khagan of all Hordes our ruler should be accompanied by his Keshiktens, and as the Son of Heaven over the Middle Kingdom he is to be defended by Weijun, the Imperial Guards. They are the two wings of our leader, and will balance each other's power as factions in our state.\n

nationalIdeas.name: yua_a_thousand_miles_as_if_at_home
nationalIdeas.title: A Thousand Miles as if at Home
nationalIdeas.desc: The Grand Ulus of the Yuan, was once universally praised for its extraordinary road system. Along its well-guarded routes it was possible to travel effortlessly over vast distances. We should strive to recreate this legacy if we are to rule an empire as vast as that of Kublai Khan.\n

nationalIdeas.name: yua_sino_mongol_administration
nationalIdeas.title: Sino-Mongol Administration
nationalIdeas.desc: The Chinese have a long and stable tradition of government that could serve us well. In order to maintain an empire as great as ours, however, we must not let ourselves be blinded by the Chinese ideals of meritocracy and service. Mongol government stresses loyalty and reliability and has a long tradition of employing able men from all over the empire.\nWe should strive to find a golden balance between Mongol and Chinese traditions in order to create a hybrid government that is just as able to rule the highlands of Tibet, the vast Steppes and the great expanse of China itself.\n

nationalIdeas.name: yua_pax_mongolica
nationalIdeas.title: Pax Mongolica
nationalIdeas.desc: The pacification of Mongolia, of China, Tibet and all other parts of the Great Yuan Empire, once allowed an unprecedented economic growth to take place. Now that we have reclaimed the Yuan heritage we should also live up to the name and protect all within our borders. Let the trade flow freely, under the benevolent protection of the Great Khagan and his kin.\n

nationalIdeas.name: divya_upadesh
nationalIdeas.title: The Divya Upadesh
nationalIdeas.desc: The Divya Upadesh laid out nine principles that formed the core of Nepali political and national life as well as guidelines for successful foreign policy. While it was not written until the 18th century, it encapsulated centuries of Nepali thoughts on governance, war and peace. Following these principles Nepal has been able to avoid the subversion of nearby Empires and the marauding Westerners.

nationalIdeas.name: land_of_peaks
nationalIdeas.title: Land of Peaks
nationalIdeas.desc: Our people live and die without losing sight of the great peaks that surround us. We know the hills and mountains like the back of our hands. Even the Gods have settled at the heights. We shall always keep in mind the important lesson we have learned... build our forts to take advantage of the environment.

nationalIdeas.name: valleys_united
nationalIdeas.title: Our Valleys United
nationalIdeas.desc: Nepal was united just before our time by Jayasthiti Malla (ruled from 1382-1395), who united the valleys, imposed order across them, and issued universal coinage. Not only a military master, Jayasthiti Malla drafted the first comprehensive codification of law in Nepal, based on the dharma of ancient Hindu texts. All the varied principalities and hill tribes will now heed our call.

nationalIdeas.name: rajput_refugees
nationalIdeas.title: Rajput Refugees
nationalIdeas.desc: The Islamic invasions of the 14th century left widespread damage across the plains to the south, and many noble Rajput families have been deposed and fled to our mountains to try to re-establish themselves as landholders. Let us grant them land and harness their fighting experiences and warrior traditions.

nationalIdeas.name: royal_kumari
nationalIdeas.title: The Royal Kumari
nationalIdeas.desc: The Malla kings shored up their position by claiming to be reincarnations of the Hindu god Vishnu and establishing the cult of the Kumari, in which a young girl was designated a living embodiment of the Goddess of War, Durga, whose role it was to bless the Malla's rule during an annual celebration. After the Malla Kings fell, this tradition continued onwards with other dynasties in Nepal. Let us anoint a new Kumari to inspire our people!

nationalIdeas.name: gurkha_recruits
nationalIdeas.title: The Gurkhas
nationalIdeas.desc: The Gurkhas are a tribal people mainly from the mid-western and eastern Nepali hills. They are fierce fighters and we have found that including them as irregulars with our armies brings us great success on the battlefield. Their name derives from the Hindu warrior-saint Guru Gorakhnath, and their war cry is Jaya Mahakali, Ayo Gorkhali! (Glory to Great Kali, The Gurkhas approach!) Eventually our Gurkhas' military prowess will be feared world over.

nationalIdeas.name: envelopment_and_blockade
nationalIdeas.title: Envelopment and Blockade
nationalIdeas.desc: King Prithvi Narayan Shah (1723-1775) re-unified Nepal and picked off his enemies one-by-one by blockading trade routes and besieging valleys piece by piece. His military strategy proved effective in the hills and mountains of Nepal, keeping rival militaries starved for supplies and unable to coalesce into a force that could overwhelm him in a pitched battle.

nationalIdeas.name: glh_legacy_of_the_golden_horde
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of the Golden Horde
nationalIdeas.desc: The world shall tremble for we have reunited the Golden Horde! We were one of the main constituent parts of Genghis Khan's empire and the main political force in Eastern Europe and the Steppes for centuries. Born again the Golden Horde will strive to forge the empire that was lost and unite the Hordes of Central Asia.

nationalIdeas.name: glh_perso_mongol_administration
nationalIdeas.title: Perso-Mongol Administration
nationalIdeas.desc: Our ancestors refined the Mongol administrative system over the centuries but they were not shy of incorporating the ideas and methods of the cultures they subdued. Our system of administration is in part based on traditions dating back to the Great Genghis Khan himself and in part on what we have adopted from Persians and Muslim bureaucrats in the lands conquered. If our reborn Golden Horde is to thrive and continue to expand we must be ready to build an empire on pragmatic adoption.

nationalIdeas.name: glh_secure_the_trade_routes
nationalIdeas.title: Secure the Trade Routes
nationalIdeas.desc: Not all riches in this world originate in the lands under our rule. Trade is the source of all wealth and the Golden Horde has always protected merchants. By ensuring the safety of anyone who wishes to move goods through our country we can ensure a steady stream of furs, Chinese craftsmanship, silk, spices and other necessities to our cities. Whether they choose to sell their goods to us or not their mere presence will generate wealth for our people.

nationalIdeas.name: logistics_of_khan
nationalIdeas.title: Logistics of the Khan
nationalIdeas.desc: People forget that the conquests of the Great Khan were as much by superior logistics as by superior military strength. We must emulate the techniques of the Great Khan while making them current with the times. This will give us greater scope for conquest.

nationalIdeas.name: glh_populating_the_steppes
nationalIdeas.title: Populating the Steppes
nationalIdeas.desc: Just as we bring destruction to our enemies we must bring peace to the many who reside within our borders. Before the misfortune of Timur Sarai and the Golden Horde cities were once the envy of the world. Let this be the model for all our cities. By upholding the internal peace and encouraging talented men and women from all over our empire to plan and populate new and great cities we will tame the steppes.

nationalIdeas.name: akk_religious_pragmatism
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Pragmatism
nationalIdeas.desc: These are dangerous times and many look to millenarian sects for answers. We must do what we can to curb religious extremism in our lands, while also working together with the more organized dervish sects that many of the Turkoman warriors belong to. By carefully choosing who to ally and who to fight we can build a stronger state, one that will have the allegiance of the Dervishes without the chaos that religious extremism can bring.

nationalIdeas.name: cep_frankokratia
nationalIdeas.title: Frankokratia
nationalIdeas.desc: Following the fourth crusade large parts of formerly Byzantine possessions fell into the hands of Latin Franks and Italians. Ever since the Ionian Islands have been ruled by Neapolitan and Venetian families. Over time Italian customs and language has become more and more ingrained with our native ones and under foreign rule we have managed to steer clear of the Turkish expansionism on the Greek Mainland.

nationalIdeas.name: cep_angelokastroi
nationalIdeas.title: Castles of the Angels
nationalIdeas.desc: In constructing the Angelokastro, or Castle of the Angels, the Byzantines realized the importance of fortifying these islands. The Frank and Italians who came after them have continued to construct a great number of castles and forts here and with so many greedy eyes resting on our possessions we would do well to continue that tradition. Let us build a strong system of forts and fortified ports so that we can use the environment of these beautiful yet rugged islands to our advantage. Italian, Turk or Greek, anyone wishing to conquer what is ours should know that there is a high price to be paid.

nationalIdeas.name: cep_settling_the_islands
nationalIdeas.title: Settling the Islands
nationalIdeas.desc: Our beautiful islands are ideally situated at the crossing between Greece and Italy and at the mouth of the Adriatic. They are also blessed with a thriving local economy built on olives, raisins and fish. Nonetheless we have a significant population shortage, especially outside the major islands of Corfu, Zakynthos and Kefalonia. Let us send word to the people of the mainland, Italian as well as Greek, that we welcome skilled newcomers and that there are fortunes to be made in these fair lands.

nationalIdeas.name: cep_gate_to_the_adriatic
nationalIdeas.title: Gate to the Adriatic
nationalIdeas.desc: Due to their unique position our islands act as a door to the rich trading cities of the Adriatic in general and to the Venetian merchants in particular. Many influential Venetian families have a long-standing representation here due to the precious Currants and Olives we produce but it is our strategic position that will allow us to truly profit from their presence. Tolls and tariffs will ensure that we are profiting as well as we can from the rich ships that constantly pass through our waters.

nationalIdeas.name: cep_govian_arsenal
nationalIdeas.title: Naval Expansion
nationalIdeas.desc: We are positioned to control the Adriatic but in order to do so we must compete with the major naval powers of the Mediterranean. There is no lack for experienced sailors or captains on our islands but the sheer number of galleys others can bring against us is daunting. Let us create an arsenal along the lines of the Arsenale Nuovo in Venice to mass produce warships. Only this way will we be able to create a war fleet capable of defending our homes.

nationalIdeas.name: cep_entrepot_of_eastern_med
nationalIdeas.title: Entrepôt of the Eastern Mediterranean
nationalIdeas.desc: Ionian sailors have always frequented ports from the Black Sea to the Levant and we have long profited from our position between east and west. With the development of our navy and the growth of our economy, however, local merchants have increasingly come to organize themselves in joint companies to invest in these trading ventures. Some families now control hundreds of small ships that regularly call the ports of Rumelia and Anatolia, Crete, Cyprus, Syria, Egypt and the many trading ports of the Italian Peninsula. We must do what we can to further encourage these entrepreneurs by abolishing hindering rules, regulations and tariffs and accommodating their trade.

nationalIdeas.name: cep_ionian_academy
nationalIdeas.title: Ionian Academy
nationalIdeas.desc: While some would say that the Ionian Islands are too influenced by the various foreigners that have ruled them over the centuries they are also one of the longest standing independent Greek states in existence. Let us take up the torch as the leading Greek polity and establish a modern university opened to all Greek scholars. Under our protection the great minds of the Greek nation will instruct a new generation of Hellenic intellectuals.

nationalIdeas.name: land_of_the_rus
nationalIdeas.title: Land of the Rus
nationalIdeas.desc: The Rus together will be a force to reckon with.

nationalIdeas.name: siberian_frontier
nationalIdeas.title: Siberian Frontier
nationalIdeas.desc: The distant wastes of Siberia call to us. We must clear a way there and let our cossacks go forth and bring land for the Russian people.

nationalIdeas.name: russian_artillery_yard
nationalIdeas.title: Russian Artillery Yard
nationalIdeas.desc: Superior firepower is what determines the sieges of today as well as the pitched battles of tomorrow. We must build a state-of-the-art artillery yard in the heart of our country, to ensure our armies are never without cannons nor ammunition.

nationalIdeas.name: life_long_conscription
nationalIdeas.title: Life-Long Conscription
nationalIdeas.desc: In order to feed our ever-growing armies we should expand the terms of military service so that it becomes a lifelong commitment. This will offer social mobility to those that would otherwise lead lives in lesser occupations, and it will give us a reliable source of soldiers for our imperial endeavors.

nationalIdeas.name: abolish_the_mestnichestvo
nationalIdeas.title: Abolish the Mestnichestvo
nationalIdeas.desc: The Mestnichestvo was an ancient system that states that state jobs should be offered to persons based upon how ancient their lineage was. This was problematic because this did not take into account the suitability of the candidate. The abolishment of this system will improve state bureaucracy by allowing appointment by merit.

nationalIdeas.name: table_of_ranks
nationalIdeas.title: The Table of Ranks
nationalIdeas.desc: The abolishment of the Mestnichestvo was the first move to make the state bureaucracy more meritocratic. The table of ranks codified this and made service and promotion in the army conditional on service in lower ranks.

nationalIdeas.name: curriculum_of_the_cadet_corps
nationalIdeas.title: Broaden the curriculum of the Cadet Corps
nationalIdeas.desc: We have more cadets than there are officer places in our army, we should use the cadet corps to create not just potential officers, but scientists and engineers as well.

nationalIdeas.name: sca_united_craftsman
nationalIdeas.title: Masterful Craftsmanship
nationalIdeas.desc: The Scandinavian region is a harsh environment where nights seem to never end and the cold can become unbearable. Our people, who are used to these conditions, are masterful craftsmen. They construct homes with comfortable furniture inside and robust buildings which can withstand the remorseless winters.

nationalIdeas.name: sca_unified_scandinavian
nationalIdeas.title: Unified Scandinavia
nationalIdeas.desc: For untold centuries the Kingdoms of the North have been divided and locked in internecine power struggles. While this delighted their European neighbors, it at least forced each of the kingdoms to develop their own policies; learn their own lessons.\nNow they have been finally united under one banner, and all their hardship finally pays off as they will serve the realm of Scandinavia.

nationalIdeas.name: sca_danish_baltic_fleet
nationalIdeas.title: Danish Baltic Fleet
nationalIdeas.desc: The Danes are not known for their victories on land, but their fleet tells a different story of them. The Danish admiralty and shipwork makes them into a valuable asset for us to dominate the Baltic Sea and the global trade.

nationalIdeas.name: sca_norwegian_marines
nationalIdeas.title: Norwegian Marines
nationalIdeas.desc: The Norwegians are hardy sailors who live and die by the might of the North Sea. The centuries of living on the ocean taught these study people the naval lessons so many other coastal countries are lacking.

nationalIdeas.name: sca_finnish_hakkapeliita
nationalIdeas.title: Finnish Hakkapeliitta
nationalIdeas.desc: The Finnish cavalry - the Hakkapeliitta - is one of its kind. Good horsemanship and high-quality horses make them into a weapon of our arsenal, which serve as the perfect shock troop against any foe.

nationalIdeas.name: sca_swedish_carolean
nationalIdeas.title: Swedish Caroleans
nationalIdeas.desc: No other infantry is invoking as much fear in the hearts of their enemies as the Swedish Caroleans. Their discipline allows them to march under heavy fire into the enemy line and deliver the deadly volley at close range.

nationalIdeas.name: sca_empire_of_the_north
nationalIdeas.title: The Lion of the North
nationalIdeas.desc: The Kingdoms of Scandinavia have been known as the Lions of the North, yet neither of them has shown the European powers the might of a lion. We, on the other hand, are the true Lion of the North. Our absolute authority of Scandinavia is unquestionable; our strength unchallenged.

nationalIdeas.name: swa_decentralisation
nationalIdeas.title: Swabian Decentralization
nationalIdeas.desc: After the fall of the last Duchy of Swabia, its territories became as fragmented to a degree unparalleled across all of Europe. Although we have restored unity to the Duchy, the traditions of local autonomy are hard to break. But on the bright side, we have no shortage of officials capable of administering our land.

nationalIdeas.name: fugger_banks
nationalIdeas.title: Fugger Banking
nationalIdeas.desc: The Fuggers are a merchant family from Swabia, who originally made money from weaving and shrewdly invested the profits into land. Building up their power they are now one of the wealthiest houses in the Empire. We must gain exclusive access to their services as bankers.

nationalIdeas.name: swa_free_cities
nationalIdeas.title: Land of the Free Cities
nationalIdeas.desc: Swabia is home to the Empire's largest concentration of Imperial Cities. These cities typically survive through trade, as they usually do not own enough farmland to sustain themselves. We can make use of their citizens' commercial acumen to boost the profitability of our lands.

nationalIdeas.name: swa_swabian_league
nationalIdeas.title: The Swabian League
nationalIdeas.desc: When faced with a more powerful threat, the cities and principalities of Swabia would band together into a league in order to provide mutual defense. Even though our lands are now united under one banner, we must not forget the benefits that strength in numbers can bring. We shall extend the old Swabian League beyond Swabia and build a brotherhood of like-minded states.

nationalIdeas.name: swa_stinginess
nationalIdeas.title: A Miserly People
nationalIdeas.desc: "Schaffe, schaffe Häusle baue / Und net nach de Mädle schaue"\n\nThe stinginess of our people is infamous among Germans - we will never throw away our funds carelessly on frivolous expenses.

nationalIdeas.name: swa_hohenstaufen_emperors
nationalIdeas.title: Memory of the Hohenstaufen
nationalIdeas.desc: Centuries ago, the Hohenstaufen Dukes of Swabia were powerful Emperors of Germany. By appealing to their past and seeking to emulate them, we can lay the foundation for our own claim to greatness.

nationalIdeas.name: swa_barbarossas_legacy
nationalIdeas.title: Barbarossa's Legacy
nationalIdeas.desc: Hohenstaufen Emperor Frederick Barbarossa began as Duke of Swabia and became King of Germany, King of Italy and King of Burgundy before dying en route to Jerusalem during the Third Crusade. The memory of his many campaigns still inspires our soldiers to greater deeds and awakes envy in our leaders, who strive ever to match the greatness of his accomplishments.

nationalIdeas.name: governorate_general
nationalIdeas.title: Governorate General
nationalIdeas.desc: The arrival of governor generals greatly improved the administration of our nation and their policies still provide an example of how to get the most tax out of our populace.

nationalIdeas.name: research_of_nassau
nationalIdeas.title: Research of John of Nassau
nationalIdeas.desc: John of Nassau, a governor of one of the colonies established in Brazil, brought in the finest botanists and scientists of Europe to help further our knowledge by studying our flora and fauna.

nationalIdeas.name: mines_of_minas_gerais
nationalIdeas.title: Mines of Minas Gerais
nationalIdeas.desc: The gold of the mines of Minas Gerais are enough to challenge that of Sheba, and over time our administrators have come to understand how to cope with the inflated prices that come with this gift.

nationalIdeas.name: halting_foreign_incursions
nationalIdeas.title: Halting Foreign Incursions
nationalIdeas.desc: Many foreign nations have attempted to establish colonies of their own on our fair shores. Our brave soldiers have gained much experience in driving them off and stand ready to do so once more should it be necessary.

nationalIdeas.name: entradas_and_bandeiras
nationalIdeas.title: Entradas and Bandeiras
nationalIdeas.desc: Our intrepid explorers have gone to great lengths in exploring the depths of the continent. Their charts and maps will allow us to more properly expand our influence to our rightful borders.

nationalIdeas.name: inconfidencia_mineira
nationalIdeas.title: Inconfidencia Mineira
nationalIdeas.desc: The members of the foiled Inconfidencia Mineira uprising are remember fondly by all as national heroes and can be pointed to as guiding examples in difficult times.

nationalIdeas.name: old_seat_of_the_empire
nationalIdeas.title: Seat of the Empire
nationalIdeas.desc: When our former colonial masters were exiled from their homeland, they chose our nation as their seat. With the great palaces that were constructed comes greater legitimacy and the right to forge our own empire.

nationalIdeas.name: french_men_of_trade
nationalIdeas.title: Men of Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: It has always been known to the French kings that men from the provinces are best suited to dictate the trade policies of the kingdom as our people are masters in the art of trade. France is ideally located, at the crossroad of the Atlantic and the Mediterranean, between England and the Italian cities as well as Germany and the Iberian Peninsula. The wealth of the world flows through our lands!

nationalIdeas.name: french_renaissance_palaces
nationalIdeas.title: Renaissance Palaces
nationalIdeas.desc: Our ancestors used to protect themselves in heavily fortified castles. With the coming of the renaissance, however, prestige and power no longer relies on such fortresses. Let us instead build magnificently decorated palaces to show our prosperity and splendor to other Frenchmen and foreigners alike.

nationalIdeas.name: french_qui_ruit_et_lethum
nationalIdeas.title: Qui Ruit Et Lethum
nationalIdeas.desc: From the wet areas of England to the dry regions of the Holy Land our knightly ancestors fought valiantly from horseback. Had they seen us today they might make fun of our ruffs and laces yet underneath this magnificent varnish we still exert the 'furor gallicus' and none can resist us on the battlefield!\nLet our musketmen be to the modern battlefield what the French Knights were to the medieval wars. All shall fear the might of our armies!

nationalIdeas.name: french_religious_conviction
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Conviction
nationalIdeas.desc: Our people have always believed in standing strong for their cause. When the French people's opinion is set nobody can hinder us from expressing it. Whether we side with the pope or against hem we must remain firm in our convictions!

nationalIdeas.name: french_cuisine
nationalIdeas.title: French Cuisine
nationalIdeas.desc: France is to many known as the land of good cooking. Every province is famed for its wines, dishes, cheeses and cakes and it is a proven proverb here that good food builds good character. As our region is home to some of the most delicious food its reputation goes beyond that of many of the other areas of France. We must cherish and guard our culinary traditions and strengthen our regional identity.

nationalIdeas.name: french_enlightenment
nationalIdeas.title: French Enlightenment
nationalIdeas.desc: French culture and French language is the carrier of the ideas of the modern age. As the enlightenment spreads from court to court so does the respect for all things French. It would be wrong, however, to presume that this is strictly a spread of Parisian ideas and values. As French becomes the language of all courts, books and plays our influence spreads worldwide with it.

nationalIdeas.name: french_la_petite_nation
nationalIdeas.title: La Petite Nation
nationalIdeas.desc: The foreigners always speak of France as the country with one king. This well may be true but this does not mean in any way that the king is alone to undertake anything positive for our fellow Frenchmen. The French provinces have a life of their own, and be it under the royal authority or in a more autonomous way they are able to produce strong men and beautiful wives, great philosopher, artists and learned men. Paris matters little to us in day-to-day matters. We must stand up for our own people for we are the true Frenchmen and without us the French region would be both weaker and blander.

nationalIdeas.name: NZL_maori_seats
nationalIdeas.title: Maori Seats
nationalIdeas.desc: In Zealandia, we Kiwis are not alone in our occupation of our island home. Our lands are also home to the native people known as the Maori. Historically, these people have been greatly mistreated in the endless tide of colonialism and although we may never heal the scars that our ruthless conquest has left in its wake, allowing the Maori their own representation within the government may begin the slow healing process between our people.

nationalIdeas.name: NZL_otago_gold
nationalIdeas.title: The Otago Gold Rush
nationalIdeas.desc: Zealandia is rife with food and resources, and our home is ideal for miners and shepherds alike. With cattle breeding in abundancy and our hills exploding with gold, copper, and tin, Zealandia shall be a land far richer and more prosperous for its small size.

nationalIdeas.name: NZL_piopiotahi
nationalIdeas.title: Piopiotahi
nationalIdeas.desc: Milford Sound or ‘Piopiotahi’ as the Maori call it is a spectacular range of coast and mountain lush with life and greenery in the South Island. It has stood as a testament to the fertility of this land and for years it was a shared common ground amongst Maori of all Iwi.

nationalIdeas.name: NZL_haka
nationalIdeas.title: The Kiwi Haka
nationalIdeas.desc: The Maori people have practiced the traditional war-chant known as the Haka for centuries before we arrived on their shores. As our cultures begin to grow more and more intertwined, many people from outside the Maori culture have begun practicing the Haka as a demonstration of patriotism before a battle or sports match. Far beyond our shores, foreigners tell stories of Maori and Kiwi alike bursting into a terrifying demonstration of fearlessness and masculinity before charging into battle.

nationalIdeas.name: NZL_company
nationalIdeas.title: The New Zealand Company
nationalIdeas.desc: Prior to the New Zealand company promoting the idyllic life provided by Zealandia, colonisation of the island was slow and stagnant. But, with the guidance of the New Zealand Company, hordes of settlers from across the Old World came to Zealandia for a new and better life. By continuing to promote our nation as a beacon of the colonial dream, we may spread ourselves across the Pacific with hordes of new colonists seeking refuge and opportunity within our state!

nationalIdeas.name: NZL_rejecting_australia
nationalIdeas.title: Rejecting the Australia Constitution
nationalIdeas.desc: Our small nation was once offered the opportunity to join the colonists in Australia as their subject, but through democracy alone, the people made the right choice and maintained the independence of Zealandia for all time. By continuing to reject and resist any attempts to subjugate our people, we shall persevere.

nationalIdeas.name: NZL_pokarekare_ana
nationalIdeas.title: Pokarekare Ana
nationalIdeas.desc:
Pokarekare ana, nga wai o Waiapu
Whiti atu koe hine, marino ana e.
E hine e, hoki mai ra
Ka mate ahau i te aroha e.

This song speaks of the long journey a soldier must take before returning to his wife and love. We must not waste young men’s lives in wasteful wars and devote ourselves to the continued peace and tranquillity in the Land of the Long White Cloud.

nationalIdeas.name: under_the_infuence
nationalIdeas.title: Under the Influence
nationalIdeas.desc: Under constant Bohemian, German, and Polish influence, we have learned how to use diplomacy to the best of our ability.

nationalIdeas.name: silesian_duchies
nationalIdeas.title: Silesian Duchies
nationalIdeas.desc: Ever since the feudal fragmentation of Poland, Silesia was divided between numerous duchies. The decentralization eased administration over these areas.

nationalIdeas.name: german_settlers
nationalIdeas.title: German Settlers
nationalIdeas.desc: Starting from the 12th century, we have seen a steady influx of German settlers. They bring German town laws and knowledge of various crafts helping to further develop our land.

nationalIdeas.name: raubritter
nationalIdeas.title: Raubritter
nationalIdeas.desc: Robber barons (Raubritter) roamed the trade routes and hindered commerce by imposing unauthorized tolls or tariffs. Control of them helps our trade influence in the area.

nationalIdeas.name: via_regia
nationalIdeas.title: Via Regia
nationalIdeas.desc: Via Regia was an important and well maintained trade route which crossed the Holy Roman Empire. Most inland trade in central Europe flowed through it.

nationalIdeas.name: hanseatic_ties
nationalIdeas.title: Hanseatic Ties
nationalIdeas.desc: With Breslau becoming a member of Hanseatic League we gain more control of central European trade.

nationalIdeas.name: black_gold
nationalIdeas.title: Black Gold
nationalIdeas.desc: Silesia is rich in natural resources, particularly coal. By constructing mines we can increase our income greatly.

nationalIdeas.name: mansabdari_system
nationalIdeas.title: The Jagir and Mansabdari Systems
nationalIdeas.desc: Land grants are problematic and may end up encouraging our nobles to build their own little states within our state. Let us create a strict system of revenue rights to lands rather than land grants as such. The holder of such a temporary grant should be entitled to take up taxes and obligated to supply troops to the imperial armies. All other political and administrative duties should remain with the imperial bureaucracy.

nationalIdeas.name: control_of_the_ulema
nationalIdeas.title: Control over the Clergy
nationalIdeas.desc: The Mughal Ulema is too easily influenced by the trends and politics of the world outside of India. Let us gather the most influential men of faith in our lands and have them proclaim our Padshah the foremost authority on all legal matters.

nationalIdeas.name: mughal_ibadat_khana
nationalIdeas.title: Ibadat Khana - House of Worship
nationalIdeas.desc: Let us gather the most learned of men from all faiths and philosophies in one place and allow them to debate the best ways for men to live and worship.

nationalIdeas.name: an_indian_padshah
nationalIdeas.title: An Indian Padishah
nationalIdeas.desc: Our realm has become one of many faiths and cultures and while we are foreigners to these lands the traditions and values of India speak to us. Despite their rich culture these people seem to lack a common purpose. We must strive to ensure that regardless of caste, religion or culture all our subjects are given equal opportunities to serve our great house.

nationalIdeas.name: zabt_system
nationalIdeas.title: Zabt System
nationalIdeas.desc: These lands are far too dependent on ancient customs. As a result contracts and revenue units are often not organized in the most efficient way. By revoking all lands and placing them under direct imperial control for a time we can entirely reorganize and reassess our assets. This will greatly increase the efficiency of tax collection in our realm.

nationalIdeas.name: mughal_architecture
nationalIdeas.title: Mughal Architecture
nationalIdeas.desc: A great empire demands monumental buildings. In our cosmopolitan empire architects are already creating marvelous buildings that will awe generations to come. Our dynasty should be at the forefront of this movement, creating great works of a kind the world has never seen.

nationalIdeas.name: fatawa_e_alamgiri
nationalIdeas.title: Fatawa-i-Alamgiri
nationalIdeas.desc: By creating a central collection of civil laws for all subjects to follow we will be able to ensure that the law is the same in all parts of our realm.

name: Maya
note: Uses Mayan group ideas, but the full list could not be determined from the available files. Traditions: -1 National unrest, +15% Infantry combat ability. Ambition: +10% National tax modifier.

nationalIdeas.name: breadbasket_of_india
nationalIdeas.title: Breadbasket of India
nationalIdeas.desc: Punjab, the land of the five rivers, is one of the most fertile regions on Earth. Apart from allowing us to export food and cotton to our neighbors this also allows our many cities to grow and encourages all sorts of specialized production. We must do our outmost to encourage the growth of agriculture and to defend our farmers from the bandits and brigands of the adjoining areas.

nationalIdeas.name: encourage_indo_persian_trade
nationalIdeas.title: Encourage Indo-Persian Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: Situated at India's westernmost border the Punjab has always been at the crossroads of economic and cultural exchange between India and Persia. The ancient Grand Trunk Road, which connects eastern India to the Persian world, runs right through our lands before heading up into the Afghan mountain passes. These passes are, however, plagued by tribal raiders and bandits. We should encourage the traffic along this ancient and vibrant route and do everything in our power to look after the wellbeing of these traders by constructing caravansarais and policing these roads.

nationalIdeas.name: punjabi_textile_industry
nationalIdeas.title: Punjabi Textile Industry
nationalIdeas.desc: The Punjab is a major centre for textile production. Cloth from our weavers is specially made for markets all over Asia and Europe and our weavers are among the most productive in India.

nationalIdeas.name: foundation_of_the_khalsa
nationalIdeas.title: The Khalsa
nationalIdeas.desc: Sikhism, a religion native to the Punjab, is growing rapidly in our lands. Members of this faith come from all castes and background and will defend their state regardless of their former professions.

nationalIdeas.name: gurmukhi_script
nationalIdeas.title: Adopt Standardized Gurmukhi Script
nationalIdeas.desc: We should adopt a standardized script instead of the many different ones currently in use in our lands.

nationalIdeas.name: strength_of_the_misls
nationalIdeas.title: Strength of the Misls
nationalIdeas.desc: The administrative system of the Misl states of the Punjab allow them to field impressive cavalry forces. In times of need we may call upon these forces to fight a common enemy.

nationalIdeas.name: reforming_the_punjabi_army
nationalIdeas.title: Reforming the Punjabi Army
nationalIdeas.desc: The ways of our forefathers were sound and have served us well over the years. In order for our armies to continue to triumph on the battlefields we must, however, aim to create a more professional force. By studying the way far away countries organize their armies and making adapting their methods when prudent we may create a more efficient Punjabi army while still retaining the unique qualities of our current military system.

nationalIdeas.name: teutonic_legacy
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of the Teutonic Knights
nationalIdeas.desc: Though our state is fully secularized now, we must never forget that it was built on the remains of the Teutonic Order. These knights, united in their faith, established themselves here in Prussia to defend the Christian world from the barbaric pagans to the East, and we too should make it our duty to spread the reformation to all corners of our nation and become united in the true teachings of Christ!

nationalIdeas.name: soldier_king
nationalIdeas.title: The Soldier-King of Prussia
nationalIdeas.desc: Most states are countries that have an army, Prussia on the other hand is an army that has a country. The many Kings of Prussia were as much soldiers as they were Monarchs, and each would end their reign not only having reformed the state but also having left their mark on the army.

nationalIdeas.name: army_professionalism
nationalIdeas.title: Army Professionalism
nationalIdeas.desc: Going back all the way back to the Persian invasion of Greece, a smaller disciplined army could defeat a larger one if it was better disciplined and trained. We must raise our army up to the same standards if we want to prosper.

nationalIdeas.name: noble_cadets
nationalIdeas.title: Noble Cadets
nationalIdeas.desc: Although the nobility resists this, we seek to turn the army into the career of choice of second sons of nobility. We start training them from a young age, which means we not only bind the nobility to us, but we also create a corps of trained noble born officers for the future.

nationalIdeas.name: goose_step
nationalIdeas.title: The Goose Step
nationalIdeas.desc: Although looking rather odd, the goose step was specifically developed to ensure that our men help hold their line as they advanced towards the enemy. This gives our armies a real advantage on the battlefield.

nationalIdeas.name: regimental_cantons
nationalIdeas.title: Regimental Cantons
nationalIdeas.desc: Peasants are naturally not keen on a lifetime of service in the Army, so they tend to run away when recruiters come along. Now we give each regiment a recruiting district to draw manpower from. Each youth is expected to train for 3 months of the year so he is ready for service. This should ensure a steadier supply of manpower for armies.

nationalIdeas.name: religious_toleration
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Toleration
nationalIdeas.desc: Stability at home is the key to our success. If we wish to expand by encouraging tolerance of different religions, not only do we improve stability at home, but our realm will become a haven for those who flee persecution elsewhere.

nationalIdeas.name: bul_idea_1
nationalIdeas.title: Confirm The Bulgarian Boyars
