nationalIdeas.desc: As was the norm for Slavic people in Eastern Europe, the institution of Boyar aristocracy was common among Bulgarians in virtually all iterations of their state. Now, with the Ottomans finally gone and our people free, we must renew the old traditions and structure our society as it once was.

nationalIdeas.name: bul_idea_2
nationalIdeas.title: Root Out the Heresies
nationalIdeas.desc: Centuries of religious struggles as well as heathens overlords have left a mark on our people. We must root out all these dangerous doctrines as strength lies in unity.

nationalIdeas.name: bul_idea_3
nationalIdeas.title: Unity Before Feuds
nationalIdeas.desc: Now that we are free again, we must make sure that Bulgarian nobility never put their own petty squabbles above the common interest of our people. Never again will Bulgaria fall into the night as it did before the Ottomans! United we shall reclaim the place which is rightfully ours.

nationalIdeas.name: bul_idea_4
nationalIdeas.title: Reform The Army
nationalIdeas.desc: The Medieval age has passed and we now find ourselves in a brave new world dominated by gunpowder, light cavalry raiders from the east and siege engines that can render even the tallest walls into piles of rubble. We must adapt to these changes and make sure our armies are competent and numerous enough to face all challenges, no matter where they come from.

nationalIdeas.name: bul_idea_5
nationalIdeas.title: Reform The Bulgarian Church
nationalIdeas.desc: The Bulgarian Orthodox Church is the first Orthodox Slavic autocephalous Church. Once the source of great pride and power it was degraded during the Byzantine conquest of Bulgaria and its decay continued during our internal struggles and under the Ottoman yoke. Free once again, the Bulgarian people will find the Bulgarian Church the chief pillar of their society once again. As it once was so shall it be again.

nationalIdeas.name: bul_idea_6
nationalIdeas.title: Military Flexibility
nationalIdeas.desc: Bridging the Steppe world, the Islamic world and Western Europe; Bulgaria faces military challenges like few other countries in Europe. Not only does it have to remain competitive against numerous would-be conquerors, it has to retain its expertise in fighting in virtually every terrain type - from steppes, to plains and lowlands to forests, hills and mountains. Our ancestors never feared these challenges, they rose to face them with legendary success and grace, and so shall we once again.

nationalIdeas.name: bul_idea_7
nationalIdeas.title: Third Rome
nationalIdeas.desc: The golden age of Rome is over. Just as the once mighty empire has fallen, so too have its Greek successors fallen. It is now up to Bulgaria to use our position in Europe at the heart of one of the continent's largest trade route intersections, as well as our royal ties to the Byzantine throne and claim the legacy of the Third Rome. Let other usurpers and claimants in the East fear the New Bulgarian Tsardom, risen from ashes like a phoenix.

nationalIdeas.name: tradition_of_military_service
nationalIdeas.title: Tradition of Military Service
nationalIdeas.desc: Maratha cavalrymen have a long tradition of service as 'Bargirs' for the Deccan sultanates. The increased militarization of the Deccan due to the many wars fought in the area has made our cavalry one of the most dangerous forces in India.

nationalIdeas.name: forts_of_maharashtra
nationalIdeas.title: Forts of Maharashtra
nationalIdeas.desc: In these hilly and densely forested lands keeping many and well maintaned forts is a necessity for offense as well as defense. Keeping our many forts well maintained should be a top priority.

nationalIdeas.name: peasant_soldiers
nationalIdeas.title: Peasant Soldiers
nationalIdeas.desc: The villages of the Desh are full with able men who would be more than willing to serve in our armies. Let us train and recruit all Marathi speakers to serve in our armies.

nationalIdeas.name: office_of_the_peshwa
nationalIdeas.title: Office of the Peshwa
nationalIdeas.desc: Let us create an office entirely devoted to the running of our state and its armies. With a skillfull minister in charge, the Peshwa, our country will be versatile enough to expand quickly and efficiently.

nationalIdeas.name: encourage_ties_with_brahmin_financial_families
nationalIdeas.title: Strengthen ties with Brahmin Financial Families
nationalIdeas.desc: The financial sector of our state is dominated by Brahmin banking families. Let us integrate them further in our state by hiring them as tax collectors, creating regulations to strengthen their rights and protect their traditions. We will have gained the favor of our financiers as well as access to able and learned administrators.

nationalIdeas.name: reform_the_bureaucracy
nationalIdeas.title: Reform The Bureaucracy
nationalIdeas.desc: A growing state needs a bureaucracy capable of quickly assessing new lands. We must expand and differentiate our bureaucracy, reexamining any demands on revenue and quickly assess the demands and worth of new lands.

nationalIdeas.name: expand_maratha_navy
nationalIdeas.title: Expand Maratha Navy
nationalIdeas.desc: Westerners and Muslims cannot be allowed to dominate the Indian Ocean. We must endevour to expand our navy and create viable naval bases along our western coast.

nationalIdeas.name: expand_the_banners
nationalIdeas.title: Expand the Banners
nationalIdeas.desc: By allowing Han and Mongol peoples into the Eight Banners, a large and powerful multi-ethnic force available at the whim of the Qing Emperor is established.

nationalIdeas.name: the_green_standard_army
nationalIdeas.title: The Green Standard Army
nationalIdeas.desc: Enlist the disgruntled soldiers and officers from the Ming Army and establish the Green Standard Army to maintain control of our conquered territories.

nationalIdeas.name: pigtail_or_death
nationalIdeas.title: Pigtail or Death
nationalIdeas.desc: By executing the people who refuse to shave their hair on the front of the head and braid the rest hair into a pigtail, the Manchu superiority and dominance over all conquered people is continually shown and reminded even during the peace time, thus no one would dare to rebel against us.

nationalIdeas.name: qng_bogda_khan
nationalIdeas.title: Bogda Khan
nationalIdeas.desc: Unlike the Ming, the Qing Emperors have no qualms regarding the acculturation of 'barbarians' and actively seek to integrate them into the Empire. For instance, while known as Huangdi (Emperor) to the Han, the Qing adopt the title of Bogda Khan (wise Khan) when among the Mongols.

nationalIdeas.name: the_chinese_rules
nationalIdeas.title: Chinese Laws
nationalIdeas.desc: The Chinese way to administrate a nation is effective and worthy of study. By adopting Chinese laws and integrating the Manchu into Chinese systems, we can rule our empire more easily.

nationalIdeas.name: qing_viceroyalties
nationalIdeas.title: The Viceroyalties
nationalIdeas.desc: We have expanded the late Ming system of viceroys, which focused on protecting the northern border, into a system of eight permanent viceroys covering the majority of China. The viceroys have considerable military and civilian power in their provinces, effectively acting as the Emperor's regional governors and thereby simplifying the administrative system of the Empire.

nationalIdeas.name: the_ten_great_campaigns
nationalIdeas.title: The Ten Great Campaigns
nationalIdeas.desc: Our conquest of China has allowed those living on the fringes of the Empire to rise above their station. A series of campaigns must be led to restore order to these territories and extend the Great Qing's power over our enemies.

nationalIdeas.name: rum_abul_fath
nationalIdeas.title: Abul-Fath
nationalIdeas.desc: We have enemies in all directions, making a strong army a necessity for a state such as ours. Fortunately we are not a weak people. From the irregular Gazis and the Akinci raiders to the Sipahis of the Ottoman Empire the world have come to know the military might of the Turkish people. Let us build an army for an Empire, taking inspiration from wherever military competence can be found while also drawing from the strengths and experiences of those that came before us.

nationalIdeas.name: rum_king_of_the_east_and_west
nationalIdeas.title: Sultan al-Sharq wa al-Gharb
nationalIdeas.desc: Since the fall of Rûm the Turkish people have been divided, serving minor Beys from the bosphorus to the mountains of Kurdistan. It was our duty to restore the legacy of the Seljuk Sultans of Rûm and unite the Anatolian Turks. Our ambition however must be much higher than that. The Seljuk Turks once ruled one of the greatest empires known to man, it is evident to anyone who sees our empire that the restoration of this state is now our destiny, as is the reclamation of the Roman lands that were once ruled from what is now our heartland.

nationalIdeas.name: rum_shahanshah
nationalIdeas.title: Shahanshah
nationalIdeas.desc: Rûm was not only an Anatolian state but also one that strongly honored the Persian traditions of kingship. Especially as Persia itself fell to Mongol conquerors. Under the sultans before us Persianate culture blossomed and Persian poets and scholars found patronage. Men such as Najm al-Din Razi, Qane'i Tusi, Baha' al-Din Walad and Rumi himself made their homes under Rûm’s protection and the Sultans themselves were versed in Persian literature and poetry.\nWe must cherish our Persian legacy as well as our Turkish and aspire to make our homeland a paragon of Persianate culture, the foremost of Islamic nations.

nationalIdeas.name: rum_sultan_of_rum
nationalIdeas.title: Sultan of Rûm
nationalIdeas.desc: The Sultans of Rûm ruled over the people of Anatolia, Muslims and Christians. It was during their reign that Islam became the dominant religion in the region but their policies accepted all subjects. Often inviting even Christians from the nearby lands to seek out the domain of Rûm. We would do well to learn from their example.

nationalIdeas.name: rum_sulan_al_bahrayn
nationalIdeas.title: Sultan al-Bahrayn
nationalIdeas.desc: Like the Rûm sultans of the past we must establish a strong and durable navy that can withstand both Christian pirates and the fleets of other Muslims. The ability to control and expand over the Mediterranean and protect our coastlines is going to be one of the main challenges of our Empire.

nationalIdeas.name: rum_sultan_al_muazzam
nationalIdeas.title: al-Sultan al-Muazzam
nationalIdeas.desc: The greatest of Sultans require grand monuments and buildings. Let us make the lands of Rûm the envy of the Islamic world, with mosques, madrasas, caravanserai, gardens, canals and palaces unlike any other. Through architectural patronage we can create an enduring and unique legacy for our dynasty.

nationalIdeas.name: rum_protector_of_dar_al_islam
nationalIdeas.title: Protector of Dar al-Islam
nationalIdeas.desc: Our predecessors were always ready to defend the righteous and to combat the spread of heretical sects. So too must we do our utmost to promote the pure forms of religious worship and limit the the influence of heretical rulers who would otherwise try to seduce and mislead the faithful.

nationalIdeas.name: slo_rudohorie
nationalIdeas.title: Rudohorie
nationalIdeas.desc: From Wallonia in the west to Poland in the east able miners and metalworkers are drawn to the Slovak Ore Mountains. We must welcome this foreign talent as the development of the mining industry is the very backbone of our economy.

nationalIdeas.name: slo_universitas_istropolitana
nationalIdeas.title: Universitas Istropolitana
nationalIdeas.desc: The Carpathian region is sorely lacking in institutions of higher learning. Let us create a great Danubian university, as a sign of our newfound confidence and to avoid relying on foreign scholars, jurists and bureaucrats. Learned men will flock to our borders, not to serve us but to train a new generation of administrators for our great country.

nationalIdeas.name: slo_golden_kremnica
nationalIdeas.title: Golden Kremnica
nationalIdeas.desc: As sources of gold and silver grow scarce in continental Europe the Kremnica Mountains remain one of the foremost centers of gold production in the world. If we ensure that the great burghers of Kremnica are always provided for and that the mine and mint remain active we will find that we will never lack bullion.

nationalIdeas.name: slo_land_of_castles
nationalIdeas.title: Land of Castles
nationalIdeas.desc: Some say we have more castles per person than any other region in the world but given our many powerful neighbors who can blame us? We must be true to this legacy and never leave a border unguarded or our castles understaffed. This is surely the best way to safeguard our independence in a dangerous world!

nationalIdeas.name: slo_town_air_liberates
nationalIdeas.title: Town Air Liberates
nationalIdeas.desc: Traditionally the city leagues of the Carpathian Mountains have greedily looked after the interests of the cosmopolitan elites within. Their privileges have grown under king after king and the mining towns have become increasingly rich and arrogant. By stipulating that each league provide the state with a number of muskets, cannons and other equipment for our defense we can both nurture our growing arms industry and increase our standing army.

nationalIdeas.name: slo_literary_language
nationalIdeas.title: Slovak Literary Language
nationalIdeas.desc: In their eagerness to spread the word of reformation in our lands Protestants have begun to translate the catechism, the Bible, hymns and various pamphlets to the Slovak language. Eager to fight back Catholic communities have also begun to propagate for a Slovak written language of their own. While this religious schism looks like it will split our society for some time their determination will ensure that the Slovak language will soon be as literary as any other Slavic tongue. We must do what we can to strengthen this development for the benefit of Slovak people.

nationalIdeas.name: slo_slovak_national_awakening
nationalIdeas.title: Slovak National Awakening
nationalIdeas.desc: The Spirit of Enlightenment is sweeping across Europe. Eager to spread the light of knowledge to the Slovak people some of our greater minds are founding academies and attempting to codify the Slovak language. Having long been resigned to serve foreign masters the Slovak people is now awakening to take their place as the foremost among the Slavs of Central Europe. The time has come for a new Greater Moravian Empire!

nationalIdeas.name: rebuilding_mexico
nationalIdeas.title: Rebuilding Mexico
nationalIdeas.desc: Cortez saw to it that the temples to the pagan gods of the Aztecs were destroyed during the conquest of these lands. It falls on us to convert the ruins of temples into house of worship for God. The building materials being already present will surely make the job cheaper.

nationalIdeas.name: the_republic_of_indians
nationalIdeas.title: The Republic of Indians
nationalIdeas.desc: The Republic of Indians was the product of a systematic study of native cultures and languages. We realize that we will gain more from tolerating the cultural diversity of this land than imposing European traditions on the populace.

nationalIdeas.name: peace_by_purchase
nationalIdeas.title: Peace by Purchase
nationalIdeas.desc: The wild and untamed desert lands to the north are home to fiercely independent and militarily skilled clans. We can expend great effort, time and wealth trying to crush them with our mighty armies, but would it not be wiser to simply buy their cooperation and assimilate them peacefully?

nationalIdeas.name: casa_de_las_campanas
nationalIdeas.title: Casa de las Campanas
nationalIdeas.desc: Mexico is a land of firsts. The Casa de las Campanas was the first printing press in the New World, allowing us to spread novel ideas more easily.

nationalIdeas.name: repartimiento
nationalIdeas.title: Repartimiento
nationalIdeas.desc: Modeled on the corvée of France, the repartimiento is a scheme where we receive labor from the peasant population of Mexico. As it is part of their duty, we are able to pay them little to nothing for their work during this time period, which boosts our profits from production.

nationalIdeas.name: heroes_of_the_revolution
nationalIdeas.title: Heroes of the Revolution
nationalIdeas.desc: During our struggle for independence, our generals acquitted themselves finely on the field of battle. The shock tactics used by them in our struggle for liberty have been studied by our generals, who are now more adept in this field of warfare.

nationalIdeas.name: grito_de_delores
nationalIdeas.title: Grito de Dolores
nationalIdeas.desc: My children, will you free yourselves? Will you recover the lands stolen three hundred years ago from your forefathers by the hated Spaniards? We must act at once... Will you defend your religion and your rights as true patriots? Long live Our Lady of Guadalupe! Death to bad government! Death to the gachupines!

nationalIdeas.name: sia_royal_poets
nationalIdeas.title: Royal Poets
nationalIdeas.desc: What is the point of winning wars if there is no one to sing about it? Our court shall be a safe place for poets and our history shall be their source of inspiration.

nationalIdeas.name: sia_advanced_elephant_warfare
nationalIdeas.title: Advanced Elephant Warfare
nationalIdeas.desc: One of our greatest and oldest poems, the Yuan Phai, dedicates more than 100 lines of text to list and honour our war elephants individually. Let's show them why.

nationalIdeas.name: sia_experienced_ambassadors
nationalIdeas.title: Experienced Ambassadors
nationalIdeas.desc: We have great experience in politics and the dawn of our kingdom was characterized by rivalries between dynasties. Surely our diplomatic reputation can gain us some influence.

nationalIdeas.name: sia_encourage_immigration
nationalIdeas.title: Encourage Immigration
nationalIdeas.desc: The Khorat Plateau in the northeast of our country is fairly depopulated, we should encourage other nations to move to Siam and admire the splendor of our kingdom.

nationalIdeas.name: sia_integrating_the_realm
nationalIdeas.title: Consolidation of the State
nationalIdeas.desc: A decentralized system may cause us to lose some power in our distant provinces. If we install a Chatusadom system, we will instead have four pillars to bear the total weight of our kindgom: army, court, treasury and agriculture.

nationalIdeas.name: royal_absolutism
nationalIdeas.title: Royal Absolutism
nationalIdeas.desc: For too long Royal Power has been limited by the foolish interventions by the nobility, whose narrow local interests are threatening the greater good of the realm. We will dissolve the Cortes and rule without their interference.

nationalIdeas.name: sia_education_reform
nationalIdeas.title: Education Reforms
nationalIdeas.desc: As our Lord Buddha said, we shall not accept something because it is often said, but we need to experience it ourselves. Education is the base of knowledge and if we want to excell at technology we need to excell at education.

nationalIdeas.name: mva_margraviate
nationalIdeas.title: Margraviate of Moravia
nationalIdeas.desc: The Margraviate of Moravia and the privileges of the Moravian diet date back to the 12th century. This title gives us great influence in the region as kings or even emperors have competed for the good will of the Moravian estates for centuries.

nationalIdeas.name: mva_religious_refuge
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Sanctuary
nationalIdeas.desc: When the lands of the Bohemian crown got overrun by the Hussite heresy we opened our arms to the Catholic refugees and we should strive to shelter anyone haunted by such religious persecution.

nationalIdeas.name: mva_cities_of_moravia
nationalIdeas.title: Cities of Moravia
nationalIdeas.desc: Moravia is a rich land on the crossroads between Bohemia and Austria. This has allowed our burghers to thrive and both Brno and Olomouc have become influential trading centers in their own right. We must do what we can to make the most of this strategic position, and to strengthen the interests of our burghers and artisans.

nationalIdeas.name: mva_land_of_vinyards
nationalIdeas.title: Land of Vineyards
nationalIdeas.desc: For over a thousand years the hills of Moravia have been used to produce our famous wines. We must continue to protect our vineyards and to promote Moravian wine to our neighbors.

nationalIdeas.name: mva_german_quarters
nationalIdeas.title: German Quarters
nationalIdeas.desc: Our proximity to the German regions has led to a long history of close cooperation and integration with the German political and economic sphere. There is hardly any major Moravian city that does not have a German quarter.

nationalIdeas.name: mva_jesuit_university
nationalIdeas.title: Jesuit University
nationalIdeas.desc: The Jesuits do admirable work for the counter-reformation and are in many ways at the forefront of education and the crafting of theological arguments. Let us invite the Jesuits to start seminars and create universities within our lands.

nationalIdeas.name: mva_legacy_of_great_moravia
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of Great Moravia
nationalIdeas.desc: Centuries ago, long before the current powers that now dominate Europe, this region was all subdued by Great Moravia. We must cherish this legacy and build a new empire for the Moravian people.

nationalIdeas.name: rzw_legacy_of_zimbabwe
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of Zimbabwe
nationalIdeas.desc: With the fall of Great Zimbabwe many traditions and customs have been lost. The Mutapa has built a new kind of state, independent of the age old legacy of these lands. Our people on the other hand have chosen to cling to old traditions, we still construct stone buildings that leave outsiders in awe and we still cherish that which once was.

nationalIdeas.name: rzw_strict_gold_regulations
nationalIdeas.title: Strict Gold Trade Regulations
nationalIdeas.desc: Agriculture and trade bring us what we need for our day-to-day living but the main export of our country remains the abundant gold which can be found all over the Zimbabwe plateau. While such riches are a blessing to our state this metal can also be quite dangerous unless it is kept under firm control. Our state must tightly regulate all trade and ownership of Gold in order to avoid the destructive influences of fortune seekers or greedy middle men.

nationalIdeas.name: rzw_empowering_the_rozwi
nationalIdeas.title: Empowering the Rozwi
nationalIdeas.desc: A powerful faction has begun to grow in our lands, showing a strong loyalty to their leader and dissatisfaction with their lot in life in the Zimbabwe plateau. The Rozwi, or 'destroyers', are disciplined fighters ready to unify the Shona peoples and create a new type of state. If we do not embrace them we may well find ourselves overrun against our will.

nationalIdeas.name: rzw_hierarchical_tax_organization
nationalIdeas.title: Hierarchical Tax Organization
nationalIdeas.desc: The Mutapa entrusted each subordinate chief to bring his taxes to their capital. We cannot imagine a more inefficient custom. Let us instead create a consistent system of hierarchical tax collection where each person will pass the riches on upwards towards the state coffers in an organized and efficient way. The army must also at times work as an arm of the royal bureaucracy to ensure that none of our subjects forget what we are owed.

nationalIdeas.name: rzw_discipline_and_traning
nationalIdeas.title: Regular Training
nationalIdeas.desc: Discipline, preparation and training are what win battles. With this in mind our commanders have successfully begun to pioneer elaborate new tactics and a new army organization. Let us make good use of these innovations by dividing our warriors into regiments and then let them train regularly with their bows, assegais, daggers and axes. Practice will also allow them to fight in formation without fear, defeating much more numerous enemies.

nationalIdeas.name: rzw_mwari_cult
nationalIdeas.title: Monotheistic Worship
nationalIdeas.desc: Our superstitious neighbors believe they are protected by natural deities or their own ancestors. We have on the other hand seen the greatness of Mwari, the one god who created the world from nothing. As he speaks the mountains tremble and our ruler is his oracle. Let us spread the cult of Mwari among all peoples so that all may see the divine authority of our ruler.

nationalIdeas.name: rzw_vashambadzi
nationalIdeas.title: Vashambadzi
nationalIdeas.desc: The growing intracontinental trade, with goods flowing back and forth from the central parts of the Kongo river basin to the trade cities of Eastern Africa, the Great Lakes and the Zimbabwe highlands has greatly enriched the Vashambadzi, our native merchant community. Let us support this group over all others by baring Swahili traders as well as European fortune seekers from trading within our borders.

nationalIdeas.name: han_niedersachsicher_reichskreis
nationalIdeas.title: Niedersächsicher Reichskreis
nationalIdeas.desc: The Lower Saxon Circle administrates and coordinates the states in our part of the Holy Roman Empire. By working within it we can unite the princes against outside threats, while we also strengthen our own grip over the rich Lower Saxon lands.

nationalIdeas.name: han_weser_renaissance
nationalIdeas.title: Weser Renaissance
nationalIdeas.desc: Our region is wealthy and many have money to spend on great buildings and works of art. Along the entire river Weser we are seeing beautiful castles built in the new architecture of our era. We must embrace the Weser renaissance and create great buildings to overshadow those of our lessers.

nationalIdeas.name: han_shutzenfest
nationalIdeas.title: Schützenfest
nationalIdeas.desc: Hanover has great need of talented men to protect and expand our domains. Let us hold annual fairs to identify the most skilled marksmen in our lands. This way we can ensure both the income of our local merchants and a good supply of recruits at once.

nationalIdeas.name: han_herrenhausen_gardens
nationalIdeas.title: Herrenhausen Gardens
nationalIdeas.desc: A great state like ours deserves a great capital. The gardens of the Herrenhausen castle, in Hanover, are already famous. Let us expand and build them up to be a truly unique wonder of our great capital, one that will attract curious travellers from near and far.

nationalIdeas.name: han_strengthen_the_meiertum
nationalIdeas.title: Strengthen the Meiertum
nationalIdeas.desc: Hanover has always had a strong class of wealthy farmers to keep the nobility in check. The Hanoverian ‘Meiers’ have over time come to extend their rights to control the land to the brink of making them hereditary. Let us take this final step and profit from allowing the Meiers to thrive.

nationalIdeas.name: han_hanoverian_chancery
nationalIdeas.title: Hanoverian Chancery
nationalIdeas.desc: Our international ties have led to us having a constant presence in foreign capitals. We should create a permanent institution to handle our embassies in the capitals of other states to improve both the ability and efficiency of our diplomats.

nationalIdeas.name: han_kings_legion
nationalIdeas.title: King’s Legion
nationalIdeas.desc: In the past our armies have suffered scathing defeats at the hands of both Prussian and French soldiers. We must build a new and stronger army, determined to restore the glory of Hanover and to learn from past mistakes.

nationalIdeas.name: lfa_free_elections
nationalIdeas.title: Free Elections
nationalIdeas.desc: Every man in our nation should be granted a share of our government. The treacherous ways of plutocracy have no place here.

nationalIdeas.name: lfa_mining_syndicates
nationalIdeas.title: Mining Syndicates
nationalIdeas.desc: Children of the Earth, rise! We must group together against the monetary tyranny that surrounds our world. The interests of the people must be placed ahead of the interests of the elites.

nationalIdeas.name: lfa_careful_diplomacy
nationalIdeas.title: Careful Diplomacy
nationalIdeas.desc: Other nations may be suspicious of our unparalleled democratic success. We should keep a low profile while still making sure that democracy always wins.

nationalIdeas.name: lfa_national_militia
nationalIdeas.title: National Militia
nationalIdeas.desc: Children of the gunpowder, rise, rise again! A national militia must be created in order to protect us from the enemies of our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: lfa_integrate_local_communities
nationalIdeas.title: Integrate Local Communities
nationalIdeas.desc: There shall be no differences between a man and his neighbour. Cultural dissimilarities make us richer, not poorer. Lanfang is a safe space for every working person.

nationalIdeas.name: lfa_improved_mining_techniques
nationalIdeas.title: Improved Mining Techniques
nationalIdeas.desc: A nation's wealth is measured by the wealth of its people. Lanfang should be making the most of what the Earth has given to us. Improving our mining technology will also improve our working conditions.

nationalIdeas.name: lfa_state_expansion
nationalIdeas.title: Expansion of the State
nationalIdeas.desc: Lanfang has become the proof that equality and freedom are the key to a happy and prosperous nation. We shall spread out this knowledge to the rest of the world and liberate them from the bonds of slavery!

nationalIdeas.name: gzi_stone_masonry
nationalIdeas.title: Stone Masonry
nationalIdeas.desc: Zimbabwe has always been famous for its masonry techniques, coming from the ancient Kingdom of Mapungubwe. Our masons are unmatched.

nationalIdeas.name: gzi_ivory_trade
nationalIdeas.title: Ivory Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: Our nation is rich in elephants and ivory, and there's a long tradition of ivory trade through our area.

nationalIdeas.name: gzi_gold_deposits
nationalIdeas.title: Gold Deposits
nationalIdeas.desc: We have a lot of gold deposits in our country waiting to be mined. We can get a lot of wealth from them if we exploit them.

nationalIdeas.name: gzi_zimbabwes_walls
nationalIdeas.title: Zimbabwe's Walls
nationalIdeas.desc: The massive walls of our cities are a testimony to our strength, and a serious deterrent to any that would dare try to conquer it.

nationalIdeas.name: gzi_lay_of_the_land
nationalIdeas.title: Lay of the Land
nationalIdeas.desc: Our lands have always been a source of mystery for our neighbors. We are the only ones that really know them, and we can use it to our advantage.

nationalIdeas.name: gzi_tributary_system
nationalIdeas.title: Tributary System
nationalIdeas.desc: Zimbabwe has always had a tradition of having a lot of small countries paying tribute to it. It is a great way to increase our own wealth.

nationalIdeas.name: gzi_zimbabwe_birds
nationalIdeas.title: Zimbabwe Birds
nationalIdeas.desc: The stone birds produced by our artisans are famous all around, and nobody is able to replicate their quality and beauty.

nationalIdeas.name: lae_emperor_constantinople
nationalIdeas.title: Emperor of Constantinople
nationalIdeas.desc: Constantinople is once again the capital of a reborn Latin Empire, from where it will expand and exercise its authority.

nationalIdeas.name: lae_latin_patriarch
nationalIdeas.title: Latin Patriarch
nationalIdeas.desc: The Patriarchs are the four metropolitan bishops of the Eastern Mediterranean, and the Latin one of Constantinople claims to establish his authority over the region.

nationalIdeas.name: lae_byzantine_bureaucracy
nationalIdeas.title: Byzantine Bureaucracy
nationalIdeas.desc: The Byzantine Empire inherited a long tradition of an established administration that has been operating for a millennium. It would be a good idea to use that bureaucracy at the service of the reborn Latin Empire.

nationalIdeas.name: lae_guilds_pera
nationalIdeas.title: Trading Guilds of Pera
nationalIdeas.desc: A colony of Italian merchants establishes themselves in Constantinople, with their headquarters in the town of Pera, on the other side of the Golden Horn.

nationalIdeas.name: epi_latin_knights
nationalIdeas.title: Latin Knights
nationalIdeas.desc: The elite of our army remains the cavalrymen armed and trained in the Western style. Some are native Greeks, others are Italian mercenaries, but all are effective at what they do.

nationalIdeas.name: lae_partitio_graeci
nationalIdeas.title: Partitio Graeci
nationalIdeas.desc: Efforts to reclaim lands from schismatic Greeks to Roman Catholicism is the top priority of the Latin emperors.

nationalIdeas.name: lae_frankokratia
nationalIdeas.title: Frankokratia
nationalIdeas.desc: 'Frank' is the generic term that encompasses all the countries of Western and Central Europe, which are the main diplomatic and military support of the Latin Empire.

nationalIdeas.name: settle_the_islands
nationalIdeas.title: Settle the Islands
nationalIdeas.desc: The other islands of this archipelago need to feel the benefit of enlightened Muslim rule as well. By settling them, we get access to their rich goods and they get access to the words of the Prophet. What could be fairer?

nationalIdeas.name: msa_advanced_galley_warfare
nationalIdeas.title: Advanced Galley Warfare
nationalIdeas.desc: Ours has always been a nation of seafarers, and the benefits of progress have finally arrived to our ships. This new technology should help us to be seen as a serious threat.

nationalIdeas.name: msa_expert_haggling
nationalIdeas.title: Expert Hagglers
nationalIdeas.desc: Our merchant culture has made the Malayan people exceedingly good at trade. We can surely take advantage of our neighbours.

nationalIdeas.name: msa_chart_the_seas
nationalIdeas.title: Chart the Isles
nationalIdeas.desc: You cannot conquer what you cannot see. In order to become the lighthouse of the Malay archipelago we need to know where the crags are.

nationalIdeas.name: msa_in_every_port
nationalIdeas.title: Malay Merchants in Every Port
nationalIdeas.desc: Every coin that goes into the ocean must come back to us.

nationalIdeas.name: msa_sea_nomads_steering
nationalIdeas.title: Agreements with the Sea Nomads
nationalIdeas.desc: We know the seas and the seas know us. The tides have always gone easy on our people and the Sea Nomads have learned to respect that or, at least, fear it. They will be helping us ensure that our trade arrives.

nationalIdeas.name: msa_spice_kings
nationalIdeas.title: Spice Kings
nationalIdeas.desc: Our spice trade history goes back as far as 1500 BC, being part of the Maritime Silk Road is one of our greatest prides. There is no land impossible to reach.

nationalIdeas.name: nag_unite_gonds_and_garjats
nationalIdeas.title: Unite the Gonds and Garjats
nationalIdeas.desc: The fractured tribes of Gonds and Garjats that inhabit Central India must be united under our rule. Old feuds and squabbles must be put to an end so that we can achieve our common goals.

nationalIdeas.name: nag_harsh_terrain
nationalIdeas.title: Exploit Harsh Terrain
nationalIdeas.desc: Much of our land is difficult for armies to traverse, much less to do battle on. Our own warriors have known this region for centuries and know how to exploit it to their advantage.

nationalIdeas.name: nag_send_for_artisans
nationalIdeas.title: Send for Artisans
nationalIdeas.desc: Nagpur is a new city, a new Kingdom. We must send for artisans and architects from all corners of India to develop our palaces, our infrastructure, and our temples to put Nagpur on the map.

nationalIdeas.name: nag_invite_maratha_warriors
nationalIdeas.title: Invite Maratha Warriors
nationalIdeas.desc: Maratha warriors have erupted out of their homelands in Maharashtra. Many of their generals offer their services and their armies to rulers they deem worthy. We should court these generals to attract a new military caste into our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: nag_light_cav
nationalIdeas.title: Light Cavalry Shock Tactics
nationalIdeas.desc: Heavy cavalry and cumbersome cannon make up a large portion of many Indian armies. By employing regiments of light cavalry, we can easily outflank and outrun our enemies, causing great damage where they least expect it.

nationalIdeas.name: nag_cultivating_the_forest
nationalIdeas.title: Cultivating the Forest
nationalIdeas.desc: The dense forests of Central India are not exactly renowned for their fertile farmlands. We must nevertheless ensure that we are able to grow enough food and extract enough wealth from our lands. It is time to begin clearing the forest to make room for our expansion.

nationalIdeas.name: nag_no_cb_best_cb
nationalIdeas.title: Unjustified Expansion
nationalIdeas.desc: Our enemies are weak and we are strong. They control rich lands that we desire for ourselves. What more reason should we need to take all that they have?

nationalIdeas.name: buk_jochid_patrimony
nationalIdeas.title: Jochid Patrimony
nationalIdeas.desc: The Shaybanid rulers of Bukhara were all descended from Shayban, fifth son of Jochi, the eldest son of Genghis Khan himself. After the extinction of the lines of both Batu Khan and Orda Khan in the 13th century, the Shaybanid Khans declared themselves the sole legitimate heirs of all the Jochid lands, which have hence been occupied by the Timurid pretenders.

nationalIdeas.name: buk_naqshbandi_patronage
nationalIdeas.title: Naqshbandi Patronage
nationalIdeas.desc: Bukhara was the birthplace of both Baha-ud-Din Naqshband Bukhari and the eponymous Naqshbandi Order of Sufis that he is credited as the founder of. Following his death, the rulers of Bukhara built an elaborate necropolis complex for Baha-ud-Din, who is seen as their spiritual patron, and continue to support a mosque and madrasa on the grounds. The Naqshbandi quickly grew to be one of the largest and most influential Sufi orders, becoming the dominant Sufi sect in Central Asia, China, and India, which makes the tomb of their founding saint a popular pilgrimage site.

nationalIdeas.name: buk_mahalla_schools
nationalIdeas.title: Mahalla Schools
nationalIdeas.desc: Similar to the Christian parish, a mahalla is an administrative division structured around a Mosque and the community it serves. The Shaybanid Khans of Bukhara used the already existing infrastructure of urban mahallas to establish public schools for educating the children of commoners. Those who show promise are further educated at madrasas in a full curriculum of Persian poetry and literature, music, arithmetic, logic, theology, fiqh, and science. Expanding literacy can only lead to an enormous growth in scholarly output.

nationalIdeas.name: buk_the_jews_of_bukhara
nationalIdeas.title: The Jews of Bukhara
nationalIdeas.desc: Home to a sizeable Persian-speaking Jewish population since at least the 5th century, Bukhara and Samarkand host a vibrant community of Jewish traders and artisans that have thrived in their position along the main branch of the Silk Road. They play an integral role in Bukhara and Samarkand's trade and commerce, loosening prohibitions on the Dhimmi and allowing them to build their own synagogues and trade without onerous restrictions would only serve to help us prosper.

nationalIdeas.name: buk_the_ark
nationalIdeas.title: The Ark
nationalIdeas.desc: Part fortress, part palace, part town in its own right, the Ark of Bukhara is a massive citadel at the edge of the city. Legend holds that it was constructed by Siyavash, one of the legendary heroes of the Persian epic poem Shahnameh, the Book of Kings. Under its walls lay a foundation of stone twenty meters deep, the ruins of previous walls that failed to withstand the ardours of conquest. Within its walls there is a large complex of buildings, including a library that is the envy of all Persianate scholars, at one point hosting the likes of Rudaki, Ferdowsi, Avicenna, Farabi, and Khayyam.

nationalIdeas.name: buk_the_tower_of_death
nationalIdeas.title: The Tower of Death
nationalIdeas.desc: The towering minaret of the Po-i-Kalyan mosque was spared from the same distruction the original mosque faced at the hands of Genghis Khan due to its impressive stature. While new mosques have been built around it, it has became known as the Tower of Death due to its use as an instrument of execution. While it is primarily used to issue the call to prayer, and occasionally as a watchtower for the nearby citadel, it also serves as a constant towering reminder of the Khan's unflinching justice.

nationalIdeas.name: french_men_of_trade
nationalIdeas.title: Men of Trade
nationalIdeas.desc: It has always been known to the French kings that men from the provinces are best suited to dictate the trade policies of the kingdom as our people are masters in the art of trade. France is ideally located, at the crossroad of the Atlantic and the Mediterranean, between England and the Italian cities as well as Germany and the Iberian Peninsula. The wealth of the world flows through our lands!

nationalIdeas.name: french_renaissance_palaces
nationalIdeas.title: Renaissance Palaces
nationalIdeas.desc: Our ancestors used to protect themselves in heavily fortified castles. With the coming of the renaissance, however, prestige and power no longer relies on such fortresses. Let us instead build magnificently decorated palaces to show our prosperity and splendor to other Frenchmen and foreigners alike.

nationalIdeas.name: french_qui_ruit_et_lethum
nationalIdeas.title: Qui Ruit Et Lethum
nationalIdeas.desc: From the wet areas of England to the dry regions of the Holy Land our knightly ancestors fought valiantly from horseback. Had they seen us today they might make fun of our ruffs and laces yet underneath this magnificent varnish we still exert the 'furor gallicus' and none can resist us on the battlefield!\nLet our musketmen be to the modern battlefield what the French Knights were to the medieval wars. All shall fear the might of our armies!

nationalIdeas.name: french_religious_conviction
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Conviction
nationalIdeas.desc: Our people have always believed in standing strong for their cause. When the French people's opinion is set nobody can hinder us from expressing it. Whether we side with the pope or against hem we must remain firm in our convictions!

nationalIdeas.name: french_cuisine
nationalIdeas.title: French Cuisine
nationalIdeas.desc: France is to many known as the land of good cooking. Every province is famed for its wines, dishes, cheeses and cakes and it is a proven proverb here that good food builds good character. As our region is home to some of the most delicious food its reputation goes beyond that of many of the other areas of France. We must cherish and guard our culinary traditions and strengthen our regional identity.

nationalIdeas.name: french_enlightenment
nationalIdeas.title: French Enlightenment
nationalIdeas.desc: French culture and French language is the carrier of the ideas of the modern age. As the enlightenment spreads from court to court so does the respect for all things French. It would be wrong, however, to presume that this is strictly a spread of Parisian ideas and values. As French becomes the language of all courts, books and plays our influence spreads worldwide with it.

nationalIdeas.name: french_la_petite_nation
nationalIdeas.title: La Petite Nation
nationalIdeas.desc: The foreigners always speak of France as the country with one king. This well may be true but this does not mean in any way that the king is alone to undertake anything positive for our fellow Frenchmen. The French provinces have a life of their own, and be it under the royal authority or in a more autonomous way they are able to produce strong men and beautiful wives, great philosopher, artists and learned men. Paris matters little to us in day-to-day matters. We must stand up for our own people for we are the true Frenchmen and without us the French region would be both weaker and blander.

nationalIdeas.name: vajrayana_buddhism
nationalIdeas.title: Vajrayana Buddhism
nationalIdeas.desc: Our people are united in our own unique view of the world represented through our Thunderbolt form of Buddhism. It guides our very governance and daily life in familiar and expected patterns for the lowest serf to the highest lama.

nationalIdeas.name: bon_influence
nationalIdeas.title: Bön Influence.
nationalIdeas.desc: The vestiges of the original and indigenous Bön faith still hold sway in Tibet, both competing with and merging with the Vajrayana way of Buddhism. The divine presences or Bön deities are incorporated into the very construction of the people's homes making them in effect a castle (dzongka) against the malevolent forces outside it. The fierce and inspiring Gods, Elementals, Demons, and Spirits are quite a contrast to the serene Buddha.

nationalIdeas.name: yaks
nationalIdeas.title: Yaks!
nationalIdeas.desc: Domesticated yaks have been kept for thousands of years by our people, cultivating and improving our knowledge of their breeding will only make them more useful. In addition to pulling plows and being able to ride them, they give us their milk, fibre and meat, and carry a heavy load through deep snow. Their dried droppings are an important fuel, used all over Tibet, and is often the only fuel available on the high treeless Tibetan Plateau. Their butter is an ingredient of the butter tea that Tibetans consume in large quantities, and is also used in lamps and made into butter sculptures used in religious festivities. Their use is ever expanding with our knowledge and ingenuity.

nationalIdeas.name: way_of_virtue
nationalIdeas.title: The Way of Virtue
nationalIdeas.desc: Dgelugspa, also known as the Yellow Hat sect, is a school of Vajrayana Buddhism focusing on principles of universal compassion as the fundamental spiritual orientation. Founded in the late 14th century, the Dgelugspa became the pre-eminent Buddhist school in Tibet since the end of the 16th century.

nationalIdeas.name: potala_palace
nationalIdeas.title: Potala Palace
nationalIdeas.desc: Construction of the Potala Palace began in 1645, under the direction of Lozang Gyatso, the Great Fifth Dalai Lama. Rising a thousand feet above the valley floor in Lhasa, with stone walls that measure sixteen feet thick at the base, this fortified palace commands an impressive place. Within its thirteen stories, this center of government has over 1,000 rooms, 10,000 shrines and 200,000 statues.

nationalIdeas.name: way_of_ancients
nationalIdeas.title: The Way of the Ancients
nationalIdeas.desc: Nyingma, also known as the School of the Ancient Translations is the oldest school of Vajrayana Buddhism, incorporating mysticism and local deities shared by the pre-Buddhist Bön religion. Historically, the Nyingma tradition is unique amongst the schools in that its supporters never held political power, and therefore its practitioners were mostly removed from the political machinations of Tibet, focusing on austerity, celibacy and mysticism. Their presence, however, cultivates discipline in our society and keeps us attuned to our roots.

nationalIdeas.name: pale_earth
nationalIdeas.title: The Pale Earth School
nationalIdeas.desc: The Pale Earth, or Sakya School of Vajrayana Buddhism, derives its name from the unique grey landscape of Ponpori Hills in southern Tibet near Shigatse, where Sakya Monastery, the first monastery of this tradition was built by Khon Konchog Gyalpo (1034–1102) in 1073. The Sakya tradition was founded in the late 11th century by Drogmi, a famous scholar and translator who had studied at Vikramashila University in India. This school is known for its studious and academic bent and its colleges produce Tibet's most inquisitive minds.

nationalIdeas.name: kit_legacy_of_the_gods
nationalIdeas.title: Legacy of the Gods
nationalIdeas.desc: It is known that our ruler is a direct descendent of the Gods. As such, there can be no doubt about our divine right to rule.

nationalIdeas.name: kit_empire_of_the_light
nationalIdeas.title: Empire of the Light
nationalIdeas.desc: We are the Empire of the Sun, the Empire of the Moon, the Empire of the Light. We shall shine our light over all.

nationalIdeas.name: kit_memory_of_aksum
nationalIdeas.title: Memory of Aksum
nationalIdeas.desc: When the ancient empire of Aksum fell, we rose, but we still keep some of its memory alive, so as not to fall ourselves.

nationalIdeas.name: kit_lakes_dominance
nationalIdeas.title: Lakes Dominance
nationalIdeas.desc: All the areas around the lakes rightfully belong to us, and nobody can argue against it.

nationalIdeas.name: kit_bachwezi_earthworks
nationalIdeas.title: Bachwezi Earthworks
nationalIdeas.desc: The Bachwezi have always been masters of earthwork construction, our building techniques are envied by all our neighbors.

nationalIdeas.name: kit_nile_conquest
nationalIdeas.title: Nile Conquest
nationalIdeas.desc: The Nile valley shall be ours, as it once already was, and nobody should be able to dispute that fact.

nationalIdeas.name: kit_rich_history
nationalIdeas.title: Rich History
nationalIdeas.desc: Our history and legends are rich, and for sure anyone that hears them will be convinced that ours is the nation destined to rule.

nationalIdeas.name: sic_university_of_catania
nationalIdeas.title: University of Catania
nationalIdeas.desc: Founded in 1434, the University of Catania is the oldest and most prestigious university in Sicily. We must encourage its growth to ensure that it draws leading scholars from across Italy and helps us unearth talent to aid our administration.

nationalIdeas.name: sic_constitions_of_melfi
nationalIdeas.title: Constitutions of Melfi
nationalIdeas.desc: Emperor Frederick II, the Hohenstaufen King of Sicily, drafted a legal code for Sicily known as the Consitutions of Melfi, or Liber Augustalis. Still in use centuries later, it represents a solid foundation for the governance of our state, regulating public law, judicial procedure and feudal, private and penal law.

nationalIdeas.name: sic_noble_admirals
nationalIdeas.title: Noble Admirals
nationalIdeas.desc: In most nations, sons of noblemen tend to pursue a career in the army. However, as an island nation, members of our nobility are naturally drawn to the high seas - a career path that could be most beneficial to us, allowing us to secure our independence through naval superiority.

nationalIdeas.name: sic_greater_sicily
nationalIdeas.title: Greater Sicily
nationalIdeas.desc: The fates of Sicily and Naples have often been bound together. If we can restore unity to the Two Sicilies, who is to say that our territorial ambitions should stop there?

nationalIdeas.name: sic_trade_fleet
nationalIdeas.title: Sicilian Trade Fleets
nationalIdeas.desc: Although the trade volumes flowing across the Atlantic have overtaken those of the Mediterranean, there is nonetheless considerable wealth to be had from commerce. With a powerful trade fleet, we will be able to... "persuade" merchants to visit our ports and funnel the riches that flow from North Africa to Europe into our own coffers.

nationalIdeas.name: sic_grand_navy
nationalIdeas.title: The Grand Navy
nationalIdeas.desc: The largest island in the Mediterranean should also be home to its largest fleet. We shall make of our navy a grand fleet feared by our enemies far and wide!

nationalIdeas.name: sic_sicilian_silk
nationalIdeas.title: Sicilian Silk
nationalIdeas.desc: In the time of Frederick II, silk was Sicily's major export. Although our silk industry has declined in the intervening centuries, Sicily's produce having been outstripped by that of the northern Italian states, there is no reason why it should not rise again. By investing in our silk production, we can see our weavers and craftsmen flourish anew.

nationalIdeas.name: birthplace_of_the_renaissance
nationalIdeas.title: Birthplace of the Renaissance
nationalIdeas.desc: Florence has long been the cultural capital of Tuscany. With the renewed interest in the classical world a clever Prince may attract the new thinkers to benefit us all.

nationalIdeas.name: tuscan_condottieri
nationalIdeas.title: Condottieri
nationalIdeas.desc: The strife between city states has given rise to mercenary companies. Let us ensure they know our purse is full and encourage their presence in times of need.

nationalIdeas.name: tuscan_banking
nationalIdeas.title: Tuscan Banking
nationalIdeas.desc: From England to Naples, all know of our bankers. Our golden Florin has financed everything from the Hundred Years' War to new industries.

nationalIdeas.name: tuscan_arts
nationalIdeas.title: Patron of the Arts
nationalIdeas.desc: With the abolishment of the republic and introduction of the hereditary Duchy we must show the glory of Tuscany. Many great works shall be commissioned to the glory of God and the Duke.

nationalIdeas.name: porto_franco
nationalIdeas.title: Porto Franco
nationalIdeas.desc: In order to attract more trade we have declared the port of Livorno a free port. There shall be no duties on goods traded here and the inhabitants may worship as they wish.

nationalIdeas.name: tuscan_administrative_reforms
nationalIdeas.title: Administrative Reforms
nationalIdeas.desc: To cement our religious liberties and reform our administration we shall no longer permit clergy in our civic administration.

nationalIdeas.name: tuscan_grand_duchy
nationalIdeas.title: Territorial Ambition
nationalIdeas.desc: The Holy Father himself has declared his support of our territorial ambitions. To unite the regions of central Italy we shall have to raise standing armies of our own commoners.

nationalIdeas.name: plc_prosperous_folwarks
nationalIdeas.title: The Folwark System
nationalIdeas.desc: A nobleman's landholding in the Commonwealth is usually comprised of what we call a folwark. It is a large farm worked by various serfs to produce surpluses for trade that is both internal and external. So long as we can keep this system functional and perhaps reform the laws surrounding it over time, the folwark system will continue to contribute great amounts to our trade routes and our stockpiles.

nationalIdeas.name: pol_jagiellonian_university
nationalIdeas.title: Jagiellonian University
nationalIdeas.desc: Established in 1364, Krakow's Jagiellonian University is perhaps one of the greatest places in all of Europe! It has brought in, taught, and cultivated a variety of philosophical and scientific minds the likes of which Europe could almost never live without, let alone the Polish and Lithuanian people. Going forth, Jagiellonian University will continue to be one of the brightest points in our grand Commonwealth.

nationalIdeas.name: plc_the_obrona_potoczna
nationalIdeas.title: Obrona Potoczna
nationalIdeas.desc: What we term a 'continuous defense' is really a standing army that is paid for by the monarch from their own pocket. They are stationed traditionally in troubled areas or places where the border with a neighbor is not clearly defined so that Commonwealth interests are not intruded upon. Over time, this military sector of ours is going to yield for us highly trained soldiers and skilled generals who know just how to deal with enemies of all types, whether they're of Polish, Lithuanian, Ukranian, or foreign descent.

nationalIdeas.name: winged_hussars
nationalIdeas.title: Winged Hussars
nationalIdeas.desc: The hussars were originally light cavalry troops used for scouting, but with the decline of the old feudal army we have switched over to professional regiments. The new heavier hussars will form the core of it. People will soon fear Poland's winged Hussars.

nationalIdeas.name: plc_refine_our_golden_liberty
nationalIdeas.title: Refinement of Golden Liberty
nationalIdeas.desc: Our political doctrine: 'Our State is a republic under the presidency of the king'. It is by this statement that we abide by and the following aspects: having an election of a king by all nobles, a Sejm, a Pacta Conventa, religious freedom, legal right to rebel against a king who has violated guaranteed freedoms, liberum veto, and forming an organization to force a common political aim. By keeping these aspects of our republic enshrined and also refining them with new laws and legislation as we go forth, the Commonwealth will never become outdated nor stagnant in its politics.

nationalIdeas.name: pol_royal_guards
nationalIdeas.title: The Polish Royal Guards
nationalIdeas.desc: Responsibly directly for the protection of the monarch and his family, the Polish Royal Guards are set to be the peak of Commonwealth power. Fitted with the best equipment we can obtain and trained in a variety of methods throughout their lives, the Polish Royal Guards will only embolden and harden our military in the future, especially our infantry, all whilst keeping the monarch and his family safe from harm.

nationalIdeas.name: plc_tempered_by_neighbors
nationalIdeas.title: Tempered by Neighbors
nationalIdeas.desc: All around us there is conflict. Swedish people? Baltic conflicts. Hungarians? Border disputes. Teutons? Old grudges and lusts for land. Russians? Ambition for land on both sides. Time and time again we have been tested in combat since our borders in the east and west are hard to define beyond a hand-drawn map, but these times of war did not break down the Polish and Lithuanian people, it only made them stronger.

nationalIdeas.name: amsterdam_wisselbank
nationalIdeas.title: Found the Amsterdam Wisselbank
nationalIdeas.desc: The problem with metal coinage was that it was virtually impossible to make coins of equal weight at all mints. This makes moving wealth around, the life blood of trade, difficult. The Wisselbank traded metal money for Amsterdam paper money that had to be used in the city for bills over 600 guilders. This created a medium of exchange that everyone could be confident in the value of, facilitating exchange.

nationalIdeas.name: dutch_trading_spirit
nationalIdeas.title: Dutch Trading Spirit
nationalIdeas.desc: Seeking your fortune over the sea is as natural to a Dutchman as burning a witch is to a Spaniard. We have no shortage of hardy souls ready to seek their fortune in trade.

nationalIdeas.name: polders
nationalIdeas.title: Polders
nationalIdeas.desc: The low countries are highly susceptible to flooding and in the unsettled weather of the 11th - 14th centuries there were multiple floods leading to the creation of the Zuiderzee and also salting the soil of coastal areas. We now have the technology to reclaim land allowing more productive agriculture.

nationalIdeas.name: instructie_voor_de_admiraliteiten
nationalIdeas.title: Instructie voor de Admiraliteiten
nationalIdeas.desc: 'This day begins a long list of naval victories, which will make our fatherland for ever illustrious'

nationalIdeas.name: embrace_humanism
nationalIdeas.title: Embrace Humanism
nationalIdeas.desc: Ever since the great philosopher Erasmus, the Low Countries have been the cradle of humanistic philosophy. It is time to embrace this as an integral part of the state.

nationalIdeas.name: army_sappers
nationalIdeas.title: Army Sappers
nationalIdeas.desc: Back in the good old days siege works were dug by locals impressed into service, these people were not always keen to do this work. By making digging such trenches the job of the army we get better trenches, quicker.

nationalIdeas.name: platoon_fire
nationalIdeas.title: Platoon Fire
nationalIdeas.desc: Standard volley fire involved each rank delivering its volley in one go, with the goal of maximizing the firepower. The Dutch developed a different system of firing by platoon, the goal being that one part of the regiment will always be firing at the enemy. This prevented the enemy from recovering from the volleys.

nationalIdeas.name: gma_reforge_moravias_hegemony
nationalIdeas.title: Reforge Moravia's Hegemony
nationalIdeas.desc: Long before the current powers of Europe even came into existence, our ancestors had forged a mighty realm stretching from Lusatia to the plains of Pannonia. As its true successors, it is our birthright to restore Moravia's hegemony over Central Europe.

nationalIdeas.name: gma_apostles_to_the_slavs
nationalIdeas.title: Apostles to the Slavs
nationalIdeas.desc: In order to spread Christianity to his subjects, Rostislav of Moravia sent a letter to the Byzantines, who have in turn sent teachers that were tasked with spreading Christianity. Thanks to this holy mission, Moravia became the first Slavic nation to officially adopt Christianity, leading to the development of the first Slavic script ever, and even the recognition of Slavonic as the fourth liturgical language by the Holy See.

nationalIdeas.name: gma_princes_of_nitra_kings_of_moravia
nationalIdeas.title: Princes of Nitra, Kings of Moravia
nationalIdeas.desc: According to the ancient tradition, the rulers of Moravia governed the Principality of Nitra before ascending the throne in Veligrad. This ensured that by the time they took over the country, they already had sufficient skills in statecraft and administration.

nationalIdeas.name: gma_rebuild_veligrad
nationalIdeas.title: Rebuild Veligrad
nationalIdeas.desc: Veligrad was the mighty capital of Great Moravia, but it fell victim to the Magyar raids following the collapse of the central power. If we are to truly reclaim the legacy of Moravia, Veligrad has to be rebuilt as our capital city once more.

nationalIdeas.name: gma_rex_sclavorum
nationalIdeas.title: Rex Sclavorum
nationalIdeas.desc: In 885, Pope Stephen V sent a letter to Svatopluk I of Moravia, addressing him as Rex Sclavorum - King of the Slavs. This not only recognized his royal title but also gave him legitimacy to expand his realm and bring other Slavic nations to Christianity.

nationalIdeas.name: gma_canonize_cyril_methodius
nationalIdeas.title: Canonize Cyril & Methodius
nationalIdeas.desc: Constantine, later known as Cyril, and Methodius were the two Byzantine disciples sent to Moravia by Michael III. Thanks to their efforts, Moravia became the first evangelized Slavic nation and the legacy of their efforts has lived ever since in the Balkans and the Rus'. To honor their heritage, we should strive to canonize them.

nationalIdeas.name: gma_svatopluks_legacy
nationalIdeas.title: Svatopluk's Legacy
nationalIdeas.desc: Svatopluk was a king of Moravia under whose rule, Great Moravia attained its maximum territorial expansion. He ruled with an iron fist, and combined with his diplomatic prowess, he managed to fight off the mighty armies of East Francia as well as the heathen Magyar hordes. His legacy shall inspire our nation, so that we may once again relive the glorious days of his reign.

nationalIdeas.name: ger_german_confederation
nationalIdeas.title: The German Confederation
nationalIdeas.desc: With the German lands now unified, we have found that we have more in common with each other than what divides us. We can use this to ensure peace and stability in our realm.

nationalIdeas.name: ger_german_universities
nationalIdeas.title: The Universities of Germany
nationalIdeas.desc: There are many universities within our realm, each ready to supply us with great minds from all over Central Europe. Due to this, our ability to innovate the state is unmatched. Now people flock to our administration to help us unite the remaining pieces of Germany and move towards our new common goals.

nationalIdeas.name: ger_reichsheer
nationalIdeas.title: Reichsheer
nationalIdeas.desc: A unified German State needs a national army, which we now have founded in the Reichsheer. During the Holy Roman Empire, this was but a small token force, but in the new Germany, our army shall be a strong and well-trained force, consisting of men of all parts of our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: ger_new_hanseatics
nationalIdeas.title: The New Hanseatic League
nationalIdeas.desc: Before Germany was united under one banner, many cities in northern Germany were part of the Hanseatic League, a trade league through which they helped each other to bring riches to their coffers and protect each other. Although this concept will need some adaptation to match the new reality, we can draw on its legacy to promote trade and other ties between different parts of our nation.

nationalIdeas.name: ger_junkers
nationalIdeas.title: German Junkers
nationalIdeas.desc: We may have brought an end to the shattered state of Germany in the Holy Roman Empire and the great political power of its nobles, but the aristocracy is still a practical source of competent officers for our armies. Making use of this, we can shift the focus of the nobility to another field of activity while building up a strong military elite at the same time.

nationalIdeas.name: ger_reichstag
nationalIdeas.title: Reichstag
nationalIdeas.desc: In a tradition dating back deep into the middle ages, which we have adapted to the new Germany, important men of our large empire come together at the Imperial Diet to discuss problems and make decisions collectively at the side of our emperor and for the benefit of our newly united realm. This allows us to forge a single cohesive state from the diverse patchwork of states that once made up Germany.

nationalIdeas.name: ger_eisen_und_kohle
nationalIdeas.title: Eisen und Kohle
nationalIdeas.desc: Our vast iron and coal deposits have allowed us to quickly develop our nation into a bustling industrial state. With our worth ethic and our technological expertise, we can produce what our country needs faster, and at a better price.

nationalIdeas.name: expand_viborg
nationalIdeas.title: Expand Viborg
nationalIdeas.desc: The fortress of Viborg sits on Finland's easternmost frontier against the Russian realm. For centuries it has proven itself as a defense against those who would attack the Finnish nation and an obstacle for any invader. By expanding the fortress we would make the situation even worse for our enemies.

nationalIdeas.name: hakkapelitta
nationalIdeas.title: The 'Hakkapeliitta'
nationalIdeas.desc: Finland is a rather poor and backward place, and service in the Swedish army gives people excellent opportunities to financial advancement via looting. Good horsemanship and high-quality horses allow us to raise excellent and feared cavalry who, our enemies maintain, are invulnerable due to witchcraft.

nationalIdeas.name: the_fourth_estate
nationalIdeas.title: The Fourth Estate
nationalIdeas.desc: Finland has always relied on its fourth estate, the free peasants, for the prosperity of the realm. The peasant class has throughout Finland's history often been powerful enough to challenge the nobles and sometimes even the king himself.

nationalIdeas.name: settle_middle_finland
nationalIdeas.title: Settle Middle Finland
nationalIdeas.desc: During the 16th Century Finland saw a substantial growth in the area settled by the farming population and this development was actively supported by the crown. While beneficial in the long run it also displaced local Sami and Karelians leading to conflict.

nationalIdeas.name: found_turun_akatemia
nationalIdeas.title: Found Turun Akatemia
nationalIdeas.desc: In 1640 the Turun Akatemia was founded at the suggestion of Count Per Brahe by Queen Christina of Sweden. It is today the first and thus oldest university in Finland.

nationalIdeas.name: the_white_death
nationalIdeas.title: The White Death
nationalIdeas.desc: Prepare for a spring invasion if you wish to conquer Finland as you do not wish to feel the deadly, cold embrace of the Finnish winter.

nationalIdeas.name: anjala_conspiracy
nationalIdeas.title: The Anjala Conspiracy
nationalIdeas.desc: A pivotal point to the building of the Finnish Nation was the Anjala Conspiracy. It came as a result of the Swedish King Gustav III's war with Russia in 1788. Viewing the king as a tyrant and displeased with the war many Finnish officers signed the Liikkala note and had it delivered to Tsarina Catherine the Great. The officers condemned the war in the note and declared it illegal and asked for the restoration of the Finnish borders according to the Treaty of Nystad. When King Gustav III learned of this he demanded his officers fight to the last man, but instead of cowering the officers united to issue the Anjala Declaration in which they took responsibility, criticized the attack on Russia and noted they would defend the fatherland if Catherine the Great refused the peace offer.

nationalIdeas.name: fkn_duchy_restored
nationalIdeas.title: The Duchy Restored
nationalIdeas.desc: After a lapse of several centuries, we have restored the Duchy of Franconia under us. There are none who can now doubt our status as one of the foremost powers of Germany.

nationalIdeas.name: fkn_main_trading
nationalIdeas.title: Trading on the Main
nationalIdeas.desc: The trade route from Vienna to Nuremberg and onwards down the Main to Wurzburg and Frankfurt is among the busiest in Germany. The merchants that travel it provide the life blood of our cities, where our people drive a hard bargain to make a living from commerce.

nationalIdeas.name: fkn_rugged_land_of_fortresses
nationalIdeas.title: A Rugged Land of Fortresses
nationalIdeas.desc: The hinterlands of Franconia are a hilly, rural terrain that is easily defendable - especially since many fortresses, not least the impressive Plassenburg in Kulmbach, have been built to defend key locations. Any would-be attackers will have their work cut out taking territory from us!

nationalIdeas.name: fkn_free_knights_of_franconia
nationalIdeas.title: Free Imperial Knights of Franconia
nationalIdeas.desc: There are a large number of Free Imperial Knights who call Franconia their home. We can draw upon them to lead our cavalry into battle!

nationalIdeas.name: franconian_wine
nationalIdeas.title: Franconian Wine
nationalIdeas.desc: Our wine is one of the best in the Empire, we should support our vintners by providing them with enough land to work.

nationalIdeas.name: fkn_baroque
nationalIdeas.title: A Baroque Duchy
nationalIdeas.desc: Our neighbors on all sides compete to build the most impressive palaces, commission the most beautiful artwork and be home to the most prestigious universities. We must be no different. With the resources of all of Franconia at our disposal, we shall ensure that our court is unequalled in Germany.

nationalIdeas.name: fkn_franconian_bourgeoisie
nationalIdeas.title: Franconian Bourgeoisie
nationalIdeas.desc: Our land has produced many artists, philosophers, composers and inventors. With our sizeable intelligentsia to draw upon, we will never be short of well-informed advisors and specialists for our projects, and the wealth of our land will surely grow rapidly.

nationalIdeas.name: coureurs_des_bois
nationalIdeas.title: Coureurs des Bois
nationalIdeas.desc: Coureurs des bois are legendary here and abroad for their ability to travel vast distances into the heartland of the continent and deal with the natives to obtain more furs. While they do compete with the official voyageurs, they allow more of our land's precious furs to reach the market and be sold.

nationalIdeas.name: the_seigneurial_system
nationalIdeas.title: The Seigneurial System
nationalIdeas.desc: Our nation's land system has been dominated by seigneurs since the earliest settlement here by our forefathers. Running a feudal-like system, they have become ingrained in our nation's policies and allow us to extract more taxes from the people.

nationalIdeas.name: relations_with_natives
nationalIdeas.title: Relations with the First Nations People
nationalIdeas.desc: Our sons have married their daughters and as such, we have become one with many of the native tribes. We must now maintain these relationships, this has driven each of our diplomats to do the work of many men.

nationalIdeas.name: fortifications_of_quebec
nationalIdeas.title: Fortifications of Quebec
nationalIdeas.desc: The river valleys are vital to our state both as means of transportation and as they are the homes of our farming communities. We must fortify these valleys in order to protect our people.

nationalIdeas.name: college_of_quebec
nationalIdeas.title: The College of Quebec
nationalIdeas.desc: The college in Quebec was the first to be established in the New World outside of Mexico. The tradition of learning safeguarded here allow our nation to be at the forefront of technological progress.

nationalIdeas.name: commissions_for_noble_sons
nationalIdeas.title: Commissions for Noble Sons
nationalIdeas.desc: The Holy Orders of the church are not interested in taking the younger sons of the nobility, thus they are often drawn to a military career. This is fine, since it ensures that we always have generals ready to and capable of leading our armies.

nationalIdeas.name: jesuit_missions
nationalIdeas.title: Jesuit Missions
nationalIdeas.desc: The various religious orders, but the Jesuits especially have made it their job to bring the true faith to the heathens around us. We view it as our duty, being a nation of the faithful, to ensure that they have every opportunity to carry out their work successfully.

nationalIdeas.name: nbi_our_land
nationalIdeas.title: Our Land
nationalIdeas.desc: This has always been our land since time immemorial. Our people have always lived here no matter the rise and fall of the countries around us, and we will not fall.

nationalIdeas.name: nbi_religious_friction
nationalIdeas.title: Religious Friction
nationalIdeas.desc: We have continued being a stronghold of Christianity even though around us other religions were expanding. We remain strong in our beliefs and so will be all under us.

nationalIdeas.name: nbi_desert_knowledge
nationalIdeas.title: Desert Knowledge
nationalIdeas.desc: The desert is our own native habitat, how could we not know it? We live comfortably with its presence, and can navigate through it with ease.

nationalIdeas.name: nbi_military_strength
nationalIdeas.title: Military Strength
nationalIdeas.desc: Our people have always been famous for their strength and prowess in combat. Nubian soldiers have seen battlefields all around the world.

nationalIdeas.name: nbi_nile_control
nationalIdeas.title: Nile Control
nationalIdeas.desc: The Nile is the main artery of our country, and it allows us not only an extensive trade but also great agricultural productivity.

nationalIdeas.name: nbi_christian_ties
nationalIdeas.title: Christian Ties
nationalIdeas.desc: We have always been an example for the Christian nations around us. Even when the Muslims came knocking we did not falter, and our brethren in the faith can be assured that we will protect them.

nationalIdeas.name: nbi_egyptian_relations
nationalIdeas.title: Egyptian Relations
nationalIdeas.desc: Our nation has historically always been tied to Egypt. Through it we got access to the ancient Greeks and Roman, and through it came also the Muslim. Through Egypt have always come great sources of news and information.

nationalIdeas.name: rjp_imperial_legacy
nationalIdeas.title: Imperial Legacy
nationalIdeas.desc: We have revived the imperial Ambitions of the Rajputs and reclaimed Kannauj and Avanti, once again forming the empire that once ruled all of northern India. Now Rajput warriors from all over the region are flocking to our banners, ready to die for the common cause.

nationalIdeas.name: rjp_land_of_petty_princes
nationalIdeas.title: King of Petty Princes
nationalIdeas.desc: For centuries the Rajput realms have been divided into a myriad of petty kingdoms, fighting each-other more than our common enemies. With the many princes of Rajputana now united under one banner, ready to serve one common ruler, we will be an unstoppable force.

nationalIdeas.name: marwari_horses
nationalIdeas.title: Marwari Horses
nationalIdeas.desc: Like their masters the Rajput cavalry horses are meticulously trained to perform on the field of battle. It is said that a Marwari horse may only leave the battlefield under one of three conditions - victory, death or carrying a wounded master to safety. By taking good care of these divine beings we ensure the everlasting dominance of our horsemen on the battlefields of India.

nationalIdeas.name: rjp_purbia_legacy
nationalIdeas.title: Purbia Legacy
nationalIdeas.desc: Rajput gunners have a reputation throughout India and have at times been incorporated in many of the armies of sultanates and kingdoms alike. Now that we have united the Rajput kingdoms the experience they have with firearms will allow us to build a new type of army centered around the use of muskets, rockets and cannons.

nationalIdeas.name: rjp_protectors_of_the_dharma
nationalIdeas.title: Protectors of the Dharma
nationalIdeas.desc: Few resisted outside invasions of India as much as the Rajput kingdoms of old. We are now the new bulwark of our faith, ready to defend the subcontinent from those that would impose their rule and their faith upon our people.

nationalIdeas.name: rjp_expanded_artillery_arm
nationalIdeas.title: Expanded Artillery Arm
nationalIdeas.desc: Sieges are what wins wars. We must experiment with ways of creating bigger and better cannon to bring down the many forts of our enemies within India and outside it.

nationalIdeas.name: rjp_monumental_architecture
nationalIdeas.title: Monumental Architecture
nationalIdeas.desc: A new empire requires a new style. We must build upon the classical monumental architecture of Rajputana and Imperial Kannauj to create a new style worthy of our growing empire.

nationalIdeas.name: SOM_land_of_punt
nationalIdeas.title: Land of Punt
nationalIdeas.desc: Ancient pyramidal structures, mausoleums, ruined cities and stone walls found in Somalia are evidence of an old sophisticated civilization known as Punt that once thrived in the Somali peninsula.

nationalIdeas.name: SOM_african_silk_road
nationalIdeas.title: African Silk Road
nationalIdeas.desc: Indian/Chinese silk and cinnamon were also exported for far higher prices to North Africa, and in turn the Near East and Europe, which made the silk and cinnamon trade a very profitable revenue generator, especially for the Somali merchants through whose hands large quantities were shipped across ancient sea and land routes. The sea route was often times faster than the land routes and this had a premium.

nationalIdeas.name: SOM_african_minting
nationalIdeas.title: African Minting
nationalIdeas.desc: The Somalians maintained a vast trading network, dominated the regional gold trade, which in turn minted its own currency, and left an extensive architectural legacy. The minted coins were considered to be some of the most valuable in the regions of Arabia and North Africa.

nationalIdeas.name: SOM_zeila_and_berbera
nationalIdeas.title: Zeila and Berbera
nationalIdeas.desc: The only seaports of importance on this coast are Zeila and Berbera, the former is an Arabian colony, dependent of Mocha, but Berbera is independent of any foreign power. It is, without having the name, the freest port in the world, and the most important trading place on the whole Arabian Gulf and Horn of Africa.

nationalIdeas.name: SOM_blue_nile
nationalIdeas.title: The Blue Nile
nationalIdeas.desc: The Blue Nile originates at Lake Tana in Ethiopia. The river flows generally south before entering a canyon about 400 km long, about 30 km from Lake Tana, which is a tremendous obstacle for travel and communication between the nation states of the horn of Africa. We are one of the few that know how to navigate this to where the Blue Nile meets the White Nile, and flows to Egypt.

nationalIdeas.name: SOM_indian_merchants
nationalIdeas.title: Indian Merchants
